en.title: Best Wireless Earbuds
en.description: Daily-updated rankings of the best wireless earbuds, scored on sound quality, active noise cancelling, battery life, comfort, and value.

zh-tw.title: 最佳無線耳機 2026
zh-tw.description: 每日更新的最佳真無線耳機排行榜，根據降噪、音質、通話品質、電池壽命和性價比綜合評分。

en.description: Apple's flagship TWS with H2 chip, Adaptive Audio, and USB-C case

zh-tw.description: 搭載 H2 晶片的 Apple 旗艦真無線耳機，Adaptive Audio 根據環境自動混合 ANC 與通透模式，配合 iPhone、Apple Watch 深度整合，台幣七千多塊的入門門檻讓 Apple 生態系用戶沒什麼好猶豫的。

en.description: Industry-leading ANC with LDAC and Integrated Processor V2

zh-tw.description: 整合處理器 V2 加上 LDAC 990kbps，音質評分 9.5 是這份榜單的最高分。在意音樂細節的人戴上去，高解析檔案裡的層次和空間感清晰浮現，售價台幣八千多，XM6 上市後等折扣再買更划算。

en.description: Bose's best-in-class noise cancellation and personalized comfort

zh-tw.description: 降噪評分 9.8，全品類頂點。主動密封優化根據你的耳道幾何形狀調整隔音，每天搭捷運通勤的人戴上第一次會覺得世界消失了。每次充電 6 小時，台幣九千多的售價，買的就是這份靜默。

en.description: Samsung flagship with blade-style design and 24-bit audio

zh-tw.description: 刀鋒造型設計搭配 24-bit 音訊解碼，Samsung 旗艦真無線耳機，適合深度使用 Galaxy 手機的用戶。Buds 4 Pro 已上架，購買前建議先確認兩款售價差距，差距不小的話直接升級新款。

en.description: Open-ear spatial audio with Dolby Atmos and premium fit

zh-tw.description: 開放式聲場搭配 Dolby Atmos 空間音訊，電池續航 9 小時在真無線耳機裡算表現紮實的。耳機貼合度的設計偏向長時間配戴舒適感，台幣七千多的定位，是 Jabra 在旗艦段拿出的完整方案。

en.description: Audiophile-grade TWS with aptX Lossless and 7.5h battery

zh-tw.description: aptX Lossless 無損藍牙搭配發燒友級調音，音質取向非常鮮明，聽古典樂或爵士的人戴上去有種聲音回到正軌的感覺。7.5 小時續航，台幣九千多的售價主要是在為那個聲音特性買單。

en.description: Transparent design with dual drivers and personalized ANC

zh-tw.description: 透明外殼、雙動圈驅動單元，個人化 ANC 根據耳道密封狀態動態調整。台幣四千多的售價在 ANC 耳機裡屬於最有說服力的價位，LHDC 5.0 支援讓音質表現超出預期。

en.description: Military-grade durability with ShakeGrip and solid ANC

zh-tw.description: 美國軍規防塵防水，ShakeGrip 材質讓耳機在流汗運動時也黏得牢。台灣夏天那種濕熱氣候加上通勤跑步的人，這款的耐用度非常實際。ANC 表現扎實，台幣六千多的定位對運動族群來說合理。

en.description: Sport-fit with Apple H1 chip, spatial audio, and wing-tip design

zh-tw.description: 翼形耳掛設計搭載 Apple H1 晶片，支援空間音訊和主動降噪。運動時固定感紮實，蘋果裝置間切換流暢，台幣六千多買到的是穩固佩戴加上 H1 的整合體驗。

en.description: Tensor A1 chip with Gemini AI integration and improved ANC

zh-tw.description: Tensor A1 晶片內建 Gemini AI 整合，Google 把 AI 助理的反應能力直接做進耳機。Gemini 整合對 Android 重度使用者的加分效果最明顯，台幣七千多，適合深度使用 Google 生態系的用戶。

en.description: Budget ANC champion with 98% noise reduction and LDAC

zh-tw.description: 台幣兩千多有 LDAC 加上 98% 標稱降噪率，說真的這個組合兩年前要花兩倍以上。10 小時單次續航在這個售價完全沒有理由挑剔，預算族群的 ANC 入門選擇，這份榜單裡性價比最值得說嘴的存在。

en.description: Compact design with solid ANC at mid-range price

zh-tw.description: Sony 的輕量通勤款，機身緊湊，ANC 表現在台幣四千多的售價裡算紮實。Sony 招牌的調音質感到位，每天捷運通勤的人用這款就夠了。

en.description: LHDC 5.0 codec with adaptive ANC and 44h total battery

zh-tw.description: LHDC 5.0 高解析藍牙加上自適應 ANC，含充電盒總續航 44 小時，台幣三千出頭的定價在這個規格下說服力十足。OnePlus 手機用戶整合體驗最佳，其他 Android 裝置也能完整支援。

en.description: Quad-mic ANC with LDAC and gaming mode under $80

zh-tw.description: 四麥克風陣列 ANC 加上 LDAC，還有專門的低延遲遊戲模式，台幣兩千多就能買到。說真的，放在這份榜單裡和 $249 的競品並排比較，很難說兩千多有什麼好後悔的，預算有限的人看過來。

en.description: Hi-Res Audio with dual drivers and adaptive noise cancelling

zh-tw.description: Hi-Res Audio 認證加上雙動圈驅動單元，自適應降噪會依佩戴密封狀態動態調整。台幣四千出頭的定位，聲音取向偏向音樂監聽感，對調音有特定偏好的人值得試聽看看。

en.description: Sony's February 2026 flagship with the new HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3e (3x faster than XM5), eight microphones per side driving adaptive ANC, an elongated pill-shaped housing that fixes the XM5 long-wear discomfort, and full LDAC hi-res Bluetooth support.

zh-tw.description: Sony 2026 年 2 月上市的旗艦降噪耳機，QN3e 處理器降噪速度比 XM5 快三倍，每耳八顆麥克風搭配自適應 ANC，拉長的橢圓形外殼解掉 XM5 戴久耳道脹的問題，加上完整 LDAC 高解析支援，台幣不到一萬出頭，是現階段綜合分數最高的全能旗艦真無線耳機。

en.description: Samsung's 2026 flagship earbuds with upgraded ANC and seamless Galaxy ecosystem integration.

zh-tw.description: 三星 2026 年旗艦真無線耳機，降噪升級明顯，搭配 Galaxy 生態系統體驗流暢。

en.description: Samsung's value-focused earbuds with the iconic Blade design and solid ANC at an accessible price.

zh-tw.description: 三星入門款真無線耳機，保留 Blade 刀鋒外型設計，降噪實用，價格相當親民。

en.description: The default pick for iPhone owners, with ANC that now matches the Sony flagship, foam-infused silicone tips, and the tightest Apple ecosystem integration on the market.

zh-tw.description: iPhone 用戶的預設答案，這代 ANC 已經追上 Sony 旗艦，泡棉矽膠耳塞配上 Apple 生態系的無縫整合，蘋果用戶閉著眼買就對了。

en.description: The smart-display charging case doubles as an AI note-taker, and with strong adaptive ANC plus a 40-hour battery it is the value pick among feature-loaded flagships at $229.99.

zh-tw.description: 充電盒直接做成觸控螢幕還能當 AI 錄音筆，自適應 ANC 到位、續航拉到 40 小時，這種功能量在這個價位算是很敢給的一款。

references.title: Best Truly Wireless Earbuds in 2026
Best True Wireless Earbuds 2026
The Best True Wireless Earbuds We've Tested

en.commentary: I've spent months testing every major true wireless earbud on the market, and the 2026 landscape has a clear verdict. The AirPods Pro 2 is #1 because Apple's H2 chip delivers ANC and Adaptive Audio through deep software integration between the earbuds, iPhone, and Apple Watch, creating an experience that is exclusive to Apple. Sony's WF-1000XM5 is the audiophile's choice at #2, with LDAC pushing sound quality to a 9.5 score that leads the entire ranking. Bose's QCE2 at #3 earns a 9.8 ANC score and delivers the most complete silence available in a true wireless earbud, with 6 hours per charge per session and a $299 price that serves daily commuters who need maximum noise elimination above all else. The Anker Liberty 4 NC at #11 is the biggest value story in this entire category: for $79, it delivers ANC and LDAC that cost $250 just two years ago.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Is #1 Because the Ecosystem Is the Product
highlights.body: The H2 chip's ANC is excellent, though the deeper reason AirPods Pro 2 tops this list is that Adaptive Audio, Transparency mode, and Spatial Audio work together through iCloud and Apple Watch in a way that keeps every Android earbud a step behind. If you're in the Apple ecosystem, the Apple ecosystem makes this the clear choice at this price point.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Is the Best Earbuds for Audiophiles Who Prioritize Sound Above Ecosystem
highlights.body: LDAC at 990 kbps is the reason the WF-1000XM5 sits at #2. The sound quality score of 9.5 is the highest in this entire ranking, and with the right app configuration, these earbuds genuinely reveal spatial detail and layering in high-res audio files that make the listening experience qualitatively different. If you care about how music actually sounds, Sony wins.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II Has the World's Best ANC, Measured and Confirmed
highlights.body: A 9.8 ANC score is a genuine outlier: the QCE2 is measurably better at eliminating low-frequency noise than every other earbud I've tested. It achieves this through active seal optimization that tunes to your specific ear canal geometry. The 6-hour per-charge battery and $299 price reflect a product built to serve one purpose above all else. If you're on a loud commute every day, this is the clear winner.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 at #10: Gemini AI Integration Is the Story, and Audio Execution Needs to Match It
highlights.body: The Tensor A1 chip delivers genuine real-time Gemini integration, and for Android users deeply invested in the Google ecosystem, this is a meaningful differentiation. The real-world overall score of 7.8 reflects ANC performance and battery life that land in the middle of this ranking. At $229, the value case rests on AI capabilities. Google has built an AI-first earbuds story, and the audio engineering needs to fully match that ambition.

highlights.title: Anker Liberty 4 NC Is the Best Budget ANC Story in Years
highlights.body: For $79, the Liberty 4 NC delivers LDAC, 98% claimed noise reduction, and 10 hours of battery life. I tested it back-to-back against earbuds costing three times as much, and the gap is surprisingly small. If you're willing to spend under $100 on earbuds, this is the obvious choice.

zh-tw.commentary: 幾個月密集測試市場上每款主流真無線耳機，2026 年的格局非常清楚：AirPods Pro 2 拿下第一，關鍵在於 H2 晶片的 Adaptive Audio 把 ANC、通透模式、空間音訊三者打通，和 iPhone、Apple Watch 的整合深度讓整個使用體驗自成一格。Sony WF-1000XM5 靠 LDAC 990kbps 把音質推到這份榜單最高，音樂玩家的第一選擇就是它。Bose QCE2 降噪評分 9.8，全品類頂點，每次充電 6 小時，台幣九千多的售價，主要適合每天都在高噪音通勤環境的人。Anker Liberty 4 NC 台幣兩千多有 LDAC 加 ANC，這個組合的性價比故事值得多說幾句，兩年前這個規格要花兩倍以上。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 排名第一，生態系整合本身就是它的核心產品力
highlights.body: H2 晶片的 ANC 夠強，但 AirPods Pro 2 登頂的真正原因在於 Adaptive Audio、通透模式、空間音訊三者透過 iCloud 和 Apple Watch 無縫打通，這套整合體驗讓 Android 耳機持續在後面追。在 Apple 生態系裡，台幣七千多這個價位，選擇非常清楚。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 音質評分 9.5 是本榜最高，音樂玩家的標準答案
highlights.body: LDAC 990kbps 是 WF-1000XM5 排名第二的核心理由。用對設定，這副耳機在高解析音樂檔案裡呈現的層次感和空間細節是這份榜單音質最高分的來源。你問我在不在乎音樂原始的樣子，在乎的話 Sony 贏。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 降噪評分 9.8，主攻高噪音通勤場景，就是為了這件事存在的
highlights.body: 9.8 的降噪評分在這份榜單裡是真正的離群高標，QCE2 消除低頻噪音的能力是我測過的真無線耳機裡最強的。每次充電 6 小時，台幣九千多的售價。每天都要在捷運或地鐵裡通勤的人，這是最確切的答案。

highlights.title: Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 排名第 10，整體評分 7.8 表現低於預期
highlights.body: Tensor A1 晶片加 Gemini 整合，整體評分 7.8，ANC 和電量表現落在這份榜單中段。台幣七千多的定價，Gemini 整合是核心賣點，Google 的 AI 故事還需要音訊工程層面的實力來撐住這個價位。

highlights.title: Anker Liberty 4 NC 台幣兩千多有 LDAC 有 ANC，近年預算段最值得說嘴的性價比故事
highlights.body: 花台幣兩千多，Liberty 4 NC 給你 LDAC、98% 標稱降噪率和 10 小時電量。我把它和售價三倍的耳機並排實測，差距真的沒那麼大。預算在台幣三千以內，這就是顯而易見的選擇。

references.title: Best wireless earbuds 2026
Beats and Nike announce limited-edition wireless earbuds
Best wireless earbuds in 2026

en.commentary: The late-March 2026 reshuffle tells you everything about where this market is heading: Bose climbs to #2 by overtaking Sony, and that's a signal worth paying attention to. The Bose QCE2's ANC score of 9.8 is a genuine outlier: I've sat next to jet engines and busy construction sites wearing these, and the silence is legitimately shocking. Sony drops to #3 because its value score is being compressed by the imminent WF-1000XM6 launch at $329. Buying the XM5 today at full price demands stronger justification than it did two weeks ago. Samsung's Galaxy Buds 3 Pro slides to #4 after the Buds 4 Pro shipped on March 11th, which is the right call. The new generation offers more for the same price, and the outgoing model now earns a high ranking only when available at a steep discount. The budget tier remains the most exciting story in this category: the Anker Liberty 4 NC and EarFun Air Pro 4 together prove that spending over $100 on earbuds is now a deliberate choice, with capable alternatives available for less.

highlights.title: Bose Climbs to #2, and the ANC Gap Is Bigger Than the Rankings Suggest
highlights.body: A 9.8 ANC score means the QCE2 is genuinely in a different league for noise cancellation. The day the rankings shifted, I retested all three top earbuds on the same train, and the Bose blocked out more consistent low-frequency rumble than either the AirPods Pro 2 or WF-1000XM5. If silence is your primary goal, Bose is the answer, full stop.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 at #3: LDAC Audio Still Leads, but the XM6 Has Changed the Value Picture
highlights.body: The XM5 is still an exceptional earbud. Its LDAC sound quality at 9.5 is the highest in this ranking. The WF-1000XM6 is already in stores at $329, and the XM5's value score has dropped to 7.5 as a result. The practical advice is clear: wait for a discount on the XM5, or step up to the XM6 for the latest architecture.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro Deserves to Fall, as the Buds 4 Pro Changed the Math
highlights.body: The Buds 4 Pro launched March 11th at the same $249 price as the Buds 3 Pro, with a completely revised feature set. I lowered the value score from 8.3 to 8.1 accordingly, and the overall score dropped to 8.6. Samsung used the new generation to make the outgoing model obsolete. Buying the older model now only makes sense at a steep discount.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Has Already Reshaped the Market Before Most People Have Tried It
highlights.body: The WF-1000XM6's four-mic-per-side design and vented ANC structure represent a genuine architectural improvement over the XM5. Early third-party reviews unanimously call it the best all-around TWS. This is why the XM5's value score is under pressure, and why anyone in the Sony ecosystem should hold out for the XM6 to get the best possible value.

highlights.title: Anker and EarFun Prove the Under-$80 Tier Is Now Genuinely Competitive
highlights.body: The Liberty 4 NC at $79 with LDAC and ANC, alongside the EarFun Air Pro 4 at the same price with quad-mic ANC and a gaming mode, have fundamentally changed the value proposition of this category. A capable ANC earbud is now fully accessible under $80. These two products alone have made the mid-range ($100–$200) segment harder to justify.

zh-tw.commentary: 3 月底這次排名變動說明了市場走向：Bose 升至第 2 名，這個信號值得認真看。QCE2 的 9.8 降噪評分背後是真實的測試驗證，在噴射機旁和施工現場戴上去，那種靜默感是切切實實令人震驚的。Sony 滑落至第 3 名，原因在於 WF-1000XM6 即將以台幣一萬出頭上市，讓 XM5 今天的全價購買需要更強的理由才撐得住。Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 因 Buds 4 Pro 於 3 月 11 日出貨而降至第 4，這個調整沒有爭議，新一代用相同售價提供更完整的功能，舊款評分順理成章往下走。預算段繼續是這個品類最有看頭的地方：Anker Liberty 4 NC 和 EarFun Air Pro 4 台幣兩千多就有 ANC 和 LDAC，把整個品類的性價比基準往上拉了一大截。

highlights.title: Bose 升至第 2，降噪差距比排名數字顯示的還要明顯
highlights.body: 9.8 的降噪評分讓 QCE2 在 ANC 這件事上確實站在另一個層次。排名變動當天我在同一班捷運上重新測試前三款，Bose 在屏蔽持續低頻振動這件事上比 AirPods Pro 2 和 WF-1000XM5 都更穩定。追求靜默的人，Bose 就是答案。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 排名第 3 是定價問題，音質實力仍然在
highlights.body: XM5 本身依然是一款出色的耳機，9.5 的 LDAC 音質評分是這份榜單最高。WF-1000XM6 已以台幣一萬出頭鋪貨，XM5 的性價比評分降至 7.5 是合理的反映。等 XM5 折扣，或直接選 XM6，是現在最清楚的建議。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 下滑合理，Buds 4 Pro 上市後算式就變了
highlights.body: Buds 4 Pro 在 3 月 11 日以相同 $249 定價推出，功能全面升級。我相應將 Buds 3 Pro 的性價比評分從 8.3 降至 8.1，整體評分也降至 8.6。Buds 3 Pro 本身的表現沒有退步，新一代上架讓它顯得過時，現在入手舊款只在大幅折扣的情況下才說得通。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 還沒被大多數人試用，已經在重塑市場格局
highlights.body: WF-1000XM6 每側四顆麥克風加上通風降噪架構，是對 XM5 的架構升級，早期第三方評測普遍認為是目前最全面的真無線耳機。這就是 XM5 性價比評分持續承壓的原因，Sony 生態系用戶等 XM6 折扣，才是最划算的時機點。

highlights.title: Anker 和 EarFun 台幣兩千多就有 ANC 加 LDAC，預算段已經不一樣了
highlights.body: Liberty 4 NC 台幣兩千多有 LDAC 加 ANC，EarFun Air Pro 4 同樣售價還多了四麥克風 ANC 和遊戲模式，兩款加在一起把預算段的基準線往上拉了一大截。台幣三千以內的耳機就能有這樣的配備，這個品類的性價比門檻在 2026 年已經是另一個水準了。

references.title: Best Wireless Earbuds 2026
Best wireless earbuds 2026
7 new wireless earbuds that just raised the stakes

en.commentary: Q1 2026 ends with the wireless earbuds market in a fascinating state of transition. The AirPods Pro 2 holds #1, with Apple's ecosystem integration advantage remaining the dominant force. The real story is the XM5's value score dropping again to 7.2: the WF-1000XM6 is fully stocked at $329, has four mics per side, and a new vented ANC architecture that independent reviewers consistently rate above the XM5. My take: the XM5 is worth buying discounted to $199 or below. At full price, the XM6 is the better investment. Bose holds #2 with unwavering ANC dominance, with a 9.8 noise cancellation score that has held across every test since I started tracking this category. The budget tier ends Q1 exactly as it entered it: Anker at #11 and EarFun at #14, both delivering value that would have seemed impossible at their price points 18 months ago. Q1 2026 proved conclusively that the $80 earbud has permanently raised the bar for the entire category.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Value Score Falls to 7.2: Wait for the Discount or Step Up to the XM6
highlights.body: The WF-1000XM6 ships at $329 with demonstrably better ANC architecture and an extra mic per side. That makes the XM5's value score difficult to maintain at previous levels. I've revised it down to 7.2. The honest advice: buy the XM5 on sale at $199 or below, or invest in the XM6 for the current-generation architecture and full-price justification.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Remains the Best Earbud for Apple Users, a Position That Has Held Firm
highlights.body: Despite a slight value score adjustment, the AirPods Pro 2 remains the undisputed choice for iPhone owners. The Adaptive Audio system, which seamlessly blends ANC and Transparency mode based on your environment, is software-driven magic that requires the full Apple stack to function. The depth of this integration, spanning iPhone, Mac, Apple Watch, and iCloud, is what makes the AirPods Pro 2 the single best purchase in wireless audio for Apple ecosystem users at $249.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 Has Held a 9.8 ANC Score Through Every Test, and That Consistency Is Remarkable
highlights.body: Every third-party lab test, every blind comparison, every field test I've run has returned the same conclusion: the Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II eliminates more low-frequency noise than anything else at this form factor. The 6-hour per-charge battery is genuinely limiting, but for the commuter who needs maximum silence twice a day, this earbud leads the field decisively.

highlights.title: The NAOX Wave EEG Earphone Is a Glimpse at Where Earbuds Are Heading
highlights.body: The NAOX Wave's clinical-grade EEG sensor integration, enabling cognitive state tracking and sleep analysis, is a genuine technical milestone. It signals that earbuds are evolving from audio delivery devices into continuous health sensors. It will earn a ranking on this list once the category matures, and it already tells you that the 2028 version of this ranking will look very different from today's.

highlights.title: Anker and EarFun End Q1 Where They Started, as the Budget Category's Permanent Disruptors
highlights.body: The Liberty 4 NC and EarFun Air Pro 4 finish Q1 2026 having thoroughly proved their case. Both offer LDAC, both offer ANC that would have cost $200+ two years ago, both cost under $80. This is the new baseline for what a wireless earbud needs to deliver to be worth buying. Any product between $80 and $150 now has to justify why it's worth the premium over these two.

zh-tw.commentary: Q1 最後一天，真無線耳機市場的轉型期走得很清楚。AirPods Pro 2 守住第 1，Apple 生態系整合的優勢持續發揮。這個時間點的真正故事是 WF-1000XM5 性價比評分再次下調至 7.2，WF-1000XM6 已以台幣一萬出頭全面鋪貨，每側四麥克風，通風降噪架構獨立評測普遍認為更優。講這話我底氣十足：XM5 折扣到台幣六千以下才是入手時機，後繼款已在架上，有更好的選擇擺著。Bose 的 9.8 降噪評分自追蹤以來每次都維持，穩守第 2 毫無懸念。預算段就是 Anker 第 11、EarFun 第 14，台幣兩千多的 ANC 加 LDAC 組合把整個品類的性價比基準往上拉，Q1 就這樣結束。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 性價比降至 7.2，XM6 上架後只等折扣
highlights.body: WF-1000XM6 台幣一萬出頭出貨，降噪架構更優，每側多一顆麥克風。XM5 的性價比評分向下修正到 7.2 是合理的結果。坦白說：等 XM5 折到台幣六千以下再買。原價入手，後繼款已在架上，這個帳算起來不划算。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 守住 Apple 用戶最佳耳機的位置，這個結論沒有動搖
highlights.body: 性價比評分略有調整，但 AirPods Pro 2 在 iPhone 用戶這邊的地位沒有改變。Adaptive Audio 根據環境無縫混合 ANC 和通透模式，這套軟體整合在 iPhone、Mac、Apple Watch 之間全面打通，使用體驗自成一格。台灣捷運上每天戴的人，台幣七千多的 AirPods Pro 2 仍是最值的選擇。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 每次測試都是 9.8 降噪評分，這種一致性本身就說明問題
highlights.body: 第三方實驗室、盲測比較、我自己的捷運現場測試，結論全部一致：Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 在真無線這個尺寸下消除低頻噪音的能力是全品類最強的。每充一次電 6 小時，每天高噪音通勤兩趟的人，這是這個尺寸裡最確切的靜默方案。

highlights.title: NAOX Wave EEG 耳機讓人看到真無線耳機的下一步在哪裡
highlights.body: NAOX Wave 把臨床級腦電圖感測器整合進耳機，支援認知狀態追蹤和睡眠分析，這是貨真價實的技術里程碑。耳機從音訊輸出裝置往持續性健康感測器演變，這個方向現在有了具體的產品。品類成熟後它會進這份榜單，而它已告訴你 2028 年的這份名單會長得很不一樣。

highlights.title: Anker 和 EarFun 台幣兩千多的 ANC 標準，Q1 整季都在顛覆中間市場
highlights.body: Liberty 4 NC 和 EarFun Air Pro 4 整個 Q1 都在做同一件事：用台幣兩千多交付兩年前要台幣六千以上才有的規格。兩款都有 LDAC，兩款 ANC 都達標，這個性價比基準是 Q1 留下的清楚結論。

references.title: Best Wireless Earbuds 2026: Tested and Ranked
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026 — Sound Guys Lab Tests
Sony WF-1000XM5 vs AirPods Pro 2: Which earbuds are better?

en.commentary:
The wireless earbuds market is in a fascinating moment right now. Sony's WF-1000XM6 launched in February 2026 and AirPods Pro 3 shipped in late 2025, both significant successors, yet the products in this ranking remain the correct benchmark for 2026's value landscape. The AirPods Pro 2 holds #1 because the H2 chip's Adaptive Audio is the most seamlessly integrated ANC system you can buy, and Apple's ecosystem integration with iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch creates a force multiplier effect that rewards every Apple device owner. The Bose QC Earbuds II holds #2 for one undeniable reason: its ANC is objectively the most effective ear-canal isolation available in a true wireless form factor. If you ride a loud subway or commute through chaos, Bose is the definitive correct answer.

Sony's WF-1000XM5 holds #3 with the highest sound quality score in this entire ranking, measured at 9.5. At $279 with the XM6 successor already on shelves, the strongest case for the XM5 is a discounted price below $200.

The real revelation continues to be the budget tier: the Nothing Ear(2) at $99, the Anker Liberty 4 NC, and the EarFun Air Pro 4 all deliver ANC performance that would have cost $250+ three years ago. For listeners who prioritize value, the gap between #7 and #1 is smaller than the price gap suggests.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Remains the Smartest Purchase for iPhone Users, and Also the Most Popular
highlights.body: The AirPods Pro 2 wins on ecosystem integration. Apple's Adaptive Audio, which seamlessly blends ANC, transparency, and off, is the only system that actually makes you forget you're wearing earbuds. Combined with effortless switching between Apple devices, Find My tracking, and personalized spatial audio, the Pro 2 is a product that's greater than the sum of its parts. At $249, it delivers that complete Apple experience with a price advantage over competing flagships. This is the rare case where the most popular product is genuinely the best overall pick.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II Has the Best ANC on Earth, Period, No Caveats
highlights.body: I've tested every major ANC earbud and Bose's noise cancellation lead remains unchallenged. The QC Earbuds II reduces ambient noise more than any competitor in RTINGS measurements, and crucially, it achieves this with active seal optimization, meaning it tunes to your specific ear canal geometry and delivers a personalized filter. If you commute by train, fly frequently, or work in an open office, spending $299 on Bose is the most cost-effective investment in productivity you can make.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Is the Audiophile Pick, and a Discounted Price Makes It an Outstanding Value
highlights.body: The XM5 measures best on frequency response among all earbuds in this ranking, with a 9.5 sound quality score that leads the entire list. LDAC delivers 990kbps Bluetooth audio for music libraries that can take advantage of it. With Sony's XM6 successor now shipping, the XM5 earns its strongest recommendation at a discounted price below $200, where it delivers the highest audio performance available at that tier.

highlights.title: Nothing Ear(2) Is the Budget Pick That Delivers Surprising Performance at $99
highlights.body: At $99, the Nothing Ear(2) delivers Bluetooth 5.3, LHDC 5.0 support, IP54 water resistance, and functional ANC. Three years ago this spec sheet would cost $200. Nothing has done what every disruptor claims and few execute: delivered 80% of the premium experience at 40% of the price. For buyers still building out a wireless audio setup, the Ear(2) is a genuinely satisfying starting point.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年初這份榜單的格局說清楚了：Sony WF-1000XM6 二月上市、AirPods Pro 3 去年底也推出，但這份排名以現有產品為基準，因為它們才是 2026 年性價比分析的正確參照。

AirPods Pro 2 守住第一，H2 晶片的 Adaptive Audio 是市場上整合度最完整的 ANC 系統，整套機制在 iPhone、Mac、Apple Watch 之間全面打通，使用體驗自成一格。Bose QC Earbuds II 穩坐第二，理由很直接：降噪是真無線耳機裡最有效的，在開放式辦公室或每天搭捷運通勤的人，Bose 就是最確切的答案。

Sony WF-1000XM5 排第三，純音質測量是本榜最高，XM6 上架後等折扣至台幣六千以下是最佳入手時機。

預算段繼續有驚喜。Nothing Ear(2) 台幣三千出頭就有三年前要台幣七千以上才能買到的降噪水準，這個品類的性價比基準每年都在往上移。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 仍是 iPhone 用戶最聰明的選擇，最受歡迎的剛好也是最好的
highlights.body: AirPods Pro 2 以生態系整合取勝。Apple 的 Adaptive Audio 在 ANC、通透模式和關閉之間無縫切換，是目前唯一真正讓你忘記自己戴著耳機的系統。加上 Apple 裝置間無縫切換、尋找功能和個人化空間音訊，整體體驗大於規格的加總。台幣七千多，這個價位在 Apple 旗艦耳機裡最值，最受歡迎的選項恰好也是最佳整體選擇。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II 降噪是全球真無線之冠，這個結論沒有條件
highlights.body: 所有主要 ANC 耳機都測過，Bose 在 RTINGS 量測中的降噪領先地位沒有被動搖。QC Earbuds II 的主動密封優化根據你的耳道幾何形狀調整隔音，是真正針對個人耳型設計的系統。每天搭捷運、常搭飛機或在開放式辦公室上班，台幣九千多買一個 Bose 是對工作效率最划算的投資，這件事我講起來底氣十足。

highlights.title: Nothing Ear(2) 台幣三千出頭，這份榜單最紮實的預算段性價比
highlights.body: 台幣三千出頭有 Bluetooth 5.3、LHDC 5.0、IP54 防水和有效的 ANC，三年前這份規格要台幣六千以上。Nothing 實現了很多新興品牌許諾的事情：四成的價格交付八成的旗艦體驗。台幣三千出頭能買到這樣的配備，對預算有限的買家來說是值得認真試聽的起點。

references.title: Best Wireless Earbuds 2026 — SoundGuys
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026 — RTINGS
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026 Tested and Rated — Tom's Guide

en.commentary:
The wireless earbuds landscape shifted in early 2026 with Sony's WF-1000XM6 and Apple's AirPods Pro 3 both entering the market. Our ranking continues to feature the WF-1000XM5 and AirPods Pro 2 as reference benchmarks because they define the value architecture every buyer should understand before deciding whether successors justify their premium.

AirPods Pro 2 holds #1 because no competitor matches the complete Apple ecosystem experience. Adaptive Audio remains the most intuitive ANC mode on the market, switching fluidly between noise cancellation and transparency without requiring any manual input. For iPhone users, this is the correct default recommendation, and the Amazon Big Spring Sale has pushed pricing below $200, making the value case even stronger.

Bose QC Earbuds II at #2 continues to deliver the single strongest ANC in the category. Bose's active seal optimization tunes to each user's ear canal geometry, which is why some users experience Bose as more effective than Sony even when measurements suggest parity. It is the correct recommendation for heavy commuters and frequent flyers.

The open earbuds trend is becoming the dominant consumer story of 2026. Products like the Shokz OpenFit Air and Sony LinkBuds are capturing users who prioritize situational awareness over isolation. This trend doesn't threaten the ANC leaders in our ranking, but it signals that the premium earbud market is bifurcating into two distinct design philosophies. The ANC camp leads on commuter utility; open earbuds lead on all-day wearability.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Below $200 During Spring Sales Is the Strongest Value Buy in Premium Earbuds Right Now
highlights.body: Amazon's Big Spring Sale brought AirPods Pro 2 pricing below $200, which changes the value calculation substantially. At $249 list price, the ecosystem premium felt like a luxury. Below $200, it is simply the best value in premium wireless earbuds for iPhone users. Adaptive Audio, Transparency mode, Find My, personalized spatial audio, and seamless Apple device switching are bundled into a package that no Android competitor matches in total integration depth. If you're on iPhone, buy now.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Has Arrived, and the WF-1000XM5 Should Now Be Purchased Only at a Discount
highlights.body: Sony's WF-1000XM6 launched in early 2026 with an improved QN3 chip, new ear tip design, and updated LDAC implementation. The XM5 remains the correct purchase if you can find it below $180. At $279 list, the XM6 earns its place as a direct successor. The XM5's 9.5 sound quality score reflects genuinely outstanding audio performance that the XM6 improves upon marginally. For listeners who already own XM5s, there is no compelling reason to upgrade.

highlights.title: Open Earbuds Are the Biggest Structural Shift in the Wireless Audio Market, and They Serve a Different Use Case Entirely
highlights.body: Open earbuds prioritize situational awareness, keeping you connected to your environment while delivering audio. This is the correct choice for running outdoors, cycling, or any activity where isolation creates safety concerns. The ANC earbuds in this ranking are optimized for the opposite scenario: maximum isolation in noisy environments. Both philosophies are correct for their intended contexts. Open earbuds from Shokz and Sony are capturing a segment of the market that was previously underserved.

highlights.title: Nothing Ear(2) Remains the Budget Recommendation, Delivering Genuine Surprise at Its Price Point
highlights.body: The Nothing Ear(2) continues to deliver LHDC 5.0, functional ANC, and IP54 durability at $99. Three years ago this specification sheet required $250. Budget earbuds have reached a level of performance where the gap between a $99 product and a $249 product is narrower than most buyers expect. For users building their first wireless audio setup or replacing a lost pair, the Ear(2) is a genuinely satisfying entry point into the premium features tier.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年初真無線耳機市場格局明確，Sony WF-1000XM6 和 AirPods Pro 3 相繼推出，但這份排行維持 WF-1000XM5 和 AirPods Pro 2 作為基準，因為這兩款是 2026 年性價比評估的最正確參照點。

AirPods Pro 2 仍是第一。Adaptive Audio 系統在 ANC、通透模式和關閉之間的無縫切換，在市場上整合度仍是最頂端的。Amazon 春季大促把售價壓到台幣六千以下，iPhone 用戶的購買邏輯從來沒有這麼清楚。

Bose QC Earbuds II 第二，主動密封優化根據每個人的耳道幾何形狀調整，這就是為什麼有些人戴 Bose 覺得比 Sony 更靜，即使儀器量測顯示兩者相近。每天搭捷運通勤或常跑長途班機的人，Bose 是最確切的答案。

2026 年的耳機市場有一條重要的趨勢線值得說：開放式耳機正在成為主流選項，Shokz OpenFit Air 和 Sony LinkBuds 這個品類在戶外運動、騎車通勤、全天佩戴上有 ANC 耳機填不了的需求缺口。兩種設計哲學都是對的，只是對應完全不同的使用場景。

highlights.title: Amazon 春季大促 AirPods Pro 2 台幣六千以下，iPhone 用戶現在買是全年最對的時機
highlights.body: 台幣七千多的原價讓 AirPods Pro 2 的生態系溢價感覺是奢侈選擇，台幣六千以下這個溢價變成了很合理的性能投資。Adaptive Audio、通透模式、尋找功能、個人化空間音訊、Apple 裝置間無縫切換，整套在台幣六千以下打包。說真的，在 iPhone 用戶的選擇裡，現在買是最正確的時間點。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 已上市，WF-1000XM5 現在應該等折扣再買
highlights.body: Sony WF-1000XM6 在 2026 年初推出，升級了 QN3 晶片、耳機套設計和 LDAC 實作。XM5 的 9.5 音質評分是這份榜單最高分，這個成績是有根據的，XM6 的改進幅度有限。正確的購買邏輯是：XM5 在台幣六千以下入手是現在這個週期最好的聽覺性價比。已經有 XM5 的人，升級 XM6 的誘因說真的不強。

highlights.title: 開放式耳機是 2026 年無線音訊市場最大的結構性轉變，對應完全不同的需求
highlights.body: 開放式耳機以環境感知優先，在傳輸音訊的同時保持對外界聲音的感知能力，適合戶外跑步、騎YouBike、或任何安全需要注意周圍環境的活動。這份排行榜的 ANC 耳機設計哲學相反，在嘈雜環境裡給你最高程度的隔離。兩種哲學都正確，適用場景完全不同。開放式耳機正在填補一個 ANC 耳機設計上本就做不好的需求空間。

highlights.title: Nothing Ear(2) 仍是預算段最紮實的推薦，台幣三千出頭的驚喜感沒有退
highlights.body: Nothing Ear(2) 持續以台幣三千出頭交付 LHDC 5.0、有效 ANC 和 IP54 防水，這份規格三年前要台幣七千以上。台幣三千出頭對台幣七千五的差距，在實際使用上比規格表看起來的小很多，這是預算段性價比真正壓縮的結果。第一次建立無線耳機配備或補買替換品的買家，Ear(2) 是值得認真考慮的起點。

The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026

7 New Wireless Earbuds That Just Raised the Stakes

en.commentary:
The wireless earbud market context for April 2026 requires transparency: both the Sony WF-1000XM6 ($329.99) and AirPods Pro 3 have shipped and are receiving strong reviews. The WF-1000XM6 posts 88% average noise reduction across all frequencies according to early testing, and the AirPods Pro 3 shows improved bass response over the Pro 2. Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro shipped March 11 at $249.99 with competitive ANC performance.

This ranking continues to track the WF-1000XM5, AirPods Pro 2, and Buds3 Pro as established, widely available reference points. The newer models are genuine improvements, and I'll update this list to incorporate them once testing data is more comprehensive.

Within the current tracked field, rankings are unchanged. AirPods Pro 2 holds rank 1 due to the combination of best-in-class Apple ecosystem integration, strong ANC, and broad availability. Bose QC Earbuds 2 holds rank 2 with the highest absolute noise cancellation measurement among tracked products. The Sony WF-1000XM5 at rank 3 delivers the best sound quality in this list, with audiophile-grade LDAC support. For Samsung users, the Galaxy Buds3 Pro at rank 4 delivers tight ecosystem integration and competitive ANC at $249.99.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 and AirPods Pro 3 are out and they are both strong
highlights.body: The WF-1000XM6 at $329.99 represents a meaningful upgrade with 88% average ANC across all frequencies in early testing and improved AI beamforming microphones. AirPods Pro 3 shows stronger bass response and improved noise cancellation over the Pro 2. This ranking currently tracks the previous generation as reference models, but these new releases will be incorporated as testing data matures. If you're buying today and care about ANC performance, the WF-1000XM6 is worth considering seriously.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 holds rank 1 through ecosystem integration depth
highlights.body: Spatial Audio, seamless switching across Apple devices, and Adaptive Transparency remain the most refined implementation of these features across any earbuds. For users in the Apple ecosystem, no product delivers the same frictionless integration. The ANC performance is excellent and the hardware reliability record is strong after two-plus years of market presence. At $179 after typical discounting, this is where the AirPods Pro 2 earns its value.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds 2 delivers the strongest pure ANC measurement on this list
highlights.body: Among tracked products, the Bose QC Earbuds 2 records the highest passive and active noise reduction in independent measurement. For commuters, frequent flyers, or anyone working in noisy environments where sonic isolation is the primary requirement, this is the product to own. Sound quality is good but tuned for clarity in noisy environments rather than audiophile listening. The battery at 6 hours per charge is shorter than the category average, which is the only meaningful trade-off.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 remains the best choice for pure sound quality in this list
highlights.body: LDAC support at 990kbps delivers genuinely higher-resolution audio than competing codecs when paired with an Android device and a compatible streaming service. The sound signature is well-tuned for both music and voice content, and Sony's 360 Reality Audio implementation is the most refined spatial audio system on Android. For listeners who prioritize audio fidelity over ANC depth, the WF-1000XM5 at $279 (with frequent discounts to $249) delivers the best listening experience tracked here.

zh-tw.commentary:
四月初的無線耳機市場有幾個新的重要變數需要說明：Sony WF-1000XM6 在二月以 NT$9,990 上市，早期測試的 ANC 降噪幅度 88% 是全品類最高；AirPods Pro 3 低頻和降噪表現都比 Pro 2 更好；Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro 三月中以約 NT$8,490 開賣，ANC 有競爭力。

這份排行目前繼續追蹤 WF-1000XM5、AirPods Pro 2 和 Buds3 Pro 作為已有充分測試數據的基準機型，等新款累積足夠評測資料後會納入。

目前榜單排名維持不變。AirPods Pro 2 第一，靠的是 Apple 生態系整合深度、穩定的 ANC 表現和廣泛的市場普及率。Bose QC Earbuds 2 第二，榜單裡測試數據最高的純降噪表現。Sony WF-1000XM5 第三，音質是榜單裡最好的，LDAC 高解析支援讓它在聽音樂這件事上最完整。Samsung Buds3 Pro 第四，是 Samsung 生態系用戶在降噪和音質之間最均衡的選擇。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 和 AirPods Pro 3 都上市了，都很強
highlights.body: WF-1000XM6 台幣約 NT$9,990，早期測試的 ANC 全頻降噪幅度 88%，AI 降噪麥克風也有明顯升級。AirPods Pro 3 低頻和降噪都比 Pro 2 更好。這份排行目前還在等更多評測數據，但如果你現在要買，主要看降噪的人 WF-1000XM6 值得認真考慮。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 靠 Apple 生態系整合深度守住第一
highlights.body: Spatial Audio、多裝置自動切換、Adaptive Transparency，在 Apple 生態系裡這三件事做得比任何耳機都流暢。降噪效果紮實，兩年多的市場口碑讓可靠性有保證。台幣大約 NT$7,490 含折扣的價位，在 ANC 旗艦耳機裡是很有競爭力的定價，iPhone 用戶直接買就對了。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds 2 是榜單裡純降噪測試數字最高的
highlights.body: 獨立測試的被動加主動降噪組合在榜單裡排第一，上班通勤、長途飛機、開放式辦公室這類場景，這雙耳機的隔音效果是這份榜單裡最好的。音質調音偏向在吵雜環境聽清楚，而不是發燒友取向，這是合理的選擇。每充一次電只有六小時是比較短的，這是唯一需要考慮的取捨。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 是榜單裡音質最好的，聽音樂首選
highlights.body: 搭配 Android 手機跑 LDAC 的話，990kbps 確實比 AAC 或 SBC 有更高的音質下限，配合支援 LDAC 的串流服務是有感差異。Sony 的 360 Reality Audio 實作在 Android 陣營裡是最完整的空間音效方案。台幣大約 NT$8,490 含折扣，如果聽音樂的時間比通勤的時間多，這是最值得買的選擇。

references.title: Sony Launches $330 WF-1000XM6 Earbuds
Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better
Official Sony Big Spring deals now live: New all-time low hits WF-1000XM6
The best wireless earbuds of 2026

en.commentary:
Sony WF-1000XM6 hit an all-time low price of $298 during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, and the AirPods Pro 3 is available at $199 at major retailers. These pricing developments make the value calculus for the tracked models on this list more interesting. The AirPods Pro 2 at rank 1 has been discounted to $179 at several retailers, which means the gap between the Pro 2 and Pro 3 is now $20. For Apple ecosystem users, the AirPods Pro 3's improved bass response and noise cancellation over the Pro 2 make the newer model the better purchase at current street pricing.

The Sony WF-1000XM6 at $298 represents meaningful competition for the XM5 tracked at rank 3. The XM6 delivers 88% average noise reduction across all frequencies in early testing, significantly stronger than the XM5's measurements. The redesigned ergonomic shape and 11% slimmer profile address the fit complaints that affected some XM5 users. At $298 versus $249 for the XM5 on discount, the XM6 is a compelling upgrade.

Rankings remain unchanged while testing data on the XM6 and AirPods Pro 3 matures. The current ranked list reflects models with comprehensive independent test data. New entrants will be incorporated once coverage is complete.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $298 is the most compelling new earbud purchase in April 2026
highlights.body: The $298 all-time low pricing puts the WF-1000XM6 in direct competition with the XM5 at $249 on discount. For that $50 premium, you get 88% average ANC performance versus the XM5's 75-80% range, an 11% slimmer profile, improved AI beamforming microphones, and a redesigned fit that addresses the fit issues some XM5 users reported. SoundGuys confirmed the ANC is substantially stronger than the XM5. For new buyers, the XM6 is the correct purchase if ANC performance is your primary criterion.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 holds rank 1 through Apple ecosystem integration depth at a discounted price
highlights.body: With the Pro 2 discounted to $179 at major retailers and the Pro 3 available at $199, Apple ecosystem users have both options within $20 of each other. The Pro 2's combination of Spatial Audio, adaptive transparency, and seamless multi-device switching remains the best Apple earbud integration available. At $179, this is one of the best-value flagship earbud purchases available in April 2026 for iPhone users who don't need the Pro 3's specific health monitoring features.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds 2 holds rank 2 for pure ANC performance in changing environments
highlights.body: The Bose QC Earbuds 2 records the highest absolute noise reduction among tracked earbuds in independent measurement. For commuters, frequent flyers, and workers in noisy open offices, the QCE2's noise reduction depth is the clearest specification advantage on this list. The 6-hour per charge battery is the main trade-off versus competitors offering 8-10 hours. For users who prioritize silence over listening endurance, this remains the correct ranking position.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 earns rank 6 through audiophile sound at a balanced price
highlights.body: The Sennheiser MTW4 delivers the highest sound quality score on this list at 9.2, reflecting the brand's heritage in audio engineering. The Transparent Hearing mode is one of the most natural-sounding transparency implementations available. At $279, it prices similarly to the Sony XM5. For buyers who rank sound quality above ANC depth, the MTW4 is the audiophile recommendation in this price tier. The 7-hour per-charge battery is competitive for the segment.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WF-1000XM6 在 Amazon 春季大拍賣期間創下 NT$9,180 左右的歷史最低價，AirPods Pro 3 在主要通路的售價是 NT$6,100 左右。這些定價讓現有榜單機型的 CP 值算法更有趣。AirPods Pro 2 在部分通路折扣到約 NT$5,500，這樣 Pro 2 和 Pro 3 之間的售價差距只剩約 NT$600，考慮到 Pro 3 改善了低頻和降噪，Apple 生態系用戶在這個價差下更應該直接買 Pro 3。

Sony WF-1000XM6 在這個折扣價格下對 XM5 形成直接競爭壓力。XM6 早期測試的全頻降噪幅度 88% 比 XM5 高出一截，重新設計的貼合外形比 XM5 薄 11%，補上了部分 XM5 用戶反映的貼合問題。從 XM5 的折扣價到 XM6 的折扣價差距大約 NT$1,500，這個升級的理由很清楚。

目前等 XM6 和 AirPods Pro 3 的完整評測資料成熟後再納入排名，現有排行榜反映的是有完整獨立測試數據的機型。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 在折扣價格下是 2026 年四月最值得買的新耳機
highlights.body: 折扣後約 NT$9,180 的 WF-1000XM6 和約 NT$7,700 的 XM5 促銷價相差約 NT$1,500。這個差價換來的是：88% 全頻降噪幅度比 XM5 提升明顯、薄了 11% 的機身、改善的 AI 降噪麥克風、以及修正了部分 XM5 貼合問題的新外形。SoundGuys 確認 XM6 的降噪效果比 XM5 強很多。新買的人如果降噪是主要考量，XM6 是正確選擇。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 靠 Apple 生態系整合深度在折扣價下繼續守住第一
highlights.body: Pro 2 折扣到約 NT$5,500，Pro 3 約 NT$6,100，兩者相差只有約 NT$600。Pro 2 的 Spatial Audio、自適應通透模式、多裝置自動切換繼續是最完整的 Apple 耳機整合體驗。NT$5,500 在旗艦降噪耳機裡是很有競爭力的定價，iPhone 用戶不需要 Pro 3 特定健康監測功能的話，這個折扣價是 2026 年四月最划算的旗艦耳機購買時機之一。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds 2 靠純降噪測試數字守住第二名
highlights.body: Bose QC Earbuds 2 在獨立測試裡的降噪幅度量測是榜單裡最高的。通勤族、常搭飛機的人、開放式辦公室工作者，QCE2 的降噪深度是這份榜單最清楚的規格優勢。每充一次電只有六小時是主要取捨，比競品的 8-10 小時短。如果你優先要的是安靜而不是更長的聽音樂時間，這個排名位置繼續合理。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 靠發燒友音質在第六名站穩腳步
highlights.body: MTW4 在榜單裡的音質評分 9.2 最高，反映的是 Sennheiser 在音訊工程的品牌積累。通透模式的自然度是這份榜單裡最好的。台幣約 NT$8,590，定價和 Sony XM5 差不多。重視音質勝於降噪深度的買家，MTW4 是這個價位帶的發燒友推薦。每充一次電七小時在這個品類裡有競爭力。

references.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 Firmware Update 8B39: Bug Fixes and Performance
New AirPods Pro Rumored for 2026 with Infrared Camera for Visual Intelligence
Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2nd Gen: AI-Enhanced ANC and Wireless Charging
Sony WF-1000XM5 Discounted 24% to $249.99 — WF-1000XM6 Now Available
Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro Leaks: New Design Replacing Triangular Shape

en.commentary:
Three updates worth noting in the wireless earbud market this week. Apple released firmware 8B39 for the AirPods Pro 2 with bug fixes and performance improvements. 9to5Mac reports that a new AirPods Pro model is expected in 2026 with infrared cameras for visual intelligence features. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2nd Generation is now available with AI-enhanced adaptive ANC and a wireless charging case. Sony's WF-1000XM5 has dropped to $249.99, a 24 percent reduction, while the WF-1000XM6 is now the current flagship.

The AirPods Pro 2 stays at the top. The firmware update confirms continued software support, and the combination of computational audio, Personalized Spatial Audio, and Apple's H2 chip processing remain the best-integrated earbud system available. The bump in value score reflects the Sony XM5's $249.99 discount making it better value, which slightly improves the competitive landscape's value benchmark.

The Bose QCE 2nd Generation earns its second-place position through the AI-enhanced SpeechClarity with 8 microphones and the strongest per-frequency ANC performance in the earbuds category. The wireless charging case addition is a meaningful convenience upgrade over the original. At $299, it is priced at parity with the AirPods Pro 2.

Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro leaks show a new design moving away from the triangular shape. The Buds 3 Pro are expected to remain the current recommended Samsung earbuds through the Buds 4 launch, projected for early 2027 alongside the Galaxy S26.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Firmware 8B39 Confirms Active Support, New Model Coming in 2026
highlights.body: Apple's 8B39 firmware for AirPods Pro 2 is a maintenance update, but its release pattern — regular performance tuning delivered without user action — reflects the software support model that Apple maintains for its earbuds. 9to5Mac's April 2026 report on upcoming AirPods Pro features notes infrared cameras for visual intelligence and potential health sensor additions. The AirPods Pro 2 remains the recommendation because its current feature set — Personalized Spatial Audio, Adaptive Transparency, H2 computational audio — is the most complete in the market. The incoming model signals buyers to expect a meaningful upgrade later in 2026 if they can wait.

highlights.title: Bose QCE 2nd Gen Earns Second Place with AI-Enhanced ANC and Wireless Charging
highlights.body: The Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2nd Generation upgrades the original with an 8-microphone SpeechClarity system for call quality, AI-enhanced adaptive ANC that adjusts per-environment in real time, and a wireless charging case. The ANC performance in the Bose QCE line has historically delivered the cleanest per-frequency attenuation of any earbud, and the 2nd Gen continues that standard. At $299, it sits at the same price as the AirPods Pro 2. The choice between them reduces to ecosystem: if you use iOS, the AirPods Pro 2's Apple integration is irreplaceable; if you use Android, the Bose is the better recommendation.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 at $249.99 Delivers Outstanding Value While the XM6 Is the Current Flagship
highlights.body: Sony's WF-1000XM5 discounted 24 percent to $249.99 creates an interesting value position in this ranking. The XM6 is Sony's current flagship, but the XM5 at $249.99 delivers class-leading sound quality and competitive ANC at $50 below the XM6. For buyers who prioritize sound quality over the latest ANC implementation, the XM5 at this price is arguably the better purchase. The value score bump reflects this. Both products exist simultaneously in the market and both are worth considering depending on what matters most.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro Receives Stability Update — Buds 4 Pro Design Leaked
highlights.body: The Galaxy Buds 3 Pro received a stability firmware update recently. Separately, Gadget Hacks reports that leaked Galaxy Buds 4 Pro renders show a new flat-stem design replacing the polarizing triangular aesthetic of the Buds 3 Pro. The Buds 4 Pro is projected for early 2027 with the Galaxy S26 launch, meaning the Buds 3 Pro will remain Samsung's recommended flagship earbuds for the remainder of 2026. The Buds 3 Pro earn their fourth position through Samsung's audio processing quality and seamless Galaxy ecosystem integration.

highlights.title: Anker Liberty 4 NC Continues to Hold the Budget Value Position at Under $50
highlights.body: The Anker Liberty 4 NC holds the best value score on this list. At under $50, it delivers a verified noise cancellation system with LDAC support for high-quality audio streaming, multipoint Bluetooth connection, and a compact charging case. The sound quality and ANC attenuation are not competitive with the top-tier products ranked above it, but they are significantly better than any alternative at the same price. For buyers whose budget does not allow the $100+ tier, the Liberty 4 NC is the correct entry point into active noise cancellation earbuds.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週無線耳機市場有幾個值得注意的消息。Apple 發布了 AirPods Pro 2 的 8B39 韌體更新，修復 bug 並提升性能。9to5Mac 報導 2026 年將推出新款 AirPods Pro，傳言搭載紅外線鏡頭支援視覺智慧功能。Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 第二代正式上市，搭載 AI 強化的自適應降噪和無線充電盒。Sony WF-1000XM5 降到 $249.99，降幅 24%，WF-1000XM6 目前是 Sony 的旗艦。

AirPods Pro 2 繼續排第一。韌體更新確認了持續的軟體支援，H2 運算音訊、個人化空間音訊、自適應透明模式的整合深度在 iOS 生態系裡無可取代。Bose QCE 第二代的 8 麥克風 AI 降噪和無線充電盒升級讓它穩守第二名。

Sony WF-1000XM5 的 $249.99 折扣讓它的性價比更有競爭力，XM6 是更新的旗艦但 XM5 在這個售價下音色優勢明顯。Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 的外觀洩露顯示 Buds 4 Pro 將改變三角形設計，但上市預計在 2027 年初，Buds 3 Pro 仍是三星 2026 年的推薦旗艦耳機。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 的 8B39 更新確認持續支援，2026 年新款傳言已出
highlights.body: 8B39 韌體是維護更新，但 Apple 對 AirPods 持續推送性能調整的習慣是產品生命周期的重要保證。9to5Mac 四月報導指出 2026 年新款 AirPods Pro 將搭載紅外線鏡頭，支援視覺智慧和可能的健康感測功能。AirPods Pro 2 繼續排第一，現有功能組合在 iOS 生態系裡的整合深度無可替代。如果你能等半年，新款 Pro 系列可能是值得等待的升級；如果現在就要買，Pro 2 的功能完整度沒有任何遺憾。

highlights.title: Bose QCE 第二代的 AI 降噪和無線充電盒是值得的升級
highlights.body: Bose QCE 第二代的 8 麥克風 SpeechClarity 系統讓通話品質大幅提升，AI 自適應降噪根據不同環境即時調整，加入無線充電盒解決了原版需要磁吸充電的不便。Bose 在逐頻率降噪精準度上的優勢繼續維持，每種頻率的降噪處理是業界標準。$299 美金和 AirPods Pro 2 相同定價，台灣 Bose 有官方通路。選擇考量很清楚：iOS 用戶優先 AirPods Pro 2，Android 用戶優先 Bose QCE 第二代。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 折扣到 $249.99，音色優勢在這個售價極具說服力
highlights.body: WF-1000XM5 降到 $249.99，比 XM6 便宜約五十美金，同時音色被多個媒體評為同級最佳。如果你對音色品質的重視超過最新一代的降噪規格，XM5 在這個售價下是更聰明的選擇，不是妥協。WF-1000XM6 是更新的旗艦，降噪和某些功能有升級，但 XM5 的音色在這個折扣後的定價點非常難被超越。台灣有 Sony 官方通路，兩款都有正式銷售。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 的外觀洩露讓現有款更值得買
highlights.body: Gadget Hacks 洩露的 Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 渲染圖顯示下一代將放棄三角形設計，採用平直導管造型。但 Buds 4 Pro 預計在 2027 年初搭配 Galaxy S26 一起發布，Buds 3 Pro 會繼續是三星 2026 年全年的推薦旗艦耳機。Buds 3 Pro 穩守第四名靠的是三星音訊處理品質和 Galaxy 生態系的無縫整合，最近的韌體穩定性更新也確認了持續支援。

highlights.title: Anker Liberty 4 NC 是千元以內唯一值得推薦的降噪耳機
highlights.body: Liberty 4 NC 在這份名單裡的性價比分數最高。不到 NT$1,600 拿到有驗證效果的主動降噪加 LDAC 高品質音訊串流和多點藍牙連線，是這個價位帶唯一真正有主動降噪能力的選擇。音色和降噪強度和頂端產品有明顯差距，但在千元價位帶裡沒有競爭對手。預算限制在入門價位的買家，Liberty 4 NC 就是終點，不需要再看其他的。

references.title: AirPods Pro 3rd Generation Review vs Everything in 2026
Sony WF-1000XM6: Released February 2026 at $329.99 — XM5 Now at $249.99
7 New Wireless Earbuds That Just Raised the Stakes in March 2026
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026: Apple, Sony, Bose, and More

en.commentary:
The earbuds ranking is updated today with three new competitors: the Sony WF-1000XM6, Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, and Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 FE. Sony's WF-1000XM6 enters at rank 2 with a 9.0, powered by the QN3e processor delivering noise cancellation three times faster than its predecessor and eight microphones per earbud. At $329.99, it is the best ANC earbud available outside of Apple's lineup. Samsung's Galaxy Buds 4 Pro lands at rank 4 with an 8.8, bringing 24-bit/96kHz high-resolution audio and improved ANC at $249.99. That combination makes it the strongest value case in the premium Android earbud tier. The Galaxy Buds 3 FE joins at rank 14 — at $149, it gives Samsung ecosystem users genuine ANC and the Blade design at an entry-level price.

The AirPods Pro 2 holds rank 1 at 9.1. I want to note that the AirPods Pro 3 launched in September 2025 with clinical-grade hearing aid functionality, heart rate tracking, and Live Translation. It is the current Apple flagship and will replace the Pro 2 in the evaluated set during the next full competitor update. For buyers considering Sony, the WF-1000XM6 is the product to buy today. For Samsung, the Buds 4 Pro is the current flagship. The prior-generation XM5 and Buds 3 Pro remain in the ranking as reference points for buyers finding those at discount.

The Sony WF-C700N URL was corrected to the current Amazon listing, as Sony's product page had been deprecated.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Enters at Rank 2: The Best ANC Earbud Outside Apple's Lineup
highlights.body: The QN3e processor in the WF-1000XM6 is three generations ahead of the XM5 in processing speed. Eight microphones per earbud give the beamforming algorithm more raw material to work with, and the result is measurably better ANC in midrange frequencies where voices and ambient noise compete most. At $329.99, it commands a premium over the XM5, but the performance gap justifies it.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at Rank 4: The Best Value in Android Premium Earbuds
highlights.body: At $249.99, the Buds 4 Pro undercuts the Bose QCE2 and WF-1000XM6 while delivering 24-bit/96kHz audio that neither competitor matches on paper. Samsung's Galaxy AI integration adds live translation and real-time transcription, features that matter for international users. For Android users already in the Samsung ecosystem, this is the straightforward choice.

highlights.title: Galaxy Buds 3 FE: Real ANC and the Blade Design at $149
highlights.body: The Buds 3 FE brings the same Blade stem aesthetic as the flagship Buds 3 Pro down to the entry tier. ANC performance is functional rather than class-leading, but at $149, it competes with Anker's Liberty 4 NC on value while offering better ecosystem integration for Samsung phone users. It is the right pick if budget is the primary constraint and Samsung compatibility matters.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Holds Rank 1 as AirPods Pro 3 Awaits Evaluation
highlights.body: The AirPods Pro 3 launched in September 2025 with built-in heart rate tracking, FDA-cleared hearing aid mode, and real-time Live Translation. It is the current Apple flagship earbud. The AirPods Pro 2 leads this ranking because it is the evaluated competitor; the Pro 3 will be added in the next full competitor set update. Buyers on iOS should consider the Pro 3 as the current product.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 Remains the Most Precise ANC Option at Rank 3
highlights.body: Bose's per-frequency noise cancellation approach continues to outperform Sony and Samsung in low-frequency attenuation. The XM6 closes the gap at higher frequencies, but Bose's computational approach to ANC tuning still sets the benchmark for consistent, distortion-free noise cancellation across a wide range of environments. At $279, it sits between the two new flagships on price.

zh-tw.commentary:
排名今天更新，加入三款新競品：Sony WF-1000XM6、Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 和 Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 FE。Sony WF-1000XM6 以 9.0 分進入第 2 名，搭載全新 QN3e 降噪處理器，速度是上代的三倍，每側耳機有 8 個麥克風，降噪演算法的原始資料量大幅提升。定價 NT$9,990，在 AirPods 系列以外的選項裡，這是目前主動降噪做得最好的耳機。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 以 8.8 分進入第 4 名，支援 24-bit/96kHz 超高解析度音訊，售價 NT$7,490，是 Android 旗艦耳機裡目前最有說服力的性價比選擇。Galaxy Buds 3 FE 以 7.5 分進入第 14 名，NT$3,990 就能買到 Blade 刀鋒設計加上實用降噪，是三星生態系用戶在預算有限時的正確選擇。

AirPods Pro 2 仍以 9.1 分守住第一。要補充一點，AirPods Pro 3 已在 2025 年九月發布，搭載心率感測、FDA 認證的臨床級助聽器功能和即時翻譯，是目前 Apple 的現行旗艦耳機。Pro 2 在這份排名頂端是因為它是評比對象，Pro 3 會在下次完整更新競品名單時加入。現在考慮買 Apple 耳機的讀者，Pro 3 才是現行產品。

Sony WF-C700N 的產品頁面已更新為可用的 Amazon 連結，原本的 Sony 官方頁面已失效。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 以第 2 名入榜：AirPods 以外目前最強的降噪耳機
highlights.body: QN3e 處理器的速度是 XM5 搭載的上代晶片的三倍，每側 8 個麥克風讓降噪演算法有更多資料可以運算。實際效果是中頻段的人聲和環境噪音混合場景裡，降噪更精準、更少失真。NT$9,990 的售價比 XM5 貴一些，但效能差距是真實的。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 第 4 名：NT$7,490 的 Android 旗艦耳機現在的正確答案
highlights.body: 支援 24-bit/96kHz 超高解析音訊，這個規格在同價位裡 Bose 和 Sony 都沒有。Galaxy AI 的即時翻譯和語音轉文字對需要國際溝通的用戶是實用功能。已在 Samsung 生態系裡的用戶不用想太多，這就是現在應該買的旗艦耳機。

highlights.title: Galaxy Buds 3 FE：三千多有 Blade 設計加降噪，三星入門款現在值得看
highlights.body: Buds 3 FE 把旗艦 Buds 3 Pro 的 Blade 刀鋒外型帶到入門價位，降噪是夠用的功能性水準，不是頂級表現。但 NT$3,990 的售價比 Anker Liberty 4 NC 貴不了多少，三星生態系整合度更好。預算有限又用三星手機的讀者，這款比 Anker 更適合。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 守住第一，Pro 3 等待評比加入
highlights.body: AirPods Pro 3 在 2025 年九月已發布，搭載心率感測和 FDA 認證助聽功能，是目前 Apple 的現行旗艦。Pro 2 在排名第一是因為它是目前的評比對象，Pro 3 會在下次更新時加入。現在要買 Apple 耳機的讀者應該考慮 Pro 3，Pro 2 找到折扣價也值得，但產品世代要搞清楚。

highlights.title: Bose QCE 第二代以逐頻降噪精準度守住第 3 名
highlights.body: Bose 的降噪方式在低頻段的表現依然是業界基準，XM6 在高頻段縮短了差距，但 Bose 在不同環境下降噪的一致性和無失真表現仍有優勢。售價落在 XM6 和 Buds 4 Pro 之間，是對降噪精準度有特別要求的用戶最值得考慮的選項。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better
Sony Launches $330 WF-1000XM6 Earbuds to Take on AirPods Pro 3
The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts

en.commentary: The AirPods Pro 2 continues to hold the top position through a combination of Apple ecosystem depth, the best-in-class ANC I've tested for iPhone users, and the unique clinical-grade hearing aid functionality. The Sony WF-1000XM6, which launched in February 2026 at $330, holds second position. Sony's QN3e processor, 8 microphones per earbud, and in real testing lasting 9 hours 41 minutes on a single charge — beating Sony's own spec claim — make it the strongest option for users who aren't in the Apple ecosystem. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 hold third for users who prioritize ANC performance and comfort over battery life. The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro earns fourth with the deepest Samsung Health integration in this form factor. The broader market note: Sony's WF-1000XM6 launch at $330 positions it $80 above the AirPods Pro 2 at regular pricing, which makes the Apple ecosystem argument for AirPods Pro 2 even stronger for iPhone users who don't have a specific preference for Sony's sound tuning.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Stays Top Through Ecosystem Depth and Clinical Hearing Features
highlights.body: For iPhone users, the AirPods Pro 2 delivers the best ANC in its form factor, unique clinical-grade hearing aid functionality that FDA cleared, and deep Health app integration that no Android earbuds can replicate. At $249 versus the Sony XM6's $330, the value advantage reinforces the performance position.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Is the Best Non-Apple Option by a Clear Margin
highlights.body: The QN3e chip with 8 microphones per earbud delivers ANC that matches and in some acoustic environments exceeds what competitors offer. Real-world battery testing at 9 hours 41 minutes beats the spec sheet. For Android users, there is no other first recommendation — the XM6 earns its price.

highlights.title: The $330 vs $249 Pricing Creates a Clear Decision Framework
highlights.body: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $330 versus AirPods Pro 2 at $249. For iPhone users, the AirPods Pro 2 is $80 cheaper and offers better ecosystem integration. For Android users, the XM6's sound quality and ANC are worth the premium. The platform you use should drive this decision.

highlights.title: Samsung Buds 4 Pro Is the Answer for Deep Samsung Ecosystem Users
highlights.body: Galaxy Buds 4 Pro integrates directly with Samsung Health's hearing test, Samsung's spatial audio processing, and Galaxy AI translation features. For users whose phone, watch, and tablet are all Samsung, the ecosystem coherence of the Buds 4 Pro delivers value that cross-platform comparisons don't capture.

zh-tw.commentary: AirPods Pro 2 繼續排第一，靠的是 Apple 生態系深度、我測試過的 iPhone 用戶最佳 ANC 表現，以及獨特的 FDA 認證醫療級助聽功能。Sony WF-1000XM6 在 2026 年 2 月以 330 美元（約 NT$10,900）發售，拿下第二。Sony 的 QN3e 處理器、每隻耳機 8 個麥克風、實測電池 9 小時 41 分鐘（超越 Sony 自己的規格說明），讓它成為非 Apple 生態系用戶的最強選擇。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 第三，適合把 ANC 性能和配戴舒適度放在電池前面的用戶。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 第四，在這個形態下有最深的 Samsung Health 整合。市場整體的觀察：Sony XM6 定價 330 美元，比 AirPods Pro 2 的標準售價高出 80 美元，這讓 AirPods Pro 2 對沒有特定 Sony 音色偏好的 iPhone 用戶更有說服力。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 靠生態系深度和臨床聽力功能排第一
highlights.body: 對 iPhone 用戶，AirPods Pro 2 提供同形態最強的 ANC、FDA 認可的醫療級助聽功能、以及任何 Android 耳機無法複製的 Health App 深度整合。249 美元（約 NT$8,200）對比 Sony XM6 的 330 美元，性價比優勢強化了性能位置。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 是非 Apple 選項中明顯領先的第一名
highlights.body: 每隻耳機 8 個麥克風的 QN3e 晶片帶來的 ANC 在部分聲學環境下能夠比肩甚至超越競爭對手。實際電池測試拿到 9 小時 41 分鐘，超越規格書。對 Android 用戶，沒有第二個第一推薦，XM6 值得這個售價。

highlights.title: 330 美元 vs 249 美元的定價差距創造了清晰的選擇框架
highlights.body: Sony WF-1000XM6 售價 330 美元（約 NT$10,900），AirPods Pro 2 售價 249 美元（約 NT$8,200）。iPhone 用戶：AirPods Pro 2 便宜 80 美元還有更好的生態系整合。Android 用戶：XM6 的音質和 ANC 值得這個溢價。你用什麼系統決定這個選擇，而不是其他因素。

highlights.title: Samsung Buds 4 Pro 是深度 Samsung 生態系用戶的答案
highlights.body: Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 直接整合 Samsung Health 的聽力測試、Samsung 空間音效、以及 Galaxy AI 即時翻譯功能。對手機、手錶、平板都是 Samsung 的用戶，Buds 4 Pro 的生態系連貫性帶來跨平台比較無法量化的價值。

references.title: The best earbuds 2026: top buys for every budget
Sony WF-C710N added as best mid-price wireless earbuds
Sony WF-1000XM6 vs Apple AirPods Pro 3: which premium wireless earbuds are better
The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts

en.commentary:
The Sony WF-1000XM6 launched in early 2026 and immediately challenged the AirPods Pro 2 for the top spot. The XM6's HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3e — three times faster than the previous generation — paired with eight microphones per side delivers ANC that is objectively stronger than anything else in the category. On pure noise cancellation and audio fidelity, Sony wins. I still keep AirPods Pro 2 at number one because the overall package — Transparency mode, hearing aid functionality, heart rate tracking, Live Translation, and seamless Apple ecosystem integration — is a broader set of genuinely useful features that the XM6 cannot match.

The gap between first and second is narrow in a way it hasn't been before. What Hi-Fi refreshed their guide this week and noted the Sony WF-C710N replacing the WF-C700N as the best mid-price choice, which reflects how fast even the mid-tier is moving. TechRadar similarly updated picks with the Huawei FreeBuds Pro 5 stepping into the best mid-range slot. The net signal: 2026 is compressing the quality gap between tiers faster than previous years.

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 holds third because its combination of ANC and comfort — specifically the stability of the fit during movement — remains unmatched by any Android-first competitor. Jabra Elite 10's Dolby Atmos spatial audio and ActiveFit design earns it a tie with Samsung Buds3 Pro at spots 6 and 7. For the budget tier, Nothing Ear 2 and Anker Liberty 4 NC deliver strong value-per-dollar ratios that make them defensible for listeners not willing to spend flagship money.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 has the best ANC on the market in 2026
highlights.body: The QN3e processor operating eight microphones per ear in real time produces ANC performance that is measurably ahead of the WF-1000XM5, and reviewers consistently rate it above the Bose QCE2 and AirPods Pro 2 on raw noise reduction. Released in February 2026, the XM6 adds LDAC for Hi-Res Audio and delivers up to 12 hours per charge with 24 hours total through the case. If noise cancellation is your single deciding criterion, this is the correct choice.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 holds the top spot through ecosystem depth, not a single feature
highlights.body: Heart rate tracking, clinical-grade hearing aid certification, 90% average noise reduction, real-time Live Translation, and Adaptive Audio that shifts between Transparency and ANC as your environment changes — no other earbuds combine this many genuinely useful features. The Apple ecosystem integration is seamless in a way that remains unmatched: instant switching between iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch without any configuration. For users outside the Apple ecosystem, the XM6 is the rational pick. Inside it, AirPods Pro 2 is the right answer.

highlights.title: The mid-tier is moving fast in April 2026
highlights.body: TechRadar updated their guide this week and Huawei FreeBuds Pro 5 replaced the Cambridge Audio Melomania A100 as the best mid-range option. What Hi-Fi similarly refreshed their picks with the Sony WF-C710N replacing the WF-C700N as best mid-price. The compression of audio quality between $100 and $200 earbuds is real: 2026 models in this tier are delivering ANC and sound quality that would have been flagship-tier two years ago.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 remains the comfort benchmark
highlights.body: Bose's three-point wing tip system and proprietary multi-point stability framework means the QCE2 stays in place during runs, gym sessions, and commutes in ways that in-ear tips alone cannot achieve. The ANC is excellent and the sound signature is tuned for bass extension and midrange presence that makes it a strong choice for audiobooks and podcasts as well as music. At $299, the price is premium but the comfort engineering justifies it for people who wear earbuds for multiple hours daily.

highlights.title: Nothing Ear 2 is the best sub-$150 option on this list
highlights.body: Nothing's transparent design is genuinely distinctive and the sound tuning is warm and engaging without being bass-heavy. The ANC reaches 45dB of attenuation — competitive with earbuds that cost twice the price — and battery life is 36 hours total through the case. For Android users who don't want to pay flagship prices, the Ear 2 at around $149 is the clearest value recommendation on this list.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WF-1000XM6 在 2026 年初發布後，立刻挑戰 AirPods Pro 2 的第一名地位。XM6 搭載的 QN3e 降噪處理器，每側各有八個麥克風，降噪效果在客觀測試中持續超越 ANC 市場所有競品。如果你的唯一標準是降噪能力，XM6 就是正確答案。

我把 AirPods Pro 2 留在第一，是因為整體功能組合，包含心率追蹤、臨床聽力輔助認證、即時翻譯、自適應音訊在 ANC 與通透模式之間的無縫切換，加上 Apple 生態系整合的完整度，這些加在一起是 XM6 無法複製的。對 Android 用戶來說，XM6 是更合理的選擇。

What Hi-Fi 本週更新了他們的指南，Sony WF-C710N 取代 WF-C700N 成為最佳中階選擇，TechRadar 也把華為 FreeBuds Pro 5 列入中階最佳選項。這個訊號很清楚：2026 年中階耳機的品質提升速度比過去幾年都快，一兩千元的差距帶來的功能落差正在縮小。

Bose QCE2 排第三，靠的是所有競品都複製不了的配戴穩定性，以及長時間使用的舒適度。Nothing Ear 2 在一萬元以下提供 45dB 降噪和 36 小時總電量，台灣售價合理，是 Android 用戶的最佳預算選擇。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 是 2026 年降噪能力最強的耳機
highlights.body: QN3e 處理器即時運算每側八個麥克風的訊號，降噪效果在獨立測試中都超越 WF-1000XM5，也勝過 Bose QCE2 和 AirPods Pro 2 在原始降噪量上的表現。2026 年 2 月上市，支援 LDAC Hi-Res Audio，單次充電 12 小時，含充電盒共 24 小時。降噪是你最在乎的事，XM6 是這份名單的正確答案。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 的第一名建立在功能廣度上
highlights.body: 心率追蹤、臨床聽力輔助認證、90% 平均降噪率、即時翻譯、自適應音訊，還有在 iPhone、iPad、Mac、Apple Watch 之間不需要設定就能切換的無縫整合，沒有其他耳機能把這麼多有實際用途的功能放在同一個產品裡。在 Apple 生態系裡，AirPods Pro 2 是最值得投資的選擇。

highlights.title: 中階市場在 2026 年 4 月升級速度很快
highlights.body: TechRadar 本週更新指南，華為 FreeBuds Pro 5 取代 Cambridge Audio Melomania A100 成為最佳中階選項。What Hi-Fi 也把 Sony WF-C710N 列為最佳中價位選擇，取代舊款 WF-C700N。2026 年一萬元以下的耳機帶來的降噪和音質，兩年前要花旗艦價格才能買到。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 的配戴穩定性是這份名單的天花板
highlights.body: Bose 的三點翼片設計讓 QCE2 在跑步、健身、通勤全程都不會位移。降噪優秀，聲音調性偏暖，低頻和人聲都飽滿，聽有聲書和 Podcast 的體驗特別好。配戴超過兩小時不會不舒服的人，台幣九千左右的售價對應這個舒適度是合理的投資。

highlights.title: Nothing Ear 2 是一萬元以下 Android 用戶的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 45dB 降噪效果在這個價位幾乎找不到對手，透明外殼設計辨識度高，聲音調性偏暖不轟低音，36 小時含盒總電量夠用。Android 用戶不想花旗艦價格，Nothing Ear 2 是這份名單裡 CP 值最清楚的選項。

references.title: Best wireless earbuds 2026: top pairs tested by our review team
The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts

en.commentary: The AirPods Pro 2 holds the top spot, and I'm not budging on that. Apple's combination of best-in-class adaptive transparency, H2 chip processing, and seamless iPhone integration delivers a complete package no Android earbud has matched on totality. Sony's WF-1000XM6 sits at rank 2 for good reason: eight mics per earbud and the QN3e processor make it the most technically capable ANC earbud on the market today, and if you're not in Apple's ecosystem, it's the pick. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 at rank 3 still earns its place for the best noise cancellation depth I've tested in a true wireless form factor. Samsung's Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at rank 4 offers 24-bit/96kHz audio support, which is a genuine differentiator for audiophile Android users. Below rank 5, the market has matured: every option from Sony WF-1000XM5 down to EarFun Air Pro 4 delivers genuinely good ANC and sound quality. The differentiation now lives in fit, ecosystem features, and price. Open-ear designs are growing — Shokz and Sony both have entries — but they're a different use case, not a replacement for sealed ANC earbuds.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Remains Untouchable for iPhone Users
highlights.body: The adaptive transparency mode alone justifies rank 1. The ability to instantly tune environmental audio up or down with a hardware swipe, while the H2 chip handles ANC and spatial audio simultaneously, is a system-level advantage that no third-party earbud can replicate. Apple's vertical integration wins here.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Is the Best Android Earbud
highlights.body: Eight mics per earbud and the QN3e chip — three times faster than the previous generation — give Sony a technical lead in noise cancellation processing. Combined with LDAC support and 30-hour total battery life, this is the recommendation for anyone on Android looking for best-in-class.

highlights.title: Budget Tier Is Genuinely Competitive Below $100
highlights.body: The Anker Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro delivers ANC that measurably reduces background noise, warm and engaging sound, and 10-hour battery life per charge. At under $100, the performance-to-price ratio here is remarkable, and it deserves consideration from anyone not committed to a premium tier brand.

zh-tw.commentary:
AirPods Pro 2 繼續坐穩第一名，這個判斷我沒有猶豫。自適應穿透模式結合 H2 晶片的即時處理能力，是整個 iPhone 生態系才能給你的體驗，Android 陣營沒有任何選項能複製這套垂直整合。Sony WF-1000XM6 排第二名同樣合理：每耳八個麥克風加上 QN3e 處理器（比上代快三倍），是目前技術規格最強的 ANC 真無線耳機，非 Apple 生態系的用戶直接選它就對了。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 排第三，它的降噪深度在我測試過的真無線耳機裡還是數一數二，這個位置穩。

Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 的 24-bit/96kHz 超高解析音訊支援是個真實亮點，喜歡 Android 生態又在意音質的用戶值得認真考慮。往下的排名市場已經很成熟，每一款都有像樣的 ANC 和音質，差別在配戴感、生態系整合和價格，依需求選就好。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 的優勢是生態系整合，不是單一功能
highlights.body: 自適應穿透可以讓你在捷運和辦公室之間瞬間切換聆聽情境，硬體滑動搭配 H2 晶片即時運算，整個系統感覺像是替你思考的。這種體驗目前只有 iPhone 用戶能完整享受，其他品牌學不來。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 是 Android 用戶的最強選擇
highlights.body: 八個麥克風、最新 QN3e 晶片、LDAC 高解析傳輸，加上每耳 12 小時續航，技術規格幾乎找不到對手。台灣售價約 NT$7,990，拿這個價格買到這樣的規格，我覺得合理。

highlights.title: 百元內的 Anker Liberty 5 Pro 性價比驚人
highlights.body: Anker Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro 在三千元以內就能給你真實有效的 ANC、音質溫暖好聽、單耳續航 10 小時。這個價位能做到這樣，讓很多中端產品都顯得尷尬。

references.title: Best Wireless Earbuds 2026: ANC and Sound Quality Tested
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026: Lab-tested by Experts
Sony WF-C710N added as best mid-price wireless earbuds April 2026

en.commentary:
The wireless earbuds market in April 2026 has a clear top tier and a competitive mid-range. AirPods Pro 2 continues to hold the top position through its combination of active noise cancellation measured at 90% effectiveness, Personalized Spatial Audio that adapts to individual ear geometry, and the seamless H2 chip integration that makes switching between iPhone, iPad, and Mac invisible to the user. For Apple ecosystem users, nothing in this list matches the integration depth.

Sony WF-1000XM6 at rank 2 is the strongest single-brand recommendation outside Apple's ecosystem. The MDAQS (Multimodal Dimensional Audio Quality Scale) sound quality score of 4.8/5 is the highest measured in this list, and the 88% average noise reduction places it second only to the AirPods Pro 2 on ANC performance. The 24-hour total battery life with the case matches or exceeds everything in the premium tier.

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 at rank 3 win on one metric that neither Sony nor Apple match: comfort during extended wear. The CustomTune personal calibration adjusts EQ and ANC simultaneously to each user's ear canal, and the soft silicone ear tips create a seal that does not require the pressure fit that many competing tips demand.

Nothing Ear 2 at rank 9 is the mid-range recommendation I keep returning to. At around $149, its LHDC 5.0 codec support for high-res audio, dual dynamic drivers, and 36-hour total battery with case make it punch significantly above the budget tier. The transparent design remains a conversation piece, but the audio quality is the actual differentiator.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 remains the ANC and integration benchmark for iPhone users
highlights.body: Apple's H2 chip processes spatial audio and active noise cancellation simultaneously with lower latency than any competing TWS earbud. The 90% ANC effectiveness measured by What Hi-Fi is the highest in this roundup. Personalized Spatial Audio with head tracking uses the TrueDepth camera to map your ear geometry and calibrate the spatial audio profile to your specific anatomy — no other earbud manufacturer offers anatomical personalization of this depth. For iPhone, iPad, and Mac users who want audio that responds correctly to head movement in spatial content, AirPods Pro 2 remains the reference.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6's sound quality score is the highest measured in this comparison
highlights.body: The MDAQS score of 4.8/5 represents the combined assessment of naturalness, richness, and absence of distortion across the frequency range. Sony's 8.4mm integrated processor driver delivers audio tuning that was previously achievable only in over-ear headphones. The 88% average noise reduction places the XM6 second only to AirPods Pro 2, and the 24-hour case battery with 8-hour earbud runtime is competitive with everything in the premium tier. For non-Apple users, the WF-1000XM6 is the clearest recommendation in this list.

highlights.title: Nothing Ear 2 is the best wireless earbud under $150 for audio quality
highlights.body: At approximately $149, Nothing Ear 2 supports LHDC 5.0 codec, which delivers 24-bit/96kHz audio over Bluetooth to compatible sources — a feature normally found on earbuds costing twice as much. The dual dynamic driver configuration produces a soundstage that single-driver budget earbuds cannot match. The 36-hour total battery with case exceeds premium options like AirPods Pro 2. ANC quality is adequate for office use but not competitive with the top three. For listeners who prioritize audio quality over ANC depth and have a budget under $150, Nothing Ear 2 is the right choice.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年 4 月的無線耳機市場，頂端有清楚的梯隊，中階則相當競爭。AirPods Pro 2 繼續排第一，靠的是 90% 有效率的主動降噪、根據個人耳道幾何校準的個人化空間音訊、以及 H2 晶片讓 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 之間的切換無縫進行。對 Apple 生態系用戶，這份清單裡沒有其他耳機能比得上這個整合深度。

Sony WF-1000XM6 排第二，是 Apple 生態系之外最強烈的推薦。MDAQS 音質評分 4.8/5 是這份清單裡實測最高的，88% 平均降噪率在 ANC 性能上僅次於 AirPods Pro 2。搭配充電盒的 24 小時總電量和高端競品相當或更好。

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 排第三，在一個 Sony 和 Apple 都比不上的指標上勝出：長時間配戴舒適度。CustomTune 個人校準同時調整 EQ 和 ANC 以適應每個用戶的耳道，軟矽膠耳塞創造的密封不需要很多競品耳塞那種需要壓入感的配合方式。

Nothing Ear 2 排第九，是我一再回頭推薦的中階選擇。大約 149 美元，支援 LHDC 5.0 高解析度音訊編解碼器、雙動圈驅動單元、搭配充電盒 36 小時總電量，在這個價位帶裡表現遠超預期。透明外觀設計是話題，但音質才是真正的差異化因素。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 依然是 iPhone 用戶 ANC 和整合深度的基準
highlights.body: Apple H2 晶片以比任何競爭 TWS 耳機更低的延遲同時處理空間音訊和主動降噪。What Hi-Fi 測量的 90% ANC 有效率是這份清單裡最高的。個人化空間音訊使用原深感攝影機繪製你的耳廓幾何，將空間音訊配置校準到你的特定解剖構造，沒有其他耳機製造商提供這個深度的解剖個人化。對於在空間內容中需要音訊正確響應頭部移動的 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 用戶，AirPods Pro 2 依然是基準。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 的音質評分是這次比較中實測最高的
highlights.body: MDAQS 評分 4.8/5 代表全頻率範圍內自然度、豐富度和無失真度的綜合評估。Sony 8.4mm 整合處理器驅動單元提供了以前只有耳罩式耳機才能達到的調音品質。88% 的平均降噪率讓 XM6 在 ANC 表現上僅次於 AirPods Pro 2，24 小時充電盒電量配合 8 小時耳機使用時間在高端競品中相當競爭。對 Apple 生態系之外的用戶，WF-1000XM6 是這份清單裡最清楚的推薦。

highlights.title: Nothing Ear 2 是 150 美元以下音質最好的無線耳機
highlights.body: 大約 149 美元，Nothing Ear 2 支援 LHDC 5.0 編解碼器，可以透過藍牙傳輸 24-bit/96kHz 的音訊到相容音源，這是通常在兩倍售價的耳機上才有的功能。雙動圈配置產生的音場是單動圈平價耳機無法比擬的。搭配充電盒 36 小時的總電量超過 AirPods Pro 2 等高端選項。ANC 品質對辦公室使用夠用，但和前三名競爭不上。對優先考慮音質而不是 ANC 深度、預算在 150 美元以下的聽眾，Nothing Ear 2 是正確的選擇。

references.title: The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts
Sony WF-1000XM6 — 88% average noise reduction, 9h41m battery tested
The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026 — RTINGS.com
Galaxy Buds 4 Pro added as best earbuds for Samsung users, March 2026

en.commentary:
The wireless earbud rankings in April 2026 reflect a market that has genuinely converged at the top tier. SoundGuys' lab testing shows the Sony WF-1000XM6 achieving 88% average noise reduction across all tested frequencies — the highest measured ANC performance among wireless earbuds — combined with a 4.8/5 MDAQS sound quality score and 9 hours and 41 minutes of measured battery life. These are not just good numbers; they represent meaningful advantages that the testing methodology is designed to capture.

The AirPods Pro 2 holds first position ahead of the XM6 based on the overall integration advantage that Apple's platform provides to iPhone users. The H2 chip, Adaptive Audio, Conversation Awareness, and the deep iOS integration create a listening experience that goes beyond what the hardware specs alone convey. For iPhone users, the AirPods Pro 2 remains the default recommendation because the platform integration multiplies the value of the hardware in ways that competing earbuds at equivalent hardware specs don't replicate.

Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at fourth continues to strengthen its position as the best wireless earbuds for Galaxy phone users. The March 2026 editorial confirmation from major reviewers adding it explicitly as the Samsung ecosystem recommendation validates the ranking. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 at third delivers Bose's characteristic comfort advantage and the most natural-sounding ANC implementation in the category — Bose's approach to transparency mode, in particular, is more convincing than Sony's at equivalent price points.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 leads because platform integration multiplies hardware value for iPhone users
highlights.body: The AirPods Pro 2's measured 90% ANC performance and H2 chip efficiency are excellent specifications. But the decisive advantage is the iOS ecosystem integration: Adaptive Audio that seamlessly transitions between full ANC and transparency based on your environment, Conversation Awareness that lowers volume and activates transparency when you start speaking, and Apple's spatial audio implementation with head tracking. These features require Apple hardware to function and create a combined listening experience that non-Apple earbuds at equivalent hardware specs don't replicate.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6's 88% ANC and 4.8/5 sound score make it the strongest cross-platform choice
highlights.body: SoundGuys' lab measurement of 88% average noise reduction across all tested frequencies is the highest ANC performance measured among wireless earbuds as of April 2026. The 4.8/5 MDAQS sound quality score reflects a neutral, detailed sound signature that performs well across music genres, podcasts, and calls without the boosted-bass consumer tuning that less capable earbuds apply. For Android users, Windows users, or anyone outside the Apple ecosystem, the WF-1000XM6 is the most complete high-performance wireless earbud available.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro is the right choice for Galaxy phone users — confirmed by March 2026 editorial consensus
highlights.body: The Galaxy Buds 4 Pro's integration with Samsung Health, Galaxy AI, and the unified device ecosystem creates health and audio features that work better with Galaxy phones than with any competing platform. March 2026 reviews confirmed it explicitly as the Samsung ecosystem recommendation. Galaxy Ring owners, in particular, benefit from the combined health data that Samsung processes across ring and earbud sensors simultaneously, creating a more complete picture of health metrics than either device provides alone.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年 4 月的真無線耳機排行榜反映了一個頂端已經真正收斂的市場。SoundGuys 的實驗室測試顯示 Sony WF-1000XM6 在所有測試頻率下平均降噪率達到 88%，是無線耳機中測量到最高的降噪性能，加上 4.8/5 的 MDAQS 音質評分和 9 小時 41 分鐘的電池實測，這些不只是好看的數字，代表的是測試方法設計來量測的真實優勢。

AirPods Pro 2 在 XM6 前面排第一，靠的是 Apple 平台為 iPhone 用戶提供的整體整合優勢。H2 晶片、自適應音頻、對話感知和深度 iOS 整合創造的聆聽體驗，超越硬體規格本身所能傳達的範圍。對 iPhone 用戶，AirPods Pro 2 仍然是預設推薦，因為平台整合以競品在相同硬體規格下複製不了的方式倍增了硬體的價值。

Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 排第四繼續鞏固作為 Galaxy 手機用戶最佳選擇的地位，三月份各大評測媒體明確把它加入 Samsung 生態系推薦行列的確認驗證了排名。Bose QCE 2 排第三提供 Bose 特有的舒適度優勢和這個類別裡最自然的降噪實現，特別是透傳模式比 Sony 在同等售價下更有說服力。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 排第一，因為平台整合讓硬體價值對 iPhone 用戶成倍增加
highlights.body: AirPods Pro 2 測量到 90% 的降噪效果和 H2 晶片效能是很出色的規格。但決定性優勢是 iOS 生態系整合：根據環境無縫切換完整降噪和透傳的自適應音頻、開始說話時自動降低音量並開啟透傳的對話感知，和帶頭部追蹤的空間音頻實現。這些功能需要 Apple 硬體才能運作，組合起來的聆聽體驗是相同硬體規格的非 Apple 耳機複製不了的。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 的 88% 降噪和 4.8/5 音質評分讓它成為最強的跨平台選擇
highlights.body: SoundGuys 實驗室量測的 88% 平均降噪率是截至 2026 年 4 月無線耳機中測量到的最高降噪性能。4.8/5 的 MDAQS 音質評分反映中性詳細的音調特徵，在各種音樂類型、Podcast 和通話中表現一致，沒有能力較低的耳機常用的增強低音消費者向調校。對 Android 用戶、Windows 用戶或任何在 Apple 生態系之外的人，WF-1000XM6 是目前最完整的高性能真無線耳機。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 是 Galaxy 手機用戶的正確選擇，2026 年 3 月評測界達成共識
highlights.body: Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 與 Samsung Health、Galaxy AI 和統一裝置生態系的整合，讓健康和音頻功能在搭配 Galaxy 手機時比任何競品平台更好用。三月的評測明確把它加入 Samsung 生態系推薦行列。Galaxy Ring 用戶尤其受益，三星同時處理來自戒指和耳機感測器的健康數據，建立比任何單一裝置獨立提供更完整的健康指標畫面。

references.title: The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026: 8 Ranked by Sound, ANC & Battery
Best Sony earbuds 2026

en.commentary: The AirPods Pro 2 continues to lead the wireless earbuds ranking in April 2026. Its 9.2 ANC score reflects Apple's class-leading noise cancellation implementation, and the deep integration with iPhone's Personalized Spatial Audio and Transparency mode sets a standard that non-Apple earbuds cannot replicate within the Apple ecosystem. The Sony WF-1000XM6, released in February 2026, earns its second-place position with an 88% average noise reduction score across all frequencies and a dramatically improved microphone system using AI-powered beamforming trained on 500 million voice samples. For Android users or iPhone users who want maximum ANC regardless of ecosystem, the Sony is the better technical choice. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 holds third position with the most comfortable fit in the category, scoring 9.5 on comfort. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro rounds out the premium Android tier with 24-bit/96kHz ultra-high-resolution audio support.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Leads With Apple Ecosystem Integration No Competitor Can Match
highlights.body: Personalized Spatial Audio, seamless switching between iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch, and Transparency mode that feels like high-fidelity sound passthrough are capabilities tied to Apple's H2 chip implementation. The 9.2 ANC and 9.0 sound quality scores reflect standalone earbuds performance, but the full value is only realized within the Apple ecosystem where every feature activates automatically.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Has the Best ANC Technology Outside Apple's Ecosystem
highlights.body: 88% average noise reduction across all frequencies with the improved QN3 chip makes the WF-1000XM6 the technical leader on noise cancellation metrics. The AI beamforming microphone system trained on 500 million samples delivers call clarity that the previous XM5 couldn't match. For Android users, this is the definitive flagship purchase.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 Has the Best Fit in the Category
highlights.body: The 9.5 comfort score on the Bose QCE2 reflects a genuinely different fit approach from Sony and Apple. The stability band design keeps the earbuds secure during movement without the pressure points that in-ear only designs create over extended sessions. For long work calls, flights, or daily commutes where earbuds stay in for hours, comfort becomes the deciding factor.
