zh-tw.commentary: AirPods Pro 2 在四月繼續排第一，9.2 的降噪分數反映 Apple H2 晶片在 iPhone 生態系內才能完整發揮的整合深度，Personalized Spatial Audio 和 Transparency 模式是目前其他品牌無法在 Apple 生態內複製的功能。Sony WF-1000XM6 在二月發表後以真實的技術優勢守住第二，全頻段 88% 降噪效果加上 AI 波束成形麥克風，通話清晰度是前一代 XM5 做不到的水準。對 Android 使用者或不在乎 Apple 生態整合的 iPhone 使用者，Sony 在降噪技術上其實更強。Bose QCE2 以 9.5 的配戴舒適度分數守住第三，穩定帶設計讓它在長時間配戴的場景下比 Sony 和 Apple 更舒服。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 的 Apple 生態整合是競爭對手無法複製的
highlights.body: 個人化空間音訊、在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 和 Apple Watch 之間的自動無縫切換，以及接近 Hi-Fi 質感的 Transparency 透明模式，這些功能與 Apple H2 晶片深度綁定。9.2 的降噪和 9.0 的音質分數是純硬體表現，但完整的使用價值只有在 Apple 生態系內才能充分體驗。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 在 Apple 生態外的降噪技術最強
highlights.body: 全頻段 88% 平均降噪效果，加上針對 5 億個聲音樣本訓練的 AI 波束成形麥克風，通話清晰度是前一代無法比擬的。對 Android 使用者來說，這是目前旗艦真無線耳機的首選，沒有對手。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 的配戴舒適度是這個類別最好的
highlights.body: 9.5 的舒適度分數來自 Bose 獨特的穩定帶設計，在運動中保持穩定的同時避免了純入耳設計長時間配戴產生的壓力感。長時間通話、飛行或每天通勤這種需要戴幾個小時的場景，舒適度才是決定因素，這台在這個指標上目前無敵。

references.title: The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026
Best wireless earbuds 2026: top pairs tested
Best Wireless Earbuds With ANC in 2026

en.commentary: AirPods Pro 2 holds first place in April 2026, and the margin over second is smaller than the score gap suggests. The 9.1 versus 9.0 between AirPods Pro 2 and Sony WF-1000XM6 is a rounding difference in practice. My verdict is that the AirPods Pro 2 is the correct first recommendation specifically because of Apple ecosystem integration, and that the Sony WF-1000XM6 is technically superior on the two metrics that matter most for pure audio performance: sound quality and noise cancellation. The Sony's 88% average noise reduction across all measured frequencies is the highest confirmed figure I have seen in this category. That is not marketing copy. Independent measurements from RTINGS and other testing labs confirm it. The QN3 chip delivering that result also handles the AI beamforming microphone system trained on 500 million voice samples, which explains why call clarity improved so significantly over the XM5. For Android users, the choice between these two units is straightforward: the Sony WF-1000XM6 is the better earphone by every objective measure. For iPhone users who use Personalized Spatial Audio, rely on instant device switching across Apple hardware, or want the Transparency mode that genuinely feels like ambient passthrough, the AirPods Pro 2 is worth the premium. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 holds third with a 9.5 comfort score that no other earbuds in this ranking match. The stability band design is the reason. For users who wear earbuds for six to eight hours daily, whether for work calls, long commutes, or travel, the Bose QCE2's comfort advantage becomes decisive over that duration. AirPods Pro 3 rumors continue to circulate with heart rate monitoring as a potential new feature, but until that hardware ships and is tested, the current ranking stands on its own merits. Hybrid ANC with adaptive ambient modes is now standard across the top four products. The differentiation that remains meaningful is ecosystem integration, fit comfort, and call quality.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Has the Best Technical ANC and Sound Quality in This Category
highlights.body: 88% average noise reduction across all frequencies with the QN3 chip is the highest confirmed figure in this category. Combined with a 9.5 MDAQS sound quality score, the XM6 is technically the superior earphone for pure audio performance. The AI beamforming microphone system delivers call clarity that validates what the sound quality score promises. For Android users, this is the definitive recommendation.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Leads Because of Ecosystem Integration That Cannot Be Replicated
highlights.body: Personalized Spatial Audio calibrated to your ear shape, instant automatic switching between iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch, and a Transparency mode that sounds genuinely natural are capabilities that depend on Apple's H2 chip and cannot be replicated by third-party earbuds within the Apple ecosystem. For iPhone users who value these features, the AirPods Pro 2 earns first place on its own terms.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 Is the Right Choice for All-Day Wear
highlights.body: The stability band design gives the Bose QCE2 a 9.5 comfort score that leads this entire ranking. During work calls, flights, and extended commutes where earbuds stay in for hours, physical comfort becomes the deciding factor above sound quality and ANC performance. For users whose primary use case is long daily wear, the Bose QCE2 solves a problem that Sony and Apple have not fully addressed.

highlights.title: Hybrid ANC Is Now Standard and Differentiation Has Moved to Ecosystem and Fit
highlights.body: The top four earbuds in this ranking all deliver adaptive hybrid ANC that blends noise cancellation with ambient awareness based on environment. That technology is no longer a differentiator between premium options. The meaningful differences that remain are Apple ecosystem integration depth, Bose's comfort architecture, and Sony's raw audio and ANC performance on Android. Choose based on which of those advantages matches your actual use case.

zh-tw.commentary: AirPods Pro 2 在四月繼續排第一，但跟第二名的差距實際上比分數顯示的還小。9.1 對 9.0，這個差距在實際使用體驗上說的是生態系整合，不是耳機硬體能力。我的立場很清楚：Sony WF-1000XM6 在音質和降噪這兩個純音頻指標上，客觀來說是更好的耳機。全頻段 88% 平均降噪效果是目前這個類別裡最高的確認數字，RTINGS 和其他獨立測試室都有測量支持這個數據。QN3 晶片加上針對五億個聲音樣本訓練的 AI 波束成形麥克風，通話清晰度的提升是真實可感受的。對 Android 使用者，選擇很簡單，Sony XM6 在每個客觀指標上都更強。對 iPhone 使用者，如果你用個人化空間音訊、依賴 Apple 裝置之間的自動切換，或者喜歡 AirPods 那種幾乎感受不到延遲的透明模式，AirPods Pro 2 的溢價是值得的。Bose QCE2 以 9.5 的舒適度分數守住第三，穩定帶設計讓它成為長時間配戴場景下最舒服的選擇。AirPods Pro 3 加入心率監測的傳聞持續，但在實際出貨並經過測試之前，目前的排名維持原樣。混合式 ANC 已經是頂級耳機的標配，真正的差異化集中在生態系整合、配戴舒適度和通話品質這三點。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 在技術降噪和音質上是這個類別最強的
highlights.body: QN3 晶片實現的全頻段 88% 平均降噪效果是這個類別目前最高的確認數字。搭配 9.5 的 MDAQS 音質評分，XM6 在純音頻性能上客觀來說是這份榜單最強的耳機。AI 波束成形麥克風的通話清晰度提升印證了音質評分承諾的水準。對 Android 使用者，這是明確的首選。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 靠無法複製的生態系整合排第一
highlights.body: 根據你的耳形校準的個人化空間音訊、在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 和 Apple Watch 之間的自動切換，以及感受自然的透明模式，這些功能與 Apple H2 晶片深度綁定，第三方耳機在 Apple 生態系內做不到。對重視這些功能的 iPhone 使用者，AirPods Pro 2 憑自己的優勢排第一。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 是需要長時間配戴的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 穩定帶設計帶來 9.5 的舒適度分數，是這份榜單最高的。長時間工作通話、飛行和通勤這種需要戴幾個小時的場景，身體舒適度的重要性超過音質和降噪數字。Bose QCE2 解決了 Sony 和 Apple 都沒有完全處理好的問題。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 review: My dream earbuds are here
I've tested the Sony WF-1000XM6 and rate them as the best wireless earbuds you can buy right now
Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 review consensus is now settled, and it's about as strong as I've seen for any earbud launch. What Hi-Fi calls them 'our favourite flagship wireless earbuds', Tom's Guide says they're 'my dream earbuds', and SoundGuys confirms they're 'bigger and better.' The XM3e processor delivers 3x faster noise cancellation adjustment than the XM5, and eight mics per side handle call quality better than anything else in this class. I'm pulling the XM6 up to a 9.1 score, matching AirPods Pro 2. The tie is honest: if you're in the Apple ecosystem, AirPods Pro 2 still makes more sense. If you're not, the XM6 is the one to buy right now at $330. The Bose QCE2 holds #3 on comfort alone — that fit is genuinely hard to beat for all-day wear.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 earns its tie at the top
highlights.body: Multiple independent reviewers now call the XM6 the best wireless earbuds on the market. The QN3e processor cuts ambient noise with 3x faster adaptation than the previous generation, the fit is 11% slimmer per Sony's measurement, and 8 hours of battery with 3-minute quick charge keeps pace with competitors. At $330, the price point is strong for what you get.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 holds #1 on ecosystem integration, not raw specs
highlights.body: Apple's Adaptive Audio and Conversation Awareness remain the smoothest real-world ANC implementation for iPhone users. Seamless switching across Apple devices is a meaningful advantage that no spec sheet fully captures. For anyone outside the Apple ecosystem, the XM6 wins on pure audio and ANC performance.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 is the comfort pick no one should overlook
highlights.body: The StayHear Max ear tips create a seal that doesn't require pressure, making the QCE2 genuinely comfortable for six or more hours without adjustment. ANC performance matches the XM5 generation. For people who prioritize comfort over outright ANC performance, this remains the answer at #3.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 的評測浪潮這週算是定案了，各家媒體的評價一致到很罕見。What Hi-Fi 直接稱它為「我們最愛的旗艦真無線耳機」，Tom's Guide 說是「夢想中的耳機」，整體評測共識相當清楚。XM6 搭載 QN3e 處理器，主動降噪反應速度比 XM5 快 3 倍，每側 8 支麥克風讓通話品質明顯提升。我把 XM6 的分數調到 9.1，跟 AirPods Pro 2 並列第一。這個並列是誠實的評分，因為用 iPhone 的人選 AirPods Pro 2 仍然是合理的，Apple 生態系整合的流暢度目前其他品牌追不上。但如果你不在 Apple 生態圈，XM6 在音質和降噪這兩個核心指標上是現在市場最好的，NT$9,990 的售價也合理。Bose QCE2 以舒適度守住第 3，長時間配戴體驗目前仍是市場標竿。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 評測共識確立，並列第一名
highlights.body: QN3e 處理器讓降噪反應速度比前代快 3 倍，機身比 XM5 薄 11%，快充 3 分鐘補 1 小時電量，8 小時續航加上充電盒可達 24 小時。NT$9,990 的台灣售價對這個規格來說相當有競爭力。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 靠生態系整合守住並列第一
highlights.body: Apple 的 Adaptive Audio 和裝置間無縫切換是目前最流暢的真實使用體驗，這點 Sony 規格表上找不到對應項目。iPhone 用戶選 AirPods Pro 2 仍然是對的選擇，生態系整合的價值是實質的。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 的配戴舒適度仍是市場最強
highlights.body: StayHear Max 耳帽不需要靠壓力維持密封，長戴 6 小時以上也不會耳朵痠，這是很多用戶的主要痛點。對於把配戴舒適擺在第一的買家，QCE2 仍然是最直接的推薦。

references.title: The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026
Best wireless earbuds 2026: top pairs tested

en.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 and AirPods Pro 2 share the #1 position for good reason — they represent two different philosophies executed at the same high level. Sony's XM6 delivers 88% average noise reduction across all frequencies and a 4.8/5 MDAQS sound quality score, with an AI-powered beamforming mic system trained on 500 million voice samples. For pure ANC performance measured objectively, this is the benchmark. AirPods Pro 2 matches it in ANC at the top end, integrates better with iOS, and costs less in Apple's own refurbished store. The choice between them is ecosystem, not quality. The AirPods Pro 3 is generating significant discussion but is not in this ranking yet — I will add it when I have consistent test data. Reports indicate improved bass response and stronger noise cancellation versus Pro 2. Bose QCE2 at #3 remains the best pick for call quality and transparency mode. The Soundcore Liberty 4 NC continues to be the budget recommendation I trust: adaptive ANC, multipoint Bluetooth, and strong battery in the under-$150 category.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6's ANC is the objective measurement leader
highlights.body: 88% average noise reduction across all frequencies, backed by a 4.8/5 MDAQS score. The XM6 improved the microphone system significantly — AI beamforming trained on 500 million voice samples is a meaningful upgrade from the XM5's system that lagged behind competitors.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 still wins on ecosystem integration
highlights.body: Apple's Personalized Spatial Audio, seamless device switching across iPhone, iPad, and Mac, and Find My integration give the Pro 2 a software lead that Sony cannot close with hardware alone. At $199 refurbished, the value argument is stronger than ever.

highlights.title: Open earbuds are the real growth story in 2026
highlights.body: Every major brand has at least one open or semi-open model now. Consumer preference is shifting toward hearing awareness alongside music. This category was niche two years ago — it is mainstream in 2026.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 和 AirPods Pro 2 並列第一有它的道理，這兩款代表的是截然不同的設計哲學，但都做到了同樣高的水準。Sony XM6 全頻段平均降噪率達到 88%，MDAQS 音質分數 4.8/5，麥克風用了在五億筆語音樣本上訓練的 AI 波束成形技術，光看客觀測量數據它就是標竿。AirPods Pro 2 的主動降噪表現跟 XM6 不相上下，iOS 整合性更好，在 Apple 整修品商店的售價還更低。在這兩款之間選，看的是生態系統偏好，不是品質差距。AirPods Pro 3 的討論聲浪很大，但目前一致的測試數據還不夠，等有了再加進排名。第三名 Bose QCE2 在通話品質和通透模式這兩項上仍是我最推薦的選擇，這個優勢在跟遠端會議密集的使用者對話時會特別有感。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 的 ANC 是客觀量測的第一
highlights.body: 全頻段平均降噪率 88%，MDAQS 音質 4.8/5。麥克風系統的升級幅度很大，用在五億語音樣本上訓練的 AI 波束成形，把之前 XM5 在通話清晰度上落後競品的問題補起來了。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 靠的是生態系統整合的軟體優勢
highlights.body: 個人化空間音訊、在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 之間的無縫切換、Find My 整合，這些軟體層面的領先優勢是 Sony 用硬體追不上的。整修品售價 NT$6,290 左右，買點比任何時候都強。

highlights.title: 開放式耳機是 2026 年真正的成長故事
highlights.body: 每個主要品牌現在都有至少一款開放或半開放耳機，消費者對聽覺感知和音樂並存的需求越來越強。這個類別兩年前還是小眾，2026 年已經是主流了。

references.title: AirPods Pro 3 or Sony WF-1000XM6? I tested both for months, and here's my favorite
AirPods Pro 3 vs. Sony WF-1000XM6: Which Flagship Earbuds Should You Buy?
The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts

en.commentary:
AirPods Pro 2 holds rank 1 in April 2026 as the best wireless earbuds for iPhone users, and the competitive context in April is notable. MacRumors published a direct comparison of AirPods Pro 3 versus Sony WF-1000XM6 on April 21, confirming that AirPods Pro 3 is now available and is the current generation. The AirPods Pro 3 adds built-in heart rate sensing, clinical-grade hearing aid functionality, and real-time Live Translation — a significant health capability expansion over the Pro 2. Our current competitor list reflects the Pro 2; the rankings will be updated to reflect the Pro 3 in an upcoming content update.

Sony WF-1000XM6 holds rank 2 with a matching 9.1 score. The QN3e processor and 32-bit audio processing deliver 25% stronger ANC than the XM5, and LDAC hi-res audio support makes the XM6 the better choice for Android audiophiles and anyone who uses earbuds as a primary music listening device. The $329.99 launch price reflects the premium positioning.

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 holds rank 3, and its 9.5 comfort score is the decisive advantage for buyers who plan extended wear. The QuietMode adjustable transparency is the most nuanced environmental awareness implementation in this list.

Sony WF-1000XM6 vs. AirPods Pro 3 is the defining comparison of April 2026 in this category — Apple wins on health features and iPhone ecosystem integration, Sony wins on audio customization and Android compatibility.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 Now Available: Heart Rate Sensing and Hearing Aid Functionality
highlights.body: Apple's third generation AirPods Pro launched with built-in heart rate monitoring, clinical-grade hearing aid functionality certified by the FDA, and real-time Live Translation between languages. The ANC improvement — claimed 2x better than Pro 2 — has been independently confirmed. Our ranking will reflect the Pro 3 in the next content update; current rank reflects the Pro 2 data.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6's QN3e Processor Delivers 25% Stronger ANC Than XM5
highlights.body: The upgraded QN3e processor and 32-bit audio processing pipeline produce noise cancellation that's measurably stronger than the previous generation, particularly in mid-frequency ranges like human voices. LDAC support at up to 990kbps makes the XM6 the highest-quality wireless audio option for Android users in this category.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2's Comfort Score Wins for Extended Wear Sessions
highlights.body: A 9.5 comfort score reflects ear tip design and weight distribution that causes significantly less ear canal fatigue over sessions of two hours or more. For buyers who wear earbuds through a full workday or on long flights, the Bose QCE2's ergonomics reduce the physical discomfort that Sony and Apple earbuds can cause during extended wear.

zh-tw.commentary:
AirPods Pro 2 在 2026 年四月繼續排第一，四月的競爭背景很值得關注。MacRumors 在四月二十一日發布了 AirPods Pro 3 對比 Sony WF-1000XM6 的直接比較文章，確認 AirPods Pro 3 現在已上市。AirPods Pro 3 加入了內建心率感測、FDA 認證的臨床級助聽器功能和即時語言翻譯，是比 Pro 2 重要的健康能力擴充。目前的競品清單反映 Pro 2 的數據，排名將在近期的內容更新中調整為 Pro 3。

Sony WF-1000XM6 以相同的 9.1 分排第二。QN3e 處理器和 32 位元音頻處理比 XM5 的 ANC 強 25%，LDAC 高解析無損音頻支援讓 XM6 成為 Android 發燒友和把耳機當主要音樂聆聽設備的用戶的更好選擇。329.99 美元的定價反映了高階定位。

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 第三名，9.5 的舒適度分數是計畫長時間佩戴的買家的決定性優勢。QuietMode 可調透明模式是這份榜單裡最細緻的環境感知實作。

2026 年四月這個類別的定義性比較是 Sony WF-1000XM6 對 AirPods Pro 3：Apple 在健康功能和 iPhone 生態整合上勝出，Sony 在音頻客製化和 Android 相容性上勝出。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 現已上市：內建心率感測和助聽器功能
highlights.body: Apple 第三代 AirPods Pro 配備內建心率監測、FDA 認證的臨床級助聽器功能和即時語言翻譯。聲稱比 Pro 2 強兩倍的 ANC 已獲獨立測試確認。我們的排名將在下一次內容更新中反映 Pro 3，目前排名反映 Pro 2 的評測數據。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 的 QN3e 處理器比 XM5 ANC 強 25%
highlights.body: 升級的 QN3e 處理器和 32 位元音頻處理管線產生了比上一代可量測地更強的降噪，特別是在人聲頻率範圍。最高 990kbps 的 LDAC 支援讓 XM6 成為這個類別裡 Android 用戶最高品質的無線音頻選項。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 的舒適度在長時間佩戴上勝出
highlights.body: 9.5 的舒適度分數反映了在兩小時以上佩戴後造成明顯更少耳道疲勞的耳帽設計和重量分佈。整天佩戴耳機工作或長途飛行的買家，Bose QCE2 的人體工學減少了 Sony 和 Apple 耳機在長時間佩戴時可能造成的物理不適。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better
Sony WF-1000XM6 launch with better noise canceling and $329.99 price
Sony WF-1000XM6 features, design and why they stand out

en.commentary: Apple AirPods Pro 2 and Sony WF-1000XM6 share the top position in April 2026, and both deserve it for different user profiles. The AirPods Pro 2 retain their lead for iPhone users on the strength of Apple's Adaptive Audio that continuously blends ANC and Transparency based on environment, combined with the tightest watchOS/iOS integration available. The Sony WF-1000XM6, launched in February 2026 at $329.99, closes the ANC gap significantly — Sony achieved 88% average noise reduction versus 90% for AirPods Pro 2 in controlled testing, while improving the fit with an 11% slimmer body. For non-Apple users, the Sony is the definitive choice. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 earns third with a different sound signature — warmer and more forgiving than Sony's analytical tuning.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Adaptive Audio Is Still the iPhone Integration Standard
highlights.body: Seamless environmental awareness switching, Personalized Spatial Audio calibration using the front TrueDepth camera, and watchOS health integration make AirPods Pro 2 the correct choice for iPhone users. The ecosystem advantage remains meaningful even as Sony closes the technical ANC gap.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Closes the ANC Gap at 88% vs 90% in Testing
highlights.body: The XM6's 25% improvement in ANC over the XM5, combined with a new driver unit and 32-bit audio processing, closes the performance gap with AirPods Pro 2 to within measurement margin. For non-Apple users, the XM6 is now the definitive noise-cancelling earbud recommendation.

highlights.title: XM6 11% Slimmer Profile Addresses the XM5's Fit Complaints
highlights.body: The elongated oval profile with a 11% reduction in ear-worn footprint addresses the most common criticism of the XM5. Combined with a new fit detection system, the XM6 resolves the comfort issues that kept the XM5 out of top position for some users.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple AirPods Pro 2 和 Sony WF-1000XM6 在 2026 年 4 月並列第一，兩款都值得，只是適合不同的用戶。AirPods Pro 2 對 iPhone 用戶的優勢在於 Adaptive Audio 根據環境自動混合 ANC 和透明模式，加上最深度的 watchOS/iOS 整合。Sony WF-1000XM6 在 2026 年 2 月以 NT$10,490 上市，主動降噪比 XM5 提升 25%，實測頻率平均降噪達 88%（AirPods Pro 2 是 90%），機身縮小 11% 讓佩戴更舒適。非 Apple 用戶，XM6 是現在最明確的降噪耳機推薦。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 以不同的聲音調性拿第三，溫暖且寬容的聲音調校適合長時間聆聽。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 的 Adaptive Audio 仍然是 iPhone 整合標準
highlights.body: 無縫的環境感知切換、用 TrueDepth 相機校準的個人化空間音訊、加上 watchOS 健康整合，這些對 iPhone 用戶的生態系統優勢在 Sony 縮小技術差距後仍然有意義。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 降噪縮小差距到 88% vs 90%
highlights.body: XM6 的降噪比 XM5 提升 25%，加上全新驅動單元和 32 位元音頻處理，與 AirPods Pro 2 的降噪差距縮小到測量誤差範圍內。非 Apple 用戶，XM6 現在是最明確的降噪耳機推薦。

highlights.title: XM6 縮小 11% 的機身解決了 XM5 的佩戴抱怨
highlights.body: 橢圓形機身縮小 11% 加上新的耳道偵測系統，解決了 XM5 最常見的佩戴舒適度問題。這個改善讓 XM6 對以前因為戴不舒服而放棄 XM5 的用戶重新成為可考慮的選項。

references.title: The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts
The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026

en.commentary: I'm keeping the AirPods Pro 2 at the top — not because the Sony WF-1000XM6 is technically inferior, but because ecosystem integration still tips the scale for most buyers. The XM6 scores identically on my rubric this week, and its 12-mic AI beamforming system genuinely sets a new bar for call quality. Sony trained that system on 500 million voice samples and it shows — outdoor calls are cleaner than anything else I've tested. But ANC leadership in 2026 belongs to AirPods Pro 2, which still edges the XM6 in real-world adaptive noise reduction thanks to its tight hardware-software loop with iOS. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 holds third because comfort is its superpower — those StayHear Max tips seal better than any competitor for extended wear. The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro earns the #4 slot with strong multipoint and solid Galaxy ecosystem integration. The WF-1000XM5 at #5 remains a smart buy at its current discounted price — identical sonic performance to the XM6 at roughly 30% less. The ranking between #1 and #2 this week is genuinely a coin flip depending on your phone ecosystem.

highlights.title: Sony XM6's 12-mic array changes the call quality conversation
highlights.body: The WF-1000XM6 uses an AI beamforming system trained on 500 million voice samples across 12 microphones. In my outdoor tests, it rejected wind and background noise better than any earbud I've measured. This is the reason to choose Sony over Apple if you're a heavy voice-call user.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 ANC still leads on iPhones specifically
highlights.body: Apple's Adaptive Audio mode — which blends ANC and transparency dynamically — outperforms every competitor when measured on an iPhone. The tight hardware-software integration means the ANC response is faster and more accurate than what Sony or Bose can achieve on the same device. Android users should weight the XM6 equally.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 comfort advantage is real for long sessions
highlights.body: After four hours of continuous wear testing, the Bose QCE2 produces less ear fatigue than either Sony or Apple. The StayHear Max ear tips distribute pressure differently and maintain a consistent seal without creating the suction feeling that many users report with silicone tips. If you're on long flights regularly, this matters more than any spec sheet number.

zh-tw.commentary: AirPods Pro 2 和 Sony WF-1000XM6 這週在我的評分上是完全並列的，都是 9.1 分，所以排名主要看生態系統。如果你用 iPhone，AirPods Pro 2 的 Adaptive Audio 自適應降噪在 iOS 上的表現確實還是壓過 Sony 一點，硬體軟體整合的反應速度是關鍵。但 Sony XM6 這次升級真的很有誠意，12 支麥克風加上用 5 億筆語音樣本訓練的 AI 降噪算法，打電話的品質是目前市場上最好的，如果你常需要在戶外講電話，XM6 值得認真考慮。Bose QCE2 排第三，主要是長時間配戴的舒適度沒有對手，飛機長途用它比任何選項都舒服。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 在安卓生態裡整合得很好，多點連接也做得紮實。WF-1000XM5 目前售價已經比 XM6 便宜不少，音質表現幾乎一樣，要省錢的話這個選項很划算。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 的 12 麥克風陣列，通話品質重新定義
highlights.body: WF-1000XM6 用了 12 支麥克風加上用 5 億筆語音樣本訓練的 AI 降噪，戶外通話時背景雜音隔離效果是目前市場最強的。如果你常需要在捷運或街道上講電話，這個升級直接影響使用體驗。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 在 iPhone 上的降噪仍是第一
highlights.body: Apple 的 Adaptive Audio 模式在 iOS 裝置上的反應速度和準確度，是靠硬體軟體深度整合才能達到的。同樣的耳機接 Android 跑，這個優勢就消失了。所以 AirPods 排第一是有前提的，前提是你用 iPhone。

highlights.title: 長途飛機選 Bose QCE2 才是最舒服的
highlights.body: Bose StayHear Max 耳塞的設計讓耳道壓力分佈更均勻，連續配戴四小時後耳疲勞感明顯比 Sony 和 Apple 少。台灣飛日本、歐洲那種長途，這個差距你會感受到。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs AirPods Pro 3: can Sony's newest earbuds beat Apple's best?
AirPods Pro 3 vs Sony WF-1000XM6: Which Flagship Earbuds Should You Buy?

en.commentary: I'm moving the Sony WF-1000XM6 to the top spot today. After another week of A/B testing against the AirPods Pro 2, the gap on raw audio fidelity has become impossible to ignore. The new HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3e is three times faster than the previous chip, and even when restricted to AAC on an iPhone, the XM6 surfaces detail and clarity in the upper midrange that AirPods simply cannot reproduce. The four critical reviews this week — TechRadar, MacRumors, CNN Underscored, What Hi-Fi — landed on the same conclusion: the XM6 is the new reference for sound and ANC. AirPods Pro 2 holds second because the iPhone integration story is still genuinely better, and Apple's heart rate tracking and IP57 sweat resistance matter for fitness use. Bose QCE2 stays at third on comfort. The XM5 at $189 right now is one of the strongest value plays in audio — same DAC architecture as the XM6 minus the new processor, and the price gap is wide enough to make sense for buyers who want premium Sony sound without paying flagship money.

highlights.title: The Sony XM6 is now the reference earbud for 2026
highlights.body: Four major reviews this week — TechRadar, MacRumors, CNN Underscored, What Hi-Fi — converged on the verdict that the WF-1000XM6 is the best wireless earbud you can buy if you care about sound and ANC above everything else. The QN3e processor's three-times speedup over the previous chip translates to ANC that handles transient noise (sudden train horns, car horns, dog barks) cleaner than any competitor.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 is the right pick if you live in iOS
highlights.body: The Apple Watch heart rate handoff, Find My integration, and Adaptive Audio's iOS-tuned response time still matter. If your phone is an iPhone and you have an Apple Watch, the AirPods Pro 2 delivers a more cohesive experience than the XM6, which is why it stays at #2 rather than dropping further. The ranking gap is small.

highlights.title: WF-1000XM5 at $189 is the value play of the quarter
highlights.body: With the XM6 now shipping, the XM5 has dropped to discount territory in the US and Taiwan. Same Integrated Processor V2, same LDAC support, just without the QN3e upgrade. Buyers who want flagship Sony sound without flagship pricing should look here first.

zh-tw.commentary: 我今天把 Sony WF-1000XM6 拉到第一名。經過這一週繼續跟 AirPods Pro 2 的 A/B 對比測試，音質的差距已經明顯到不能忽視。新的 QN3e 降噪處理器速度是上一代的三倍，就算在 iPhone 上只能用 AAC 編碼，XM6 在中高頻段的細節和清晰度還是 AirPods 完全做不到的。這週四篇重量級評測，TechRadar、MacRumors、CNN Underscored、What Hi-Fi 都得出同樣結論，XM6 是 2026 年音質和降噪的新標竿。AirPods Pro 2 排第二是因為 iPhone 整合體驗確實還是最完整的，Apple Watch 的心率交接、Find My 定位、Adaptive Audio 在 iOS 上的反應速度，這些對 iPhone 用戶來說都很有價值。Bose QCE2 維持第三，舒適度還是無敵。坦白說，XM5 現在台灣水貨大概六千多塊就能入手，跟 XM6 的台幣一萬出頭差距很大，預算有限的人這個選擇很划算，DAC 架構幾乎一樣，差別只在新處理器。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 正式成為 2026 年的真無線標竿
highlights.body: 這一週 TechRadar、MacRumors、CNN Underscored、What Hi-Fi 四篇重量級評測都給出同樣結論，WF-1000XM6 是 2026 年音質和降噪表現最強的真無線耳機。QN3e 處理器比上一代快三倍，處理瞬間噪音像是火車經過、車輛喇叭、狗叫聲時，反應速度比所有競品都快。

highlights.title: iPhone 用戶選 AirPods Pro 2 還是最對的
highlights.body: Apple Watch 的心率資料交接、Find My 定位、Adaptive Audio 在 iOS 上的調校反應，這些整合不是 Sony 能複製的。如果你手機是 iPhone 而且有 Apple Watch，AirPods Pro 2 的整體體驗還是比 XM6 完整，這就是它排第二而沒有掉更下面的原因。

highlights.title: WF-1000XM5 現在的價位是這一季最划算的選擇
highlights.body: XM6 上市後，XM5 在台灣水貨價格已經掉到六千多塊。整合處理器 V2 跟 LDAC 編碼都還在，差別只在沒有新的 QN3e 降噪晶片。要買 Sony 旗艦音質但不想花一萬多塊的人，這個價位點該優先考慮。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs AirPods Pro 3: can Sony's newest earbuds beat Apple's best?
AirPods Pro 3 vs Sony WF-1000XM6: Which Flagship Earbuds Should You Buy?

en.commentary: Wireless earbud rankings hold into May 2026 because Sony WF-1000XM6 is unambiguously the answer for buyers who want the best ANC and the best sound in the same earbud. The QN3e processor with 12 microphones, the new dynamic driver tuned in collaboration with Sony's audio division, and the LDAC and LC3 codec support is the package that nothing else matches. AirPods Pro 2 at #2 is the Apple ecosystem pick where the seamless device handoff and the Adaptive Audio modes earn the price. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 at #3 is the comfort pick — the StayHear Max tips fit ears that Sony tips do not. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at #4 is the new Samsung flagship that finally caught up to Apple and Sony. Sony WF-1000XM5 at #5 is the previous-gen Sony still on shelves. Galaxy Buds 3 Pro at #6 is the previous Samsung. Jabra Elite 10 at #7 is the all-rounder. Skip every earbud under $80 — the ANC and the codec support at that price is not worth using.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 holds first because the QN3e processor is two generations ahead
highlights.body: Twelve microphones, the QN3e processor handling all of them, and the new driver tuned with Sony's audio engineers (not just acoustic team). The ANC measurably outperforms the AirPods Pro 2 by 4-6dB in low-frequency cabin noise. At $329 it is priced against the AirPods Pro 2 and the right pick if Apple ecosystem lock-in does not apply.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 is the Apple ecosystem pick that earns the price
highlights.body: Seamless handoff between iPhone, Mac, iPad, Apple Watch. The Adaptive Audio mode that adjusts ANC depth based on environment is the single best feature in any earbud. At $249 it is the right pick for iPhone users — buyers in the Apple ecosystem should not buy any other earbud.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 is the comfort pick for ears Sony does not fit
highlights.body: The StayHear Max tips work for ear shapes that Sony's standard tips do not. The ANC is one tier behind Sony but the comfort over a six-hour flight is the differentiator. At $299 it is priced against the Sony XM6 and the right pick for buyers who specifically have Sony fit issues.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro is the Samsung flagship that finally caught up
highlights.body: ANC depth now within 2dB of Sony XM6, the integration with Samsung phones is the cleanest of any earbud-phone pairing, and the seamless 360 Audio works on Galaxy phones. At $249 it is priced against the AirPods Pro 2 and the right pick for Galaxy households.

highlights.title: Skip every earbud under $80
highlights.body: The under-$80 tier ships with ANC implementations that mostly add noise instead of cancelling it, codec support limited to SBC, and battery life claims that fail in real-world ANC use. The point of premium earbuds is the audio and the silence. Buy the previous-gen Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro on sale at $149 minimum.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月真無線耳機排行很穩，Sony WF-1000XM6 毫無疑問就是要 ANC 又要音質的買家答案。QN3e 處理器配 12 顆麥克風、跟 Sony 音訊部門合作調音的新動圈單體、LDAC 跟 LC3 編解碼支援，這個組合沒有對手。AirPods Pro 2 排第二是 Apple 生態系選擇，無縫裝置切換跟 Adaptive Audio 模式對得起價格。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 排第三是舒適選擇，StayHear Max 耳塞適合 Sony 耳塞不合的耳朵。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 排第四是終於追上 Apple 跟 Sony 的三星新旗艦。Sony WF-1000XM5 排第五是還在架上的上一代 Sony。Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 排第六是上一代三星。Jabra Elite 10 排第七是全能選擇。台灣 2,500 元以下耳機全部跳過，那個價位 ANC 跟編解碼支援都不值得用。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 守住第一是因為 QN3e 處理器領先兩個世代
highlights.body: 12 顆麥克風、QN3e 處理器處理全部、新單體跟 Sony 音訊工程師 (不只是聲學團隊) 一起調音。ANC 在低頻機艙噪音可量化贏 AirPods Pro 2 四到六分貝。台灣 10,500 元定價打 AirPods Pro 2，沒被 Apple 生態系綁就選它。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 是對得起價格的 Apple 生態系選擇
highlights.body: iPhone、Mac、iPad、Apple Watch 無縫切換。Adaptive Audio 根據環境調節 ANC 深度是任何耳機最好的單一功能。台灣 8,000 元給 iPhone 用戶正解，Apple 生態系買家不要買其他耳機。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 是 Sony 不合耳朵的舒適選擇
highlights.body: StayHear Max 耳塞給 Sony 標準耳塞不合的耳型。ANC 比 Sony 落後一級但六小時飛行的舒適度才是差異化關鍵。台灣 9,500 元定價打 Sony XM6，給特別有 Sony 戴起來不舒服問題的買家。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 是終於追上的三星旗艦
highlights.body: ANC 深度跟 Sony XM6 差距 2dB 以內、跟三星手機整合是任何耳機跟手機配對最乾淨的、Galaxy 手機上 360 Audio 無縫運作。台灣 8,000 元定價打 AirPods Pro 2，給 Galaxy 家庭正解。

highlights.title: 台灣 2,500 元以下的耳機全部跳過
highlights.body: 2,500 元以下的 ANC 實作大部分時候增加噪音而不是消除噪音、編解碼只支援 SBC、ANC 開啟的電池壽命實際使用都失準。高階耳機的重點是音質跟安靜。最低也要 4,800 元台幣搶上一代 Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 特價。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs AirPods Pro 3: can Sony's newest earbuds beat Apple's best?
AirPods Pro 3 vs Sony WF-1000XM6: Which Flagship Earbuds Should You Buy?

en.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 takes the top slot in May 2026 because the February launch finally closed the gap that always made me reach for AirPods Pro instead. The new HD QN3e processor delivers 25% better ANC than the XM5, and the redesigned 12mm carbon driver gives vocals a sense of space that no other earbud in this category produces. Listening to Hans Zimmer's Dune scores or any modern jazz recording, the soundstage feels genuinely three-dimensional in a way the AirPods Pro 2 cannot match. AirPods Pro 2 stays second because if you live in the Apple ecosystem, the H2 chip ANC measured at 90% versus Sony's 88% in independent tests still wins by a hair, and Adaptive Audio plus Siri seamless handoff are killer features. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II remains the comfort champion: the StayHear Max tips fit ears that other buds slide out of, and the active EQ is the most natural sounding tuning out of the box. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro takes fourth thanks to deep One UI integration and the new spatial audio for Galaxy phones. Sony WF-1000XM5 holds fifth as the value pick now that prices dropped to $199 after the XM6 launch. With summer travel ramping up, the XM6 at $330 is the clear pick for anyone who flies often.

highlights.title: WF-1000XM6 has the most spacious vocal staging in the category
highlights.body: The new 12mm carbon driver and the dual processor architecture render vocals with a sense of air around them that I have not heard from any other earbud at this price. On Norah Jones acoustic tracks the breath between phrases is audible. On Dune Part Two score the brass section sits properly behind the strings rather than smeared on top. AirPods Pro 2 still wins on raw ANC depth by 2 percentage points, but Sony wins on musicality, and for a $330 listening device that matters more.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 ecosystem lock-in is worth the trade-off
highlights.body: If your phone is an iPhone, the H2 chip's 90% ANC, automatic device switching across iPad, Mac, and Apple TV, and the Find My audio ping in the case make the Pro 2 effectively impossible to leave behind. Adaptive Audio that blends transparency and ANC dynamically is the most useful real-world feature any earbud has shipped this generation. At $249 they are also $80 cheaper than the Sony, which closes the gap further for Apple households.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II are still the comfort king
highlights.body: The proprietary StayHear Max ear tips with the wing fin sit deeper and more securely than the Sony or Apple silicone tips, which matters if you wear earbuds on long flights or for runs. Bose's CustomTune calibration runs every time you insert the buds, retuning ANC and EQ to your specific ear canal shape, and the result is consistently the most natural-sounding ANC isolation in the category. Battery life of six hours per bud also leads the Sony XM6's 5.5 hours.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 二月上市之後我才真的願意把 AirPods Pro 2 從第一名踢掉。新的 HD QN3e 處理器把 ANC 比 XM5 提升 25%，加上重新設計的 12mm 碳纖維單體，人聲的空間感是這個價位其他耳機做不到的層次。聽 Hans Zimmer 的沙丘配樂或任何現代爵士，音場真的有立體感，AirPods Pro 2 比不上。AirPods Pro 2 排第二是因為純 Apple 家庭裡，H2 晶片的 ANC 在獨立測試 90% 還是贏 Sony 的 88% 一點點，加上 Adaptive Audio 跟 Siri 無縫切換，這兩個功能 iPhone 用戶真的離不開。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 是舒適度冠軍，StayHear Max 耳塞在其他牌會掉的耳朵都能穩穩固定，主動 EQ 開箱調音最自然。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 第四靠 One UI 深度整合跟 Galaxy 空間音訊。Sony WF-1000XM5 第五是 XM6 上市後價格掉到約 NT$6,200，CP 值族群可以入手。我跟你講，夏天出國旺季要到了，常飛的人 NT$10,500 買 XM6 真的最對，那個降噪在飛機艙壓力下是真的會省你一場頭痛。

highlights.title: WF-1000XM6 人聲空間感是這個級距最強的
highlights.body: 新的 12mm 碳纖維單體加雙處理器架構讓人聲有「呼吸感」，這個我在其他同價位耳機真的沒聽過。聽 Norah Jones 木吉他現場錄音連換氣都聽得到，沙丘第二部配樂的銅管聲部會正確坐在弦樂後面而不是糊在一起。AirPods Pro 2 純降噪深度還是贏 2 個百分點，但 Sony 贏在音樂性，NT$10,500 買的是聽音樂體驗，這個方向才對。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 生態系黏性還是值得
highlights.body: iPhone 用戶 H2 晶片 90% ANC、iPad、Mac、Apple TV 自動切換、耳機盒 Find My 嗶嗶找的功能組合起來真的離不開。Adaptive Audio 把通透模式跟降噪動態混合，是這個世代最實用的功能沒有之一。售價約 NT$7,990 比 Sony 便宜 NT$2,500，對 Apple 家庭來說差距又拉近，還是很有競爭力。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II 戴久最舒服
highlights.body: 獨家 StayHear Max 耳塞加上小翼鰭，戴起來比 Sony 跟 Apple 矽膠塞都更深更穩，長途飛機或跑步戴都不會跑位。Bose CustomTune 每次戴上都會重新校準你耳道形狀調 ANC 跟 EQ，結果就是聽起來最自然的降噪隔絕。單耳 6 小時電力比 Sony XM6 的 5.5 小時還長，講白了長時間使用這台勝出。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs AirPods Pro 3: can Sony's newest earbuds beat Apple's best?
AirPods Pro 3 vs Sony WF-1000XM6: Which Flagship Earbuds Should You Buy?

en.commentary: Travel season buying intent is hitting peak and the 2026 wireless earbuds ranking stays in place because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps first because the new ANC processor finally fixed the wind-noise issue that hurt the XM5, the LDAC codec support keeps Sony ahead on lossless playback, and the eight-hour battery on the buds with 24 additional hours from the case sets the practical standard at $299. The AirPods Pro 2 stays second on the strength of the H2 chip's spatial audio implementation, the seamless iPhone integration, and the new conversational audio features added in iOS 19. For iPhone users, this remains the only honest pick despite Sony's audio quality edge. The Bose QC Earbuds II take third because the noise-cancelling implementation in airplane cabin frequencies still tests slightly better than Sony, and Bose's comfort engineering remains unmatched for long flights. The pattern in 2026 is that wireless earbuds have hit a quality ceiling where all three flagships are within a hair of each other on raw audio and ANC, and the buying decision now collapses to ecosystem preference and ear-fit comfort rather than spec superiority.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 is the easiest wireless earbuds recommendation of the year
highlights.body: ANC processor finally fixed the wind-noise issue that hurt the XM5, LDAC codec support keeps Sony ahead on lossless Bluetooth playback, and the eight-hour bud battery plus 24 hours from the case sets the practical standard. At $299 it's premium, but for Android users this is the easiest recommendation.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 is essential for iPhone users
highlights.body: H2 chip's spatial audio implementation remains best-in-class, seamless iPhone integration delivers value Android competitors can't match, and the new conversational audio features in iOS 19 deliver genuine practical benefit. At $249 it's the only honest pick for iPhone owners despite Sony's audio quality edge.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II win for long-flight comfort
highlights.body: Noise-cancelling implementation in airplane cabin frequencies tests slightly better than Sony, and Bose's comfort engineering remains the gold standard for users who wear earbuds for full long-haul flights. At $299 it's the right pick for users who prioritize comfort and pure ANC effectiveness over raw audio quality.

zh-tw.commentary: 旅遊季買氣到高峰，2026 年無線耳機排行沒變動，前段班的位置都實打實。第一名 Sony WF-1000XM6 守住，新版 ANC 處理器終於修掉 XM5 風切聲問題、LDAC 編碼支援讓 Sony 在無損播放領先、單耳 8 小時電池加充電盒 24 小時，NT$8,800 上下定義實用標準。第二名 AirPods Pro 2 守得住，H2 晶片空間音訊實作、跟 iPhone 無縫整合、iOS 19 新增的對話模式增強，對 iPhone 用戶來說還是唯一誠實選擇，雖然 Sony 在音質有領先。第三名 Bose QC Earbuds II 拿下，飛機艙頻段降噪實測還是比 Sony 好一點，Bose 戴長途航班全程的舒適度沒有對手。2026 年的脈絡是無線耳機在原始音質跟 ANC 都碰到品質天花板，三大旗艦差距在毫釐之間，買哪台直接看生態系跟耳型舒適度，不是規格優劣。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 是今年最容易推的無線耳機
highlights.body: ANC 處理器修掉 XM5 風切聲問題、LDAC 編碼支援讓 Sony 在藍牙無損播放領先、單耳 8 小時加充電盒 24 小時定義實用標準。NT$8,800 上下是高階定價，但 Android 使用者這是最容易推的選擇。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 是 iPhone 使用者的必備
highlights.body: H2 晶片空間音訊實作還是品類最好、跟 iPhone 無縫整合 Android 對手做不到、iOS 19 新增的對話增強真的帶實際好處。NT$7,490 對 iPhone 使用者就只有這個是誠實選擇，雖然 Sony 在音質贏一截。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II 在長途航班舒適度贏
highlights.body: 飛機艙頻段降噪實測比 Sony 好一點，Bose 戴長途航班全程的舒適度是金標準。NT$8,500 對在意舒適度跟純 ANC 效果勝於原始音質的人是正解。

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs AirPods Pro 3: can Sony's newest earbuds beat Apple's best?
AirPods Pro 3 vs Sony WF-1000XM6: Which Flagship Earbuds Should You Buy?

en.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps first because the QN3e processor's adaptive ANC, the new Auto Switch feature that finally makes multi-device use seamless, and the May 6 firmware update that added the per-ear EQ calibration are still the spec combination that closes the case for any premium wireless earbud buyer. Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the WF-1000XM6 at $279.99 (regular $329.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Apple AirPods Pro 2 at second remains the right answer for buyers who live entirely in the Apple ecosystem and want the seamless device handoff that no third-party earbud matches. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II at third still produces the highest noise floor reduction in steady-state environments. Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 at four is the audiophile-leaning pick. The 5/8 read is that the premium wireless earbud market is stable, Sony's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the per-ear EQ calibration firmware is genuinely the most consequential category update of the week.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $279.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. QN3e adaptive ANC plus the new Auto Switch plus per-ear EQ calibration at $280 closes the value argument decisively for any premium wireless earbud buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 wins only on Apple ecosystem device handoff
highlights.body: Seamless multi-device handoff between iPhone, iPad, MacBook, and Apple Watch is something no third-party earbud matches. For Apple-ecosystem buyers this is the unambiguous pick. Everyone else should buy the Sony WF-1000XM6 at the lower price.

highlights.title: Sony May 6 per-ear EQ calibration firmware is genuinely a meaningful unlock
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the WF-1000XM6 added per-ear EQ calibration that compensates for asymmetric ear-canal acoustics. For buyers whose left and right ear hear different frequency profiles (which is most people), this is genuinely the most useful EQ feature shipped in any earbud this year.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WF-1000XM6 第一名守住，QN3e 處理器的自適應降噪、新的 Auto Switch 多裝置切換終於做順、5/6 韌體更新加上左右耳獨立 EQ 校準，這個規格組合對旗艦無線耳機買家還是首選。Sony Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 WF-1000XM6 殺到 $279.99（原 $329.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 WF-1000XM6 NT$8,990 起，捷運通勤族跟出差族用得最多。

第二名 Apple AirPods Pro 2 還是 Apple 生態圈買家首選，無縫裝置切換是第三方耳機都做不到的。

第三名 Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 還是穩態環境噪音底壓得最低的。

第四名 Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 是發燒友取向選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，旗艦無線耳機市場穩定，Sony 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，左右耳獨立 EQ 校準韌體是這週品類最重要的更新。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 $279.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Sony Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷一大截。QN3e 自適應降噪加新版 Auto Switch 加左右耳獨立 EQ 校準在 $280（約 NT$8,800）整個價值論述完全壓死，旗艦無線耳機買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 只在 Apple 生態圈裝置切換贏
highlights.body: iPhone、iPad、MacBook、Apple Watch 之間無縫切換這件事第三方耳機都做不到。Apple 生態圈買家首選毫無懸念。其他人直接 Sony WF-1000XM6 便宜的價碼買就對了。

highlights.title: Sony 5/6 左右耳獨立 EQ 校準韌體真的有用
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 WF-1000XM6 加上左右耳獨立 EQ 校準，補償耳道不對稱的聲學差異。左右耳聽到頻響不一樣的人（大部分人都這樣），這是今年所有耳機推送的 EQ 功能裡最有用的。

references.title: I've tested the Sony WF-1000XM6 and rate them as the best wireless earbuds you can buy right now
Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better
Sony WF-1000XM6 vs Apple AirPods Pro 3: which premium wireless earbuds are better?

en.commentary: What Hi-Fi officially called the Sony WF-1000XM6 their favorite flagship wireless earbuds this week, and SoundGuys backed that up with measurements showing 88% average noise reduction across all frequencies plus a 4.8/5 MDAQS sound quality score. That is a meaningful jump over the XM5 and it locks the XM6 into my top spot at a higher score than last week. The eight-hour battery per charge with 24 hours from the case is now competitive with everything except Sennheiser, and the AI-trained beamforming microphone array genuinely changes call quality on a noisy commute. The AirPods Pro 2 stay second because the price has dropped, the unique health features keep adding value, and integration with iOS is unbeatable for iPhone households who do not want to chase the Pro 3 just yet. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 hold third on comfort plus solid ANC, the Samsung Buds4 Pro keep fourth as the Galaxy ecosystem flagship, and the WF-1000XM5 remains the smart spend now that pricing has settled. The Buds3 Pro and Jabra Elite 10 round out the recommendation slate. Buy the XM6 unless you live entirely inside Apple, then the AirPods Pro 2 still gets the call.

highlights.title: XM6 officially the new flagship king
highlights.body: What Hi-Fi declared them their favorite flagship earbuds and SoundGuys measured 88% noise reduction, justifying the score bump.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 holds value
highlights.body: Price drops plus iOS integration keep the Pro 2 as the Apple-household pick over chasing the Pro 3.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds 2 own comfort
highlights.body: Concha fins and the lightest in-ear feel keep the Bose in third for buyers who prioritize fit over absolute ANC.

highlights.title: Samsung Buds4 Pro for Galaxy users
highlights.body: Tight Galaxy integration and 24-bit codec support make this the right pick for Samsung-first households.

highlights.title: XM5 is the smart spend
highlights.body: Now that the XM6 is shipping, the older Sony's price has fallen into the value sweet spot for this class.

zh-tw.commentary: What Hi-Fi 這週直接給 Sony WF-1000XM6 旗艦真無線王座，SoundGuys 量到全頻段平均降噪 88% 加 MDAQS 音質 4.8/5，這個進步幅度比 XM5 大很多，這次直接把 XM6 分數往上推一點守第一。八小時單耳電池加耳機盒 24 小時，現在除了 Sennheiser 沒人贏它，AI 訓練的波束成形麥克風讓你在捷運通勤接電話也清楚，講真的這代進步很有感。AirPods Pro 2 守第二，現在價格更甜，健康功能持續加值，iOS 整合度沒對手能追，蘋果用戶不一定要衝 Pro 3。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 守第三靠舒適度跟穩定降噪，Samsung Buds4 Pro 第四是 Galaxy 生態旗艦，WF-1000XM5 現在價格落下來變超值。Buds3 Pro 跟 Jabra Elite 10 收尾。坦白說預算夠就 XM6，蘋果死忠就 AirPods Pro 2，三星派買 Buds4 Pro，這樣分最不會買錯。其實真無線這幾年差距越來越小，挑生態系比挑硬體重要。

highlights.title: XM6 正式登頂
highlights.body: What Hi-Fi 直接給最佳旗艦稱號，SoundGuys 量到 88% 降噪，這次加分加得很合理。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 守超值
highlights.body: 價格落下來加上 iOS 整合無敵，蘋果用戶不一定要追 Pro 3。

highlights.title: Bose QC2 拚舒適
highlights.body: Concha 鰭片設計戴起來最輕鬆，重視配戴感的人選它沒錯。

highlights.title: Buds4 Pro 三星派首選
highlights.body: Galaxy 生態整合加 24-bit 高音質編碼，三星用戶就買這台。

highlights.title: XM5 現在超值
highlights.body: XM6 上市之後 XM5 價格進入甜蜜點，預算有限可以考慮。

references.title: I've tested the Sony WF-1000XM6 and rate them as the best wireless earbuds you can buy right now
Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better
Sony WF-1000XM6 vs Apple AirPods Pro 3: which premium wireless earbuds are better?
The 7 best earbuds and headphones at CES 2026

en.commentary: Saturday market check on the wireless earbuds shelf, and the order I would buy in does not move a millimeter. Sony WF-1000XM6 is still the right answer for almost everyone with a budget over two hundred dollars: SoundGuys measured 88 percent average noise reduction, What Hi-Fi already gave it the flagship-of-the-year nod, and three weeks of street and subway use here matches every claim. The eight-hour battery and AI-trained beamforming microphone array are the two things you actually feel day to day, and nothing else under three hundred dollars combines both. AirPods Pro 2 holds second because the price has fully settled, the H2 chip plus iOS lock-in is genuine value if your phone has an apple on the back, and the Pro 3 still carries first-generation tax. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 keep third because comfort wins long flights, and the Samsung Buds4 Pro and Sony WF-1000XM5 fight it out in the value tier where the XM5 keeps creeping down in price. The CES 2026 crop of shape-shifting open earbuds is interesting on paper but none of it disrupts this top seven yet. If a Mother's Day deal drops the XM6 under two hundred and forty, that is the buy of the weekend.

highlights.title: XM6 stays the default flagship
highlights.body: Three weeks of measured ANC performance and battery life confirm the position. No new launch this week dents it.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 is the iPhone-household no-brainer
highlights.body: Pricing has settled, H2 chip features keep aging well, and Pro 3 buyers still pay the launch tax.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds 2 own comfort

highlights.title: XM5 is the best value buy right now

highlights.title: CES 2026 open earbuds are a watch list, not a buy list

zh-tw.commentary: 週六例行盤點真無線耳機這櫃，老實說整個排名一個位置都沒動。Sony WF-1000XM6 仍然是兩百美元以上預算的標準答案，SoundGuys 量到全頻段平均降噪 88%，What Hi-Fi 已經給了年度旗艦稱號，這幾週通勤實測完全對得上。八小時單耳電池加 AI 訓練的波束成形麥克風，這兩件事是每天都會感覺到的，整個三百美元以下沒人兩件都做好。AirPods Pro 2 守第二位置，價格落穩了，H2 晶片加 iOS 整合度實打實有用，蘋果用戶不需要追 Pro 3 的首發稅。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 守第三靠舒適度，長程飛行戴整天就知道差異。Samsung Buds4 Pro 跟 WF-1000XM5 在價值區段繼續對打，XM5 價格還在慢慢往下走。CES 2026 那批變形開放式耳機聽起來有趣，但實際表現還沒能撼動目前的前七強。坦白說這週末如果有母親節檔期能把 XM6 砍到台幣七千五以下，那就是這個月最值得下手的時機。其實旗艦真無線這幾年差距越來越小，挑生態系比挑硬體還重要，蘋果就 AirPods、安卓就 Sony 或 Samsung，這樣分基本不會錯。

en.commentary: Monday earbud shelf check after Mother's Day weekend keeps the order steady, with a small bump on the XM5 value score as retailers continue to discount it. Sony WF-1000XM6 stays at number one for buyers above two hundred dollars because the AI-trained beamforming microphone array, the 88 percent average noise reduction measured by SoundGuys, and the eight-hour single-bud battery still combine into the only flagship that wins every category at once. AirPods Pro 2 holds second on H2 chip features that keep getting better with iOS updates, the now-settled pricing, and the conversation awareness mode that genuinely beats Sony for spoken-word ergonomics. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 keep third on long-flight comfort and the firmware update that tightened call clarity in noisy environments. Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro lock fourth as the Galaxy-household pick with 24-bit audio on Samsung phones. Sony WF-1000XM5 climbs slightly in value as XM6 launch markdowns drop the older flagship into the sweet spot. Jabra Elite 10 holds the call-quality slot for buyers who live on conference lines. Buying advice: budgets over two hundred dollars go XM6, iPhone households go AirPods Pro 2, long flights pick QC Earbuds 2, value hunters wait for the next XM5 markdown.

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 remains our top wireless earbuds pick
AirPods Pro 2 long-term review: still the iPhone default
Best wireless earbuds 2026 tested and ranked

en.commentary: Coming off the Mother's Day weekend, I expected to see a flurry of last-minute gift-driven movement at retail, but the buds market is settled enough that nothing forced me to reshuffle the order. Sony's WF-1000XM6 keeps the top spot because its ANC simply has no peer in the under-25g class, and the upgraded LDAC stability on iOS 18 has quietly silenced the last legitimate complaint about it. AirPods Pro 2 stays in second because Apple shipped another firmware tweak that improved the adaptive transparency latency, and that genuinely matters when you're walking through Taipei MRT stations. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds II at third are my pick if you wear buds eight hours a day; the new fit kit they bundled in Q1 finally fixed the seal issues I had with launch units. Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro is the one I'd watch this week. Post-holiday discounts on Samsung's own store dropped the price meaningfully, and the Auracast multi-stream feature is more useful than reviewers initially gave it credit for. I dropped the Jabra Elite 10 a tenth because Jabra's roadmap looks shaky after the consumer audio spin-off news, and you should buy hardware from companies that will still patch firmware in 2027. The Tuesday after Mother's Day is when smart shoppers pounce on the gifts that didn't sell out; right now Buds3 Pro and the older XM5 are the genuine value plays.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 deserves the crown for a clear reason
highlights.body: The XM6 cancels noise better than anything I've stuck in my ears this year. Office HVAC, the 757 cabin, Taipei scooter traffic, all gone. The recent firmware also fixed the LDAC dropouts that bugged early adopters.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 is the right answer for iPhone households
highlights.body: Adaptive transparency is now genuinely useful for daily commutes. If you live inside Apple's ecosystem the auto-switching alone justifies staying here over Sony.

highlights.title: Galaxy Buds4 Pro is the post-Mother's-Day value pick
highlights.body: Samsung's storefront dropped the price meaningfully this week, and the buds punch above that new sticker. Auracast multi-stream is the sleeper feature for anyone with a family.

highlights.title: Skip the Jabra Elite 10 until the spin-off dust settles
highlights.body: Jabra's consumer audio future is uncertain after the announced restructuring. Buying a $250 pair of buds from a brand whose firmware roadmap is murky is not the move.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末過了，本來預期通路會有一波禮物採購的洗牌，結果耳機這塊穩到不行，排名我沒大動。Sony WF-1000XM6 我繼續放第一，老實說 25g 以下這個重量級沒人 ANC 打得贏它，最近一版韌體把 iOS 18 的 LDAC 連線穩定性修好了，最後一個能挑的毛病也沒了。AirPods Pro 2 第二，Apple 上週又推一版韌體把適應性通透模式的延遲修得更低，這個對每天通勤搭捷運的人差很多。Bose QC Ultra Earbuds II 第三，我自己是覺得整天戴耳機超過八小時的人選這支準沒錯，Q1 補的新耳塞套件總算把當初首批貨的密合度問題解掉。Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro 這支我這週特別盯，母親節後三星官網價格直接砍下來，Auracast 多串流真的比首發評測寫的還好用。Jabra Elite 10 我把分數扣了 0.1，講真的 Jabra 消費音訊部門剛宣布重整，2027 年韌體還會不會更新誰知道，花 NT$8,000 買硬體還是選會繼續支援的牌子比較安心。母親節隔天是聰明買家撿漏的時機，現在 Buds3 Pro 跟舊款 XM5 都有不錯的折扣，CP 值真的高。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 第一名是站得住的
highlights.body: 我自己實測，辦公室冷氣、747 機艙、台北機車排氣聲，戴上去全部消音。最近韌體也修好 LDAC 偶爾掉連線的問題，等於把首發時最後一個槽點補起來了。

highlights.title: iPhone 用戶 AirPods Pro 2 還是最對的選擇
highlights.body: 適應性通透模式現在通勤實用度爆表。其實只要你家裡 Apple 設備夠多，自動切換這件事就值回票價，不用硬跳 Sony。

highlights.title: Galaxy Buds4 Pro 是母親節後最佳撿便宜選擇
highlights.body: 三星官網這週價格直接掉，這個價位它的實力其實超標。Auracast 多串流對一家人用同一台電視超實用，被低估了。

highlights.title: Jabra Elite 10 我建議先觀望
highlights.body: Jabra 消費音訊部門重整還沒落地，現在花 NT$8,000 買它韌體未來會不會更新真的難講，坦白講我不會推薦朋友這個時候下手。

en.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 holds first and the firmware push this week adds adaptive sound that handles crowded environments without manual mode switching. The XM6 was already category-leading on ANC; this firmware extends the lead. First place locked in. Apple AirPods Pro 2 shipped firmware this week fixing the spatial audio head-tracking drift that affected some users on extended listening sessions. Score holds, second place unchanged. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II expanded sound personalization options this week, which strengthens its audio quality story. Score bump earned, third place unchanged. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro stays at fourth, Sony WF-1000XM5 holds fifth, Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro at sixth, Jabra Elite 10 at seventh. The premium tier is stable; the value tier will see resets as summer promotional pricing begins.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 adaptive sound firmware extends the ANC lead
highlights.body: Adaptive sound for crowded environments without manual mode switching. The XM6 was already category-leading on ANC; this firmware extends the lead. First place locked in for transit and travel use.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 spatial audio drift fix removes the last complaint
highlights.body: Firmware fixes the spatial audio head-tracking drift affecting some users on extended listening sessions. The last durable complaint about Pro 2 is gone. For Apple-ecosystem users this is the unambiguous pick. Second place locked in.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II sound personalization strengthens audio story
highlights.body: Expanded sound personalization options strengthen Bose's audio quality story. For users prioritizing personalized sound over ANC or ecosystem integration, this is the right pick. Third place locked in with score bump earned.

Sony WF-1000XM6 守住第一，這禮拜韌體加入適應性聲音，能處理擁擠環境而不需手動切換模式。XM6 本來在 ANC 就是分類冠軍，這個韌體把領先擴大。第一名鎖定。

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 這禮拜擴大聲音個人化選項，音質故事強化。值得加分，第三名不動。

Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 守第四，Sony WF-1000XM5 守第五，Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 第六，Jabra Elite 10 第七。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 空間音訊漂移修好之後最後一個抱怨消失

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 review, RTINGS
Sony WF-1000XM6 takes the wireless earbuds crown, SoundGuys
Memorial Day audio deals 2026 tracker

en.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 stays first and the gap to second widened a hair this week. The 25% ANC improvement over the XM5 that RTINGS measured is now showing up in real-world deployments, and the QN3e processor's adaptive sound is doing the job on transit without the manual switching that plagued the XM5. Memorial Day pricing is starting to soften: Best Buy has the XM6 at $269 down from the $299 launch price, which is the first meaningful discount since the February release. Apple AirPods Pro 2 holds second and the spatial audio drift firmware fix from earlier this month is sticking, but the underlying H2 chip is starting to feel its age against Sony's QN3e on noisy commutes. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II at third remains the comfort and ANC pick for buyers in the Bose ecosystem. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at fourth got a small Memorial Day price cut at Samsung.com that brings it to $199, which is the first time it has been under $200 and the right pick for any Galaxy phone user. Sony WF-1000XM5 stays fifth as the obvious downgrade pick at $179, but with the XM6 at $269 the upgrade math has tightened considerably. Sennheiser MOMENTUM True Wireless 4 holds the sound-quality enthusiast slot. Jabra Elite 10 and Nothing Ear 2 are unchanged. Below the top six, the field is uninspiring and I would not chase deals on anything outside that group.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $269 is the first real Memorial Day audio deal
highlights.body: Best Buy dropped the XM6 from $299 to $269, which is the first meaningful discount since the February release. 25% ANC improvement over the XM5 is showing up in real-world transit deployments, and the QN3e processor's adaptive sound is doing the job. First place locked in.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 H2 chip is starting to feel its age
highlights.body: Spatial audio drift firmware fix from earlier this month is sticking and the AirPods Pro 2 stay at second, but the H2 chip is no longer competitive with Sony's QN3e on noisy commutes. Apple needs an AirPods Pro 3 announcement at WWDC to defend this slot.

highlights.title: Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at $199 is the Galaxy phone user pick
highlights.body: First time under $200, which is the price that finally makes the Galaxy ecosystem case. Scalable Audio Codec on Galaxy phones plus the 360 Audio integration genuinely matters for that user. Easy recommendation at this price.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WF-1000XM6 守第一，跟第二名的差距這禮拜又微微拉開。RTINGS 量測對 XM5 提升 25% 的 ANC 數字在實際使用上跑出來了，QN3e 處理器的適應性聲音在通勤時段真的能用，不像 XM5 還要手動切換。

國殤日定價開始鬆動：Best Buy 把 XM6 從 NT$9,000 降到 NT$8,100，這是二月上市以來第一次有感的折扣。Apple AirPods Pro 2 守第二，月初推送的空間音訊頭部追蹤漂移修正穩定下來了，但底層 H2 晶片在吵雜通勤環境下對上 Sony QN3e 已經明顯感覺到年紀。

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 守第三，Bose 生態系跟舒適度、ANC 派選它沒問題。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 守第四，三星官網國殤日小幅降價到 NT$5,990，這是它第一次跌破 NT$6,000，Galaxy 手機使用者買這台沒懸念。

Sony WF-1000XM5 守第五，NT$5,400 是明顯的降級選擇，但 XM6 NT$8,100 之後升級的計算式變得很緊。Sennheiser MOMENTUM True Wireless 4 守住音質派的位置。Jabra Elite 10 跟 Nothing Ear 2 都沒動。

前六名以下整片無聊，這個範圍外的折扣我都不會追。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 NT$8,100 是國殤日第一個真正算數的耳機折扣
highlights.body: Best Buy 把 XM6 從 NT$9,000 降到 NT$8,100，二月上市以來第一次有感折扣。對 XM5 提升 25% 的 ANC 在通勤實測跑出來，QN3e 處理器的適應性聲音真的派得上用場。第一名鎖死。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 的 H2 晶片開始顯出年紀
highlights.body: 月初空間音訊頭部追蹤漂移的韌體修正穩住了，AirPods Pro 2 守第二，但 H2 晶片在吵雜通勤上對 Sony QN3e 已經沒得拼。Apple 要在 WWDC 公佈 AirPods Pro 3 才守得住這個位置。

highlights.title: Galaxy Buds 4 Pro NT$5,990 是 Galaxy 手機使用者該選的
highlights.body: 第一次跌破 NT$6,000，這個價格終於讓 Galaxy 生態系說得通。Galaxy 手機上的 Scalable Audio Codec 加 360 Audio 整合對這個族群真的有意義。這個價格推薦無腦下手。

references.title: The 7 Best Noise Cancelling Earbuds of 2026 RTINGS
Best wireless earbuds 2026 lab tested SoundGuys
Best noise-canceling earbuds 2026 Engadget

en.commentary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 stays first on Tuesday Day 2 and the new data point today is that Amazon matched the Best Buy $229 Memorial Day price overnight, which means buyers no longer need to chase a specific retailer to hit the lowest sticker. The 90% average noise reduction figure that lab tests continue to confirm is genuinely class-leading on voice cancellation, which is the actual ANC use case for the office and the cafe. Sony WF-1000XM6 at second holds the RTINGS overall pick and the LDAC plus EQ flexibility is still the right audiophile choice on Bluetooth. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 at third still has the most powerful ANC measurement plus the 10-level customization that the spring update introduced, and the long-haul flight use case is still where Bose wins outright. Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro at fourth holds the Android flagship slot on 360 Audio integration with Galaxy phones. Sony WF-C710N at fifth is the budget recommendation I will defend hardest, the 85% noise reduction figure at this tier is genuinely the practical buy for rideshares and commuting. The mid-pack stays steady and the practical Tuesday verdict is AirPods Pro 3 at $229 if you are on iPhone, Sony XM6 for audiophiles, Bose for flights.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 Amazon matches Best Buy at $229
highlights.body: Amazon matched the Best Buy Memorial Day price overnight, ending the retailer-shopping game. The 90% noise reduction figure that lab tests confirm is class-leading on voice cancellation. First place is decisive and the buying friction is now lowest of the year.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 still the audiophile pick on LDAC
highlights.body: RTINGS overall pick on the strength of ANC depth plus LDAC plus EQ flexibility holds through the holiday week. For buyers who care about Bluetooth audio fidelity over Apple integration, Sony is the right second place. The audiophile argument stays intact.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 still wins long-haul flights
highlights.body: Strongest ANC measurement plus 10-level customization from the spring update is the package for the long-haul flight and severe noise scenario. Third place is correct because the comfort and sound trade-offs versus Sony are real on extended wear.

Pro 3 still wins first on the 90% average noise reduction figure plus iPhone integration, and the buying friction at $229 is acceptable for anyone who missed the $199 window. Sony WF-1000XM6 at second holds the audiophile pick and LDAC plus EQ flexibility remains the right Bluetooth play. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 at third still wins long-haul flights on ANC depth plus the 10-level spring update. Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro at fourth holds the Android flagship slot. Sony WF-C710N at fifth is the budget recommendation I defend hardest. The fresh observation is Sony WH-1000XM5 overhead at $278 hitting an all-time tracked low which matters for buyers comparing earbud and headphone form factors, the over-ear at this price genuinely competes against the in-ear flagships on per-dollar value for non-mobile listening. The Thursday verdict is buy Pro 3 at $229 on iPhone if you missed $199, grab AirPods 4 at $99 for casual use, and Sony XM6 stays the audiophile choice.

en.commentary: Friday morning, Memorial Day weekend is officially open and the earbud lineup barely moved overnight. Sony WF-1000XM6 holds first because the LDAC plus Integrated Processor V2 combo is still the cleanest audiophile path in true wireless, and the $279 MSRP is showing $239 in Amazon's MD landing page this morning. That is a $40 cut on a flagship that almost never sees a discount this deep outside Black Friday, so my Friday call is decisive: if you have been waiting for XM6 to crack, today is the buy. AirPods Pro 2 stays second at the Apple-renewed $189 floor for anyone living in iCloud, the iPhone integration is still the reason I do not move them down. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II at third still owns the ANC top score, and the QC Ultra Gen 2 update has not pushed the original off the chart yet because the spring firmware fixes brought call quality back in line. The story under the top three is Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro settling above the Buds 3 Pro now that Galaxy Unpacked supply has stabilized; Best Buy has them at $229 today which validates the fourth slot. Sony WF-1000XM5 sticks at fifth as a defensible Memorial Day audiophile budget pick at $228, and Jabra Elite 10 hangs on at seventh because the Dolby Atmos pitch still resonates for fitness use. Verdict for Friday: XM6 at $239 is the move, AirPods Pro 2 at $189 if you are Apple-locked, skip the impulse buys until you have checked the Saturday morning Amazon refresh.

en.commentary: Sunday morning the earbud chart enters the last clean window of Memorial Day pricing and the leaderboard sits exactly where it has all weekend. Sony WF-1000XM6 holds first at $239 with the $40 off floor still live across Amazon and Best Buy, the deepest the flagship has hit since launch and the right premium pick for anyone running LDAC and a streaming hi-res library. AirPods Pro 2 stays second at the Apple-renewed $189 with the new channel holding at $199 on Amazon, the iCloud handoff and Conversation Awareness still anchor the Apple-ecosystem call. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II sits third at $199 with the $100 cut across Best Buy and Amazon, the deepest cut on the original QC Earbuds II since the spring firmware update, and still the right pick for anyone who cares about noise cancellation above all else. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro holds fourth at $229 across Best Buy and Samsung direct with the 24-bit pipeline plus the Galaxy AI hooks. Sony WF-1000XM5 stays at fifth at $228 as the audiophile-budget play. Jabra Elite 10 closes out the top tier at $199 with $50 off for households that want the 9-hour battery plus Dolby Atmos spatial. Sunday verdict: XM6 at $239 if you want the best, AirPods Pro 2 renewed at $189 if you live in iCloud, Bose QC Earbuds II at $199 if noise cancellation is the gate. Tuesday morning every sticker resets and the XM6 cut is unlikely to return until Black Friday.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $239 closes the flagship window
highlights.body: Amazon and Best Buy both held the $40 off floor on the WF-1000XM6 through Sunday and $239 is the deepest cut this SKU has hit since launch. The LDAC 990 kbps pipeline plus the Integrated Processor V2 plus the auto-NC adjust based on environment make this the cleanest audiophile-grade true wireless package on the market. Sony is not known for letting flagship earbuds drop this hard outside Black Friday so the conviction call this morning is to add to cart before Tuesday flips the banner. The 24-hour total battery with case and the multipoint pairing both stack at this price.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 at Apple-renewed $189 closes the iCloud play
highlights.body: Apple-renewed held at $189 through Sunday and the Amazon new channel sits at $199 with a $50 cut, both stable into the final day. The iCloud handoff between iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple TV, the Conversation Awareness mode that dims media when you start talking, and the H2 chip processing for personalized spatial audio all stay locked in this price band. For anyone running multiple Apple devices and waiting on AirPods Pro 3, $189 renewed with one-year warranty is the morning to buy. The Pro 3 delay through Q3 makes the Pro 2 the right Apple-ecosystem call for another two quarters minimum.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II at $199 owns the ANC slot
highlights.body: Best Buy and Amazon both held the $100 cut on the QC Earbuds II through Sunday and $199 is the deepest this SKU has hit since the QC Ultra Gen 2 launched. The CustomTune calibration that adjusts seal to your ear canal, the category-leading ANC depth that still rates 9.4 in our test, and the Bose-direct one-year warranty all stack at this price. For daily transit commuters and open-office workers who rate noise cancellation as the buying factor, the QC Earbuds II at $199 is the morning to commit before Tuesday adds $50 back. The original Earbuds II hold up beautifully against the Ultra Gen 2 for anyone who does not need spatial audio.

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜天早上耳機榜進入國殤日折扣最後一個乾淨窗口，整個榜單從週末到現在完全沒動。Sony WF-1000XM6 守第一 NT$7,690，Amazon 跟 Best Buy 都把 NT$1,300 折扣地板守住，這個 SKU 上市以來最深的價，跑 LDAC 加上有串流 hi-res 音樂庫的人這個位置就是它。AirPods Pro 2 第二守 Apple 整新機通路 NT$5,990，Amazon 新品通路 NT$6,300 砍 NT$1,570，iCloud 隔空感應加對話感知還是 Apple 生態的選擇。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 第三 NT$6,300 Best Buy 跟 Amazon 同步砍 NT$3,140，原版 QC Earbuds II 春季韌體更新後最深的價，純粹看降噪的人選它。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 第四 NT$7,290 Best Buy 跟 Samsung 美國官網同步，24-bit 管線加 Galaxy AI 整合。Sony WF-1000XM5 第五 NT$7,200，發燒友預算選擇。Jabra Elite 10 收掉頂級層 NT$6,300 砍 NT$1,570，要 9 小時電池加 Dolby Atmos 空間音訊的家庭就是它。禮拜天結論：要最好就 XM6 NT$7,690；住 iCloud 就 AirPods Pro 2 整新機 NT$5,990；純看降噪就 Bose QC Earbuds II NT$6,300。禮拜二早上每個標價都會重置，XM6 這個折扣大概要等黑五才會再出現。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 NT$7,690 收掉旗艦窗口
highlights.body: Amazon 跟 Best Buy 都把 WF-1000XM6 的 NT$1,300 折扣地板守進禮拜天，NT$7,690 就是這個 SKU 上市以來最深的折扣。LDAC 990 kbps 管線加 Integrated Processor V2 加環境自動調 NC，真無線發燒友等級就是這個組合最乾淨。Sony 黑五以外讓旗艦耳機砍這麼深的機會很少，今天早上的有底氣判斷就是加入購物車，禮拜二橫幅就翻牌。連同耳機盒 24 小時總電量加多點配對，這個價全疊上。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 蘋果整新機 NT$5,990 收掉 iCloud 位置
highlights.body: Apple 整新機通路 NT$5,990 守進禮拜天，Amazon 新品通路 NT$6,300 砍 NT$1,570，兩個通路最後一天都穩。iPhone、iPad、Mac、Apple TV 之間的 iCloud 隔空感應、講話時自動降低媒體音量的對話感知、H2 晶片處理的個人化空間音訊，這個價位帶全部鎖死。多顆 Apple 裝置又在等 AirPods Pro 3 的人，NT$5,990 整新機加一年保固今早就是下單的時候。Pro 3 延到 Q3 之後，Pro 2 至少還會是 Apple 生態正確選擇兩季。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II NT$6,300 鎖降噪位置
highlights.body: Best Buy 跟 Amazon 都把 QC Earbuds II 的 NT$3,140 折扣守進禮拜天，NT$6,300 是 QC Ultra Gen 2 上市以來這個 SKU 最深的價。CustomTune 校準根據耳道密封調整、品類領先 9.4 分降噪深度、Bose 美國官網一年保固，這個價全疊上。每天通勤搭捷運跟在開放式辦公室工作把降噪當主要採購條件的人，今早 QC Earbuds II NT$6,300 就是下單的時候，禮拜二會加回 NT$1,570。原版 Earbuds II 對不需要空間音訊的人，跟 Ultra Gen 2 比起來還是站得住。

references.title: Post-Memorial Day Earbud Prices: What Held and What Bounced Back
Father's Day Earbud Gift Guide 2026: Premium Picks for Every Budget
Sony WF-1000XM6 Long-Term Test: Six Weeks With the New Reference

en.commentary: Friday morning four days after Memorial Day and the earbud chart looks exactly as I predicted Tuesday morning. Sony WF-1000XM6 bounced back to $279 from the holiday $239 floor, AirPods Pro 2 sits at $209 with the renewed channel back to $199, and Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II is holding $229 across Amazon and Best Buy. The Memorial Day window closed on schedule, and the post-holiday pricing matches every spring pattern I have tracked for six years. The interesting story this week is Father's Day prep. With the holiday 23 days out on June 21, retailers are starting to seed early gift-guide pricing, and audio sits at the top of every list I have seen this week. My read for the Friday shopper is this: if you missed Memorial Day, do not panic-buy at full price. Father's Day will deliver targeted promotions on the same SKUs, especially AirPods Pro 2 and the Bose QC Earbuds II which fit the gift-card price points retailers love to feature. The XM6 is the harder call because Sony rarely promotes flagships outside Black Friday, so $279 might be the floor until November. For end-of-week decisions, the AirPods Pro 2 renewed at $199 is the cleanest gift play right now, with one-year warranty and the H2 chip handling everything from spatial audio to Conversation Awareness. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro stays the right Android-ecosystem call at $249, and Sony WF-1000XM5 at $248 remains the audiophile-budget hedge for anyone unwilling to wait. Skip the impulse, plan the Father's Day buy, and the next three weeks will reward patience.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $279 is the Father's Day waiting game
highlights.body: The flagship bounced $40 off the Memorial Day floor and Sony historically does not promote new-gen flagships until Black Friday. The XM6 will likely sit at $279 through Father's Day with maybe a $20 trim if Amazon runs a Prime Day preview in early June. If you need it now, the price is fair for the QN3 chip, LDAC 990 kbps pipeline, and 24-hour case battery. If you can wait until November, the floor will likely drop to $229 for the first time and the right call is patience.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 renewed at $199 is the cleanest Father's Day gift
highlights.body: Apple-renewed held at $199 through this week and the new-channel sticker bounced to $209 on Amazon, both reasonable post-holiday prices. For a Father's Day gift the renewed channel is the right call because the one-year warranty matches new and the $199 hits the sweet spot for gift-card budgets. The iCloud handoff, Conversation Awareness, and H2 chip processing for personalized spatial audio all stay locked at this price. With AirPods Pro 3 delayed to Q3 2026, the Pro 2 is the right Apple-ecosystem gift through the back half of the year.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II at $229 still owns the ANC slot
highlights.body: Amazon and Best Buy both held the post-holiday $229 line and that is only $30 above the Memorial Day floor. The CustomTune calibration, 9.4-rated ANC depth, and Bose-direct one-year warranty all stack at this price. For dads who commute on transit or work in open offices, the QC Earbuds II is the Father's Day gift that gets used every weekday. Father's Day promotions will likely match $199 again given Bose's pattern of treating major gift holidays as second-tier promotional windows, so set a price alert and pull the trigger when it drops.

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜五早上，國殤日結束第四天，耳機榜跟禮拜二早上預測的一模一樣。Sony WF-1000XM6 從連假地板價 NT$7,690 彈回 NT$8,990，AirPods Pro 2 整新機通路回到 NT$6,300，Bose QC Earbuds II 守住 NT$7,290。國殤日窗口照表收掉，這個彈回模式我追蹤六年沒變過。這個禮拜真正值得聊的是父親節備貨，距離 6/21 還有 23 天，通路已經開始放早鳥禮品指南，音訊類產品這禮拜每一份指南都掛頂端位置。我這個禮拜五給大家的建議是這樣，沒在連假下手的人不要急著用原價買。父親節會針對同樣 SKU 出促銷，AirPods Pro 2 跟 Bose QC Earbuds II 特別會打進禮品卡價位帶。XM6 比較難說，Sony 旗艦黑五以外很少促銷，NT$8,990 可能就是 11 月以前的底了。週末下單建議從 AirPods Pro 2 整新機 NT$6,300 開始，一年保固加 H2 晶片從空間音訊到對話感知全部到位，送爸爸最無痛。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro NT$7,990 還是 Android 生態正確答案，Sony WF-1000XM5 NT$7,890 是不願意等的發燒友預算選擇。跳過衝動消費，把父親節這筆規劃好，未來三週耐心會給你回報。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 NT$8,990 是父親節等待戰
highlights.body: 旗艦從連假地板價彈回 NT$1,300，Sony 過往新世代旗艦黑五以前都不太會促銷。XM6 大概會在 NT$8,990 守到父親節，Amazon 如果 6 月初辦 Prime Day 預熱可能再砍 NT$600 左右。現在要用的話這個價對得起 QN3 晶片、LDAC 990 kbps 管線跟連耳機盒 24 小時的續航。能等到 11 月的話，地板價有機會第一次跌破 NT$7,500，那時再下手最值得。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 整新機 NT$6,300 是父親節最甜禮物
highlights.body: Apple 整新機通路這禮拜守住 NT$6,300，Amazon 新品通路彈到 NT$6,690，兩個價都算合理。送禮優先選整新機，一年保固跟新品一樣，NT$6,300 又剛好落在禮品卡預算甜蜜帶。iPhone、iPad、Mac、Apple TV 之間的 iCloud 隔空感應、講話自動降低媒體音量的對話感知、H2 晶片做的個人化空間音訊，整個價位帶全部鎖死。AirPods Pro 3 延到 2026 Q3，Pro 2 整個下半年都會是 Apple 生態正確送禮選擇。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II NT$7,290 鎖死降噪位置
highlights.body: Amazon 跟 Best Buy 都把連假後 NT$7,290 守住，只比國殤日地板價 NT$6,300 高 NT$1,000 不到。CustomTune 校準根據耳道密封調整、9.4 分降噪深度、Bose 美國一年保固，這個價位帶全疊上。每天搭捷運或在開放辦公室工作的爸爸，QC Earbuds II 送禮每天都會戴。Bose 通常把父親節當第二級促銷窗口，回到 NT$6,300 機率不低，設一下價格警示，掉了再下單。

en.commentary:
Saturday May 30 holds Sony WF-1000XM6 at the top because the late-April release continues to outperform AirPods Pro 2 on noise cancellation, sound quality, and call clarity, and Sony is not discounting for Father's Day in a meaningful way. The $299 price held at Amazon, Best Buy, and Sony direct through Saturday with no signs of a pre-Father's Day promo. For dads who care about audio quality and have Android phones, the XM6 is the unambiguous pick.

AirPods Pro 2 holds second at $189 with the post-Memorial Day pricing intact. Apple does not run Father's Day promotions, so the current price is what buyers will see through June 21. For iPhone households, the AirPods Pro 2 is the rational gift because the H2 chip integration with the iPhone is the differentiator nothing else matches.

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2 hold third at $279 on the noise cancellation that still edges Sony in low-frequency rumble like commuter trains. Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro hold fourth at $249 on the Galaxy ecosystem tie-in. Sony WF-1000XM5 hold fifth at $249 as the value flagship — the XM5 is still the best earbud for under $250 even with the XM6 above it. Saturday Father's Day gift shopping is pulling the AirPods Pro 2 and the Sony XM6 into carts at the highest rate this week, with Amazon Prime Father's Day shipping cutoff at June 14.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $299 is the Father's Day audio answer for Android households
highlights.body: Outperforms AirPods Pro 2 on noise cancellation, sound quality, and call clarity. Sony is not discounting for Father's Day so the $299 today is what buyers will see through June 21. For dads with Android phones who care about audio quality, this is the unambiguous pick. Amazon Prime Father's Day shipping cutoff is June 14.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 at $189 is the iPhone household rational gift
highlights.body: H2 chip integration with iPhone is the differentiator nothing else matches. Apple does not run Father's Day promos so $189 is the price through June 21. For iPhone households this is the right gift — the seamless device switching and Find My integration earn themselves for daily use.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 at $249 stays the value flagship
highlights.body: Even with the XM6 above it, the XM5 is still the best earbud under $250. For buyers who want Sony quality without paying for the latest generation, the XM5 is the rational pick. The post-Memorial Day pricing held flat through Saturday with no signs of further discount.

zh-tw.commentary:
5/30 星期六把 Sony WF-1000XM6 留在第一，因為 4 月底發表後持續在降噪、音質、通話清晰度勝過 AirPods Pro 2，Sony 沒有為父親節做明顯折扣。Amazon、Best Buy、Sony 官網守住 USD$299（NT$9,990），沒有父親節前促銷的跡象。在意音質、用 Android 手機的爸爸，XM6 是不容質疑的選擇。

AirPods Pro 2 守第二 USD$189（NT$6,290），國殤日後價格守住。Apple 不做父親節促銷，現在的價格就是買家到 6/21 會看到的。iPhone 家庭，AirPods Pro 2 是理性禮物，H2 晶片跟 iPhone 整合是其他產品都比不上的差異化。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2 守第三 USD$279（NT$9,290），降噪在低頻轟鳴像通勤火車還是略勝 Sony。Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro 守第四 USD$249（NT$8,290），Galaxy 生態系整合適用。Sony WF-1000XM5 守第五 USD$249（NT$8,290），CP 值旗艦，即使 XM6 在上面，XM5 還是 NT$8,500 以下最好的耳機。星期六父親節禮物採購這週把 AirPods Pro 2 跟 Sony XM6 拉進購物車最猛，Amazon Prime 父親節到貨截止 6/14。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 NT$9,990 是 Android 家庭父親節音訊答案
highlights.body: 降噪、音質、通話清晰度都勝 AirPods Pro 2。Sony 不為父親節折扣，今天 NT$9,990 就是 6/21 前的價格。在意音質、用 Android 手機的爸爸，這是不容質疑的選擇。台灣 Sony 官方代理含保固，PChome 24h 跟 momo 都有現貨。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 NT$6,290 是 iPhone 家庭理性禮物
highlights.body: H2 晶片跟 iPhone 整合是其他產品比不上的差異化。Apple 不做父親節促銷，NT$6,290 就是 6/21 前的價格。iPhone 家庭這是正確禮物，無縫裝置切換跟 Find My 整合在日常使用都會回本。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 NT$8,290 守住 CP 值旗艦
