references.title: Best Wireless Earbuds in 2026: AirPods, Sony, Bose, Samsung Tested
The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026 — Alexa, Google, and Siri tested

en.commentary:
Sunday May 31 holds Sony WF-1000XM6 at the top, and that position is fully earned. The XM6 is the most adjustable earbud on the market today, with class-leading active noise cancellation, meaningfully improved microphone performance over the XM5, and a sound tuning suite in the Headphones Connect app that lets you dial in EQ to a degree nothing from Apple or Bose matches. The $299 price has held stable across Amazon, Best Buy, and Sony direct through the long weekend, and with Father's Day on June 21 approaching there is no reason to expect a discount before then.

AirPods Pro 2 holds second at $189 and for iPhone households the argument is simple: the H2 chip delivers Adaptive Audio, Conversation Awareness, and Personalized Spatial Audio in ways that other earbuds physically cannot replicate because they require deep iOS integration. Apple does not run Father's Day promotions. $189 is today's price and it stays there.

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2 holds third at $279. Bose continues to lead on low-frequency isolation, especially on aircraft and commuter trains, and the fit system is the most physically stable of any premium earbud. For travelers buying a Father's Day gift, the Bose story is comfort plus ANC reliability over long sessions.

Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro holds fourth at $249 as the best choice inside the Galaxy ecosystem. Sony WF-1000XM5 holds fifth as the best earbud under $250, still delivering XM-grade sound and ANC at last generation pricing. Father's Day is pulling the XM6 and AirPods Pro 2 into carts this weekend, with Amazon Prime shipping cutoffs around June 14.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $299 is the unambiguous pick for Android audio enthusiasts
highlights.body: The XM6 outperforms every competitor on adjustability, ANC depth, and call clarity. Sony has not discounted for Father's Day and is not expected to before June 21. At $299 this is a straightforward recommendation for anyone with an Android phone who takes sound quality seriously.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 at $189 is the rational Father's Day gift for iPhone households
highlights.body: Adaptive Audio and Personalized Spatial Audio via the H2 chip are iPhone-exclusive features that competitors cannot replicate. Apple holds $189 with no Father's Day promo. For an iPhone household this is the correct choice and the price is the best it has been all year.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 at $249 remains the value leader
highlights.body: With the XM6 at $299 above it, the XM5 occupies the best-earbud-under-$250 slot with XM-tier ANC and Sony's audio tuning. For buyers unwilling to pay full flagship pricing, the XM5 is the correct decision and continues to hold its value position post-Memorial Day.

zh-tw.commentary:
5/31 星期日把 Sony WF-1000XM6 留在第一，這個位置完全實至名歸。XM6 是目前市場上可調整性最高的耳機，搭載同級最強的主動降噪，麥克風表現比 XM5 有感升級，Headphones Connect App 的 EQ 細調程度是 Apple 或 Bose 跟不上的。Amazon、Best Buy、Sony 官網整個長週末 USD$299（約 NT$9,990）守住，父親節 6/21 前沒有折扣跡象。

AirPods Pro 2 守第二 USD$189（約 NT$6,290）。iPhone 家庭的理由很直接，H2 晶片帶來的 Adaptive Audio、Conversation Awareness、個人化空間音訊，這些功能需要深度 iOS 整合，其他耳機根本複製不了。Apple 不辦父親節促銷，今天的價格就是 6/21 前的價格。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2 守第三 USD$279（約 NT$9,290），在低頻隔音方面，特別是飛機和捷運環境，Bose 還是略勝一籌，配戴穩定性是所有高端耳機裡最好的。要買給常搭機爸爸的父親節禮物，Bose 的故事就是長時間舒適加降噪可靠度。

Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro 守第四 USD$249（約 NT$8,290），Galaxy 生態最佳選擇。Sony WF-1000XM5 守第五，NT$8,500 以下最佳耳機頭銜不動搖，用上一代的價格買到 XM 等級的音質跟降噪，CP 值沒得比。父親節這個週末 XM6 跟 AirPods Pro 2 加入購物車的速度最快，Amazon Prime 到貨截止大約 6/14。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 NT$9,990，Android 音響愛好者的不二選擇
highlights.body: 可調整性、降噪深度、通話清晰度全面勝出所有競品。Sony 沒有為父親節折扣的計畫，6/21 前都是 NT$9,990。對在意音質又用 Android 手機的爸爸，這是直接下單不需要猶豫的選擇。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 NT$6,290，iPhone 家庭父親節理性禮物
highlights.body: H2 晶片的 Adaptive Audio 跟個人化空間音訊是 iPhone 專屬功能，競品複製不了。Apple 不辦父親節促銷，NT$6,290 是今年表現最好的價格。iPhone 家庭選這個就對了，日常使用的無縫切換跟 Find My 都能回本。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 NT$8,290，CP 值旗艦地位穩固
highlights.body: XM6 在上方 NT$9,990，XM5 就穩穩佔著 NT$8,500 以下最佳耳機的位置，降噪跟音質都是 XM 等級。不想付旗艦溢價的買家，XM5 是正確答案，長週末後價格穩定沒有變動。

references.title: I've tested the Sony WF-1000XM6 and rate them as the best wireless earbuds you can buy right now
Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better
Best true wireless earbuds of 2026, tried and tested

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 stays at number one going into June and the reviews keep cementing the verdict. What Hi-Fi now rates them the best flagship wireless earbuds you can buy, and SoundGuys calls them Sony's best-sounding earbuds to date. The package is complete: elite active noise cancellation, audiophile-grade sound, standout microphone performance from AI beamforming, 9-plus hours of battery, LDAC for hi-res on Android, IPX4 sweat resistance, and a 10-band EQ in the app. That combination of mic quality and noise cancelling is exactly why it is the current all-arounder to beat. The AirPods Pro 2 hold second and stay the obvious pick for iPhone owners, delivering reliable sound, excellent ANC, and seamless Apple ecosystem handoff. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds remain third for comfort-first listeners. Bose tunes a frequency response with sensible bass and a target-curve upper midrange, and the fit is the most comfortable in this group, though battery runs a little shorter at five-plus hours per charge. Samsung Buds4 Pro hold fourth and remain the smart choice for Galaxy owners who want tight ecosystem features. My advice this week does not change: the WF-1000XM6 if you want the best all-around earbuds regardless of phone, AirPods Pro 2 for iPhone, Bose if comfort and fit decide it for you.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 stays number one as the all-around champion
highlights.body: What Hi-Fi rates them the best flagship buds you can buy and SoundGuys calls them Sony's best-sounding yet. Elite ANC, audiophile sound, AI-beamforming mics, 9-plus hours of battery, LDAC, and IPX4 make this the current all-arounder to beat.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 stay the iPhone pick at second
highlights.body: Reliable sound, excellent ANC, and seamless Apple ecosystem handoff keep the AirPods Pro 2 the obvious choice for iPhone owners. If you live in Apple's world, this is still the frictionless answer.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds win on comfort and fit
highlights.body: Sensible bass, a target-curve upper midrange, and the most comfortable fit in this group keep Bose at third. Battery is a little shorter at five-plus hours per charge, so this is the pick when comfort, not runtime, is the deciding factor.

highlights.title: Samsung Buds4 Pro are the Galaxy ecosystem pick
highlights.body: Balanced sound, solid ANC, and tight Galaxy ecosystem features keep the Buds4 Pro in fourth. For Samsung phone owners who want seamless pairing and feature integration, this is the smart buy.

zh-tw.commentary:
進入六月，Sony WF-1000XM6 還是守在第一，評測一篇接一篇把這個結論釘死。What Hi-Fi 現在把它評為你買得到的最強旗艦真無線，SoundGuys 說它是 Sony 至今聲音最好的耳機。這套組合很完整：頂級主動降噪、發燒級聲音、AI 波束成形帶來的出色通話麥克風、9 小時以上續航、Android 上有 LDAC 高解析、IPX4 防汗、App 裡還有十段 EQ。麥克風品質加降噪這組合，就是它現在全能王座難以撼動的原因。

AirPods Pro 2 守第二，還是 iPhone 用戶的明顯選擇，聲音穩、ANC 出色、蘋果生態無縫接續。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 守第三，給把舒適擺第一的人。Bose 調出合理的低頻跟貼目標曲線的中高頻，配戴是這組裡最舒服的，只是續航短一點，每次充電五小時出頭。

Samsung Buds4 Pro 守第四，還是 Galaxy 用戶想要緊密生態功能時的聰明選擇。這禮拜建議不變：不管用什麼手機都想要最全能的耳機就選 WF-1000XM6，iPhone 用 AirPods Pro 2，舒適跟配戴是你的決勝點就選 Bose。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 以全能冠軍之姿守住第一
highlights.body: What Hi-Fi 把它評為你買得到的最強旗艦耳機，SoundGuys 說是 Sony 至今聲音最好的。頂級 ANC、發燒級聲音、AI 波束成形麥克風、9 小時以上續航、LDAC、IPX4，讓它成為現在難以撼動的全能王。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 守第二，還是 iPhone 首選
highlights.body: 聲音穩、ANC 出色、蘋果生態無縫接續，讓 AirPods Pro 2 還是 iPhone 用戶的明顯選擇。活在蘋果世界裡的人，這還是最無摩擦的答案。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 靠舒適跟配戴取勝
highlights.body: 合理的低頻、貼目標曲線的中高頻、加上這組裡最舒服的配戴，讓 Bose 守第三。續航短一點，每次充電五小時出頭，所以這是舒適而非續航當決勝點時的選擇。

highlights.title: Samsung Buds4 Pro 是 Galaxy 生態的選擇
highlights.body: 均衡的聲音、紮實的 ANC、緊密的 Galaxy 生態功能，讓 Buds4 Pro 守第四。用三星手機、想要無縫配對跟功能整合的人，這是聰明的買法。

references.title: The Sony WF-1000XM6 are officially our favourite flagship wireless earbuds
AirPods Pro 3 vs. Sony WF-1000XM6: Which Flagship Earbuds Should You Buy?
Sony WF-1000XM6 vs Apple AirPods Pro 3: which premium wireless earbuds are better?

en.commentary:
The Sony WF-1000XM6 holds rank 1, and What Hi-Fi has now named it their favorite flagship wireless earbuds outright. The headline upgrade is the new HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3e, which is three times faster than the QN2e in the previous generation, and you hear the result in the 9.7 ANC score that leads this list. Beyond noise cancellation, the XM6 delivers excellent sound, AI-powered beamforming for standout call quality, LDAC for high-resolution audio on Android, and a 10-band EQ for people who like to tinker. At $330 it is the premium pick, and reviewers consistently rate it as sounding slightly better than the AirPods Pro 3.

The AirPods Pro at rank 2 remain the obvious answer for anyone living in Apple's ecosystem. The newest AirPods Pro 3 launched at $249, which undercuts the Sony by more than $80, and the seamless handoff across iPhone, iPad, and Mac is something no Android-first competitor can replicate. The 9.0 comfort score reflects a fit that disappears in your ears over a long day. If you carry an iPhone, this is the more sensible buy.

The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds at rank 3 stay the comfort-and-isolation specialist, with a 9.4 ANC score that rivals the leaders. The decision across the top three is mostly about ecosystem and fit: Sony for the best overall sound and noise cancellation, AirPods for Apple integration and value, and Bose when all-day comfort and isolation are what you care about most. All three are excellent, and the gap between them is small enough that you can buy on preference rather than worrying about missing out.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Leads on ANC and Sound
highlights.body: The new QN3e processor is three times faster than the previous generation, driving a class-leading 9.7 ANC score. Add LDAC, AI beamforming for calls, and a 10-band EQ, and What Hi-Fi now rates the XM6 as its favorite flagship earbuds.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 Undercut Sony on Price
highlights.body: The newest AirPods Pro 3 launched at $249, more than $80 cheaper than the Sony, with seamless handoff across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. For anyone in the Apple ecosystem, it is the more sensible buy.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds Own Comfort and Isolation
highlights.body: A 9.4 ANC score rivals the leaders, and Bose's signature fit makes these the pick when all-day comfort and isolation matter most to you.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WF-1000XM6 穩坐第一，What Hi-Fi 現在更直接把它評為心目中最愛的旗艦真無線耳機。最大的升級是全新的 HD 降噪處理器 QN3e，速度是上一代 QN2e 的三倍，這個結果你聽得到，就反映在領先全榜的 9.7 分 ANC 上。除了降噪，XM6 還有優異的音質、AI 波束成形帶來出色的通話品質、Android 上支援 LDAC 高解析音訊，以及給愛調音的人用的 10 段 EQ。售價 330 美元，是高階首選，評測者一致認為它聽起來比 AirPods Pro 3 略勝一籌。

AirPods Pro 排第二，對活在 Apple 生態系裡的人來說是理所當然的答案。最新的 AirPods Pro 3 上市價 249 美元，比 Sony 便宜 80 多美元，而且在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 之間無縫切換，這點是任何主打 Android 的對手都複製不來的。舒適度 9.0 分，反映的是戴一整天會忘記它存在的服貼感。你帶的是 iPhone 的話，這台是更合理的選擇。

Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 排第三，仍然是舒適與隔音的專家，9.4 分的 ANC 直逼領先群。前三名怎麼選，主要看生態系和配戴感：要最佳整體音質和降噪選 Sony，要 Apple 整合和性價比選 AirPods，最在意整天舒適和隔音就選 Bose。三台都很優秀，彼此差距小到你可以照喜好買，不用怕選錯。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 降噪與音質雙領先
highlights.body: 全新 QN3e 處理器速度是上一代的三倍，撐起全榜最高的 9.7 分 ANC。再加上 LDAC、通話 AI 波束成形和 10 段 EQ，What Hi-Fi 現在把 XM6 評為最愛旗艦耳機。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 價格壓過 Sony
highlights.body: 最新 AirPods Pro 3 上市價 249 美元，比 Sony 便宜 80 多美元，並在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 間無縫切換。活在 Apple 生態系裡的人，它是更合理的選擇。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 舒適與隔音專家
highlights.body: 9.4 分的 ANC 直逼領先群，Bose 招牌服貼感讓它成為最在意整天舒適和隔音時的首選。

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 holds number one, and this week's RTINGS roundup again crowns it the best wireless earbuds you can buy. The numbers back it up. Around 88 percent average noise reduction across frequencies, a 4.8 out of 5 MDAQS sound score, and an AI beamforming mic system trained on a huge voice sample set that finally makes these genuinely good for calls. That is a flagship that earns its place. The AirPods Pro 3 stay at second as the best pick for anyone in the Apple world, with several outlets still rating their noise cancelling among the very best on the market. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 2nd Gen keep third, and reviewers this week reaffirmed that the second gen fixed the connectivity quirks and added wireless charging while keeping top tier cancelling. The Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro and the older Sony XM5 fill the middle for listeners tied to a platform or hunting a discount on last year's flagship. The Jabra Elite 10 anchors the list on battery and fit. Nothing this week moves the order. Sony leads on measured performance, Apple leads inside its ecosystem, and Bose leads on pure quiet.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 is the measured leader
highlights.body: RTINGS again names it the best wireless earbuds overall. Roughly 88 percent average noise reduction, a 4.8 out of 5 MDAQS sound score, and an AI beamforming mic make it the rare flagship that excels at music, ANC, and calls all at once.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 own the Apple ecosystem
highlights.body: For iPhone users the Pro 3 are the obvious pick, with noise cancelling that multiple outlets still rate among the best available and the seamless handoff and spatial audio that only Apple delivers. That keeps them firmly at rank 2.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 2nd Gen fixed the gripes
highlights.body: Reviewers confirm the second generation cleared the connectivity issues and added wireless charging while preserving Bose's top tier cancelling. It stays at third as the pick for listeners who prize silence above all.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 守住第一，這週 RTINGS 的整理又把它封為最值得買的真無線耳機。數據撐得住這個地位。全頻段平均約 88% 降噪、MDAQS 音質 4.8 分（滿分 5），加上用龐大語音樣本訓練的 AI 波束成形麥克風，這次終於讓它通話也真的能打。這種旗艦對得起它的位置。AirPods Pro 3 守住第二，是 Apple 圈子裡的首選，好幾家媒體到現在還是把它的降噪評為市場上最頂之一。Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds 二代守第三，這週評測再次確認二代修好了連線的小毛病、加上無線充電，又保住頂級降噪。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 跟舊款 Sony XM5 填中段，給綁定平台或想撿去年旗艦折扣的人選。Jabra Elite 10 靠續航跟配戴感守住榜尾。這週沒消息能動排序。Sony 贏在實測數據，Apple 贏在自家生態，Bose 贏在純粹的安靜。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 是數據王
highlights.body: RTINGS 再次把它列為整體最佳真無線耳機。全頻段約 88% 平均降噪、MDAQS 音質 4.8 分、AI 波束成形麥克風，讓它成為少見的音樂、降噪、通話一次到位的旗艦。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 主宰 Apple 生態
highlights.body: iPhone 用戶選它最直覺，降噪被好幾家媒體評為市場最頂之一，還有只有 Apple 給得起的無縫切換跟空間音訊。這讓它穩穩守在第二。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 二代修好了缺點
highlights.body: 評測確認二代清掉了連線問題、加上無線充電，同時保住 Bose 頂級降噪。它守住第三，是把安靜擺第一的人的選擇。

references.title: The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026
The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts

en.commentary: As of June 2026 the Sony WF-1000XM6 stays my top pick because it is the most complete wireless earbud package on the market. Lab testing puts it at roughly 88 percent average noise reduction across frequencies with a 4.8 out of 5 sound score, and the new eight-mic array, up from six on the XM5, gives the AI beamforming far more data to clean up your voice on calls. Battery overdelivered too, nearly nine hours and forty minutes in one charge in testing against a 24-hour case total. The AirPods Pro 3 hold a strong second and the case for them is real, they measure the highest noise attenuation tested at around 90 percent, add heart-rate sensing, and undercut the Sony on price, so for iPhone owners they are often the smarter buy. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds gen 2 stay third for the most comfortable fit and the most natural ANC, and the Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro round out the top tier as the obvious choice on a Galaxy phone. The honest summary this week is that the gap between the top three is small and largely down to ecosystem and price rather than raw capability. Nothing shipped in the past seven days that changes the order, so I am carrying it forward. Buy the XM6 for the best all-round package, the AirPods Pro 3 if you live on iPhone and want the tightest ANC, and the Bose if comfort is everything.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 leads overall
highlights.body: About 88 percent average noise reduction, a 4.8 sound score, and an eight-mic array that sharpens call clarity.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 for iPhone
highlights.body: Highest measured attenuation near 90 percent, heart-rate sensing, and a lower price make them the smart iPhone pick.

highlights.title: Bose for comfort
highlights.body: QuietComfort Earbuds gen 2 keep the most comfortable fit and the most natural-sounding noise cancellation.

highlights.title: Tight at the top
highlights.body: The top three are separated by ecosystem and price more than raw capability, so match the buds to your phone.

zh-tw.commentary: 到 2026 年 6 月，Sony WF-1000XM6 還是我的首選，因為它是市面上最完整的真無線耳機。實驗室測試顯示它跨頻段平均降噪大約 88%，音質拿到 4.8 分（滿分 5），全新的八麥克風陣列比 XM5 的六顆更多，讓 AI 波束成形有更多資料把你通話時的人聲清乾淨。續航也超出預期，實測單次接近 9 小時 40 分，搭配充電盒總共 24 小時。AirPods Pro 3 穩坐第二，理由很實在，它測到的降噪是全場最高、大約 90%，還多了心率偵測，價格又比 Sony 便宜，所以對 iPhone 用戶來說常常是更聰明的選擇。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 二代守第三，配戴最舒服、降噪最自然，Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro 則撐住第一梯隊，是 Galaxy 手機用戶的當然之選。這週老實講，前三名的差距很小，主要是生態系跟價格在分高下，不是實力差。過去七天沒有東西改變排序，所以照搬。想要最全面就買 XM6，活在 iPhone 又想要最緊的降噪就選 AirPods Pro 3，舒適至上就選 Bose。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 整體第一
highlights.body: 平均降噪約 88%、音質 4.8 分，八麥克風陣列讓通話人聲更清晰。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 配 iPhone

highlights.title: Bose 主打舒適
highlights.body: QuietComfort Earbuds 二代配戴最舒服，降噪聽感最自然。

highlights.title: 前段差距很小

references.title: The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026
Sony WF-1000XM6 Gets a Pill-Shaped Redesign: 5 Upgrades Worth Your Money in 2026
Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better

en.commentary: Heading into June 2026 the Sony WF-1000XM6 stays my number one without debate, and a fresh round of testing this month only hardens the case. RTINGS now lists it as their top wireless earbud outright, and the numbers back it: roughly 88 percent average noise reduction across the frequency band, a near-perfect MDAQS sound score, and the new QN3e processor running 3x faster than the chip in the XM5. The redesigned pill-shaped shells finally fix the one comfort gripe I had with Sony, and battery came in just under 10 hours in real testing with a 3-minute-for-45-minute fast charge. That is the complete package. AirPods Pro 2 holds second because for iPhone owners the H2 chip, seamless handoff and adaptive transparency are still the smoothest ecosystem story in audio, and the noise isolation sits right alongside Sony's. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II keep third on pure ANC muscle and the plushest fit in the category, the pair I hand anyone who flies every week. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro stay fourth as the obvious pick inside a Galaxy phone, with the WF-1000XM5 and Buds 3 Pro filling out a deep value-conscious middle. Nothing reshuffled the order this week, so I carried the board forward and let the verdicts carry the weight. My honest steer: buy by phone first. Sony for Android flagships, AirPods for iPhone, Bose if frequent flying is the whole point.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 is the complete flagship
highlights.body: RTINGS now ranks it the best wireless earbud, with about 88 percent average noise reduction, a near-perfect sound score and the QN3e chip running 3x faster than the XM5. The pill-shaped redesign fixes the old fit complaint, sealing number one.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 owns the iPhone
highlights.body: The H2 chip, instant handoff and adaptive transparency remain the smoothest ecosystem experience in earbuds, with isolation right alongside Sony's. For anyone living in iOS, this is still the first pair I recommend.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II rule comfort and ANC
highlights.body: The plushest fit in the category paired with class-leading noise cancellation makes these the pair I hand frequent flyers. For long-haul travel where silence and all-day comfort matter most, they earn a firm third.

highlights.title: Buy by phone first
highlights.body: Sony for Android flagships, AirPods for iPhone, Bose for travel. The top of this category is close enough on raw quality that your handset, not a spec sheet, should make the call for you.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 6 月這個時間點，Sony WF-1000XM6 我還是毫不猶豫放第一，而且這個月新一輪測試只讓它的地位更穩。RTINGS 現在直接把它列為最佳真無線耳機，數據也很硬，全頻段平均降噪大約 88 趴、音質分數逼近滿分、新的 QN3e 處理器比 XM5 那顆快了 3 倍。重新設計的藥丸造型外殼，總算把我對 Sony 唯一的配戴抱怨修掉了，實測續航差一點點就到 10 小時，快充更是充 3 分鐘聽 45 分鐘。這就是完整的全餐。AirPods Pro 2 守第二，因為對 iPhone 用戶來說，H2 晶片、無縫切換、自適應通透模式，依然是音訊圈最順的生態故事，降噪也跟 Sony 並肩。話說回來，Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 守第三靠的是純降噪實力跟全類別最舒服的配戴，每週都要飛的人我就推這副。Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 守第四，在 Galaxy 手機裡是理所當然的選擇，WF-1000XM5 跟 Buds 3 Pro 撐起重視性價比的中段。這週沒事件洗牌，所以我把整個榜延續下來，讓判斷本身說話。老實建議，先看手機再買，Android 旗艦配 Sony、iPhone 配 AirPods、常飛就選 Bose。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 是完整旗艦
highlights.body: RTINGS 現在把它列為最佳真無線耳機，全頻段平均降噪約 88 趴、音質逼近滿分、QN3e 晶片比 XM5 快 3 倍。藥丸造型改款修掉了舊的配戴抱怨，第一名穩穩坐定。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 主宰 iPhone
highlights.body: H2 晶片、即時切換、自適應通透，依然是耳機裡最順的生態體驗，降噪也跟 Sony 並肩。只要你活在 iOS 裡，這副還是我第一個推。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II 配戴降噪雙強
highlights.body: 全類別最舒服的配戴配上頂級降噪，是我推給空中飛人的那副。長程飛行最在意安靜跟整天舒適的人，它穩拿第三。

highlights.title: 先看手機再買
highlights.body: Android 旗艦選 Sony、iPhone 選 AirPods、常飛選 Bose。這個類別頂端純素質夠接近了，該幫你做決定的是你的手機，不是規格表。

references.title: The 7 Best Noise Cancelling Earbuds of 2026
Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026 | Lab Tested & Ranked

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 stays at number one because it does the two hardest things best at the same time: it blocks the most decibels on average of any earbud tested, and it pairs that with sound that audiophiles actually respect. When you want the best noise cancellation and the best sound in one shell, this is still the answer with no compromise asked of you. The AirPods Pro 2 hold second, and the reason is honest, for an iPhone owner the seamless integration, the spatial audio and the hearing-health features make them the better daily driver even though Sony wins the raw audio contest. Ecosystem fit is a real feature. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds stay third as the cross-platform comfort pick, some of the best sound and ANC in the group and compatible with most everything. The Samsung Galaxy Buds always-on for Galaxy owners hold fourth as the Android-side mirror of the AirPods argument. Nothing this week reordered the field. The buying logic is clean: best overall is Sony, best for iPhone is AirPods, best for Galaxy is Buds, and pick by ecosystem before you pick by spec.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 wins sound and silence at once
highlights.body: It blocks the most decibels on average of any earbud tested and pairs that with audiophile-respected sound. Doing both hardest things best in one shell keeps it the no-compromise pick at number one.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 are the iPhone daily driver
highlights.body: Seamless integration, spatial audio and hearing-health features make them the better everyday choice for iPhone owners even though Sony wins the raw audio test. Ecosystem fit is a real feature, holding them second.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra is the cross-platform comfort pick
highlights.body: Some of the best sound and ANC in the group with compatibility across nearly everything. For buyers not locked to one phone brand, it is the most universally satisfying choice and a firm third.

highlights.title: Pick by ecosystem before spec
highlights.body: Sony wins on raw performance, but for most people the right earbud is the one that pairs instantly with the phone they already own. Match the buds to your platform and the spec gaps stop mattering.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 我還是放第一，因為它同時把兩件最難的事做到最好：平均擋掉的分貝數是測過的耳機裡最高，又搭上發燒友真的尊重的音質。想在同一顆耳機裡要最好的降噪跟最好的音質，它依然是不用你妥協的答案。AirPods Pro 2 守第二，理由很誠實，對 iPhone 用戶來說，無縫整合、空間音訊跟聽力健康功能讓它成為更好的日常機，即使純音質的比賽是 Sony 贏。生態貼合本身就是一項功能。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第三，是跨平台的舒適選擇，音質跟降噪都在這群裡名列前茅，幾乎什麼裝置都相容。Samsung Galaxy Buds 對 Galaxy 用戶的 always-on 守第四，是 AirPods 論點的 Android 版鏡像。這週沒事件重排。買法很乾淨：整體最佳是 Sony、iPhone 最佳是 AirPods、Galaxy 最佳是 Buds，先看生態再看規格。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 同時贏音質跟安靜
highlights.body: 平均擋掉的分貝是測過的耳機裡最高，又搭上發燒友尊重的音質。在同一顆耳機把兩件最難的事做到最好，讓它穩坐不妥協的第一。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 是 iPhone 日常機
highlights.body: 無縫整合、空間音訊跟聽力健康功能，讓它對 iPhone 用戶是更好的日常選擇，即使純音質是 Sony 贏。生態貼合本身就是功能，守住第二。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 是跨平台舒適選擇
highlights.body: 音質跟降噪都在這群裡名列前茅，幾乎什麼裝置都相容。對不綁單一手機品牌的買家，它是最普遍讓人滿意的選擇，穩在第三。

highlights.title: 先看生態再看規格
highlights.body: Sony 贏在純效能，但對多數人，對的耳機是能跟手上手機秒配對的那一副。把耳機對準你的平台，規格差距就不重要了。

references.title: The 7 Best Wireless Earbuds of 2026
Sony WF-1000XM6 review: Bigger and better

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 holds number one because it is the most complete pair of earbuds you can buy right now, and RTINGS this week again ranks it the best overall. Its ANC is genuinely class-leading, averaging around 88 percent loudness reduction across the frequency band, and the eight-microphone array (up from six on the XM5) tightens call clarity and wind handling. SoundGuys measured battery at nearly ten hours on a charge, beating Sony's own claim, and the customizable EQ lets you tune the sound exactly how you want. That blend of sound, silence, and stamina is why it stays on top. The AirPods Pro 3 hold second and remain the obvious pick for iPhone owners. Their ANC is the strongest some labs have measured at roughly 90 percent attenuation, and the health features, heart-rate sensing and clinical-grade hearing-aid mode, plus seamless Apple handoff, make them the default for anyone in that ecosystem. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II hold third on comfort and isolation. Bose tuning and fit remain the benchmark for all-day wear and deep low-frequency cancellation, which is exactly what frequent flyers and commuters want. The recurring theme is that the answer depends on your phone: Android and tuning-focused listeners lean Sony, iPhone owners take AirPods, and comfort-first buyers take Bose. No new flagship launch or price move this week reordered the leaders, so ranks hold. The Samsung Buds4 Pro stays a strong fourth for Galaxy owners who want a tight ecosystem fit without leaving the top tier.

highlights.title: The Sony WF-1000XM6 is the most complete pick
highlights.body: Class-leading ANC near 88 percent loudness reduction, an eight-mic array for cleaner calls, customizable EQ, and measured battery near ten hours. That blend of sound, silence, and stamina keeps it on top.

highlights.title: The AirPods Pro 3 are the iPhone default
highlights.body: ANC measured around 90 percent attenuation, plus heart-rate sensing, a clinical-grade hearing-aid mode, and seamless Apple handoff make them the obvious buy for anyone in the ecosystem.

highlights.title: The Bose QC Earbuds II win on comfort and isolation
highlights.body: Bose fit and tuning remain the benchmark for all-day wear and deep low-frequency cancellation, exactly what frequent flyers and long commuters want.

highlights.title: Your phone decides the winner
highlights.body: Android and tuning-focused listeners lean Sony, iPhone owners take AirPods, and comfort-first buyers take Bose. That logic kept the leaders steady this week.

highlights.title: The Samsung Buds4 Pro is the Galaxy pick
highlights.body: It stays a strong fourth for Samsung owners who want tight ecosystem integration, 360 audio, and seamless switching without dropping out of the top tier.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 這禮拜守住第一，因為它就是現在你買得到最全面的一副耳機，RTINGS 這週又把它排為整體第一名。它的降噪是真的頂級，整個頻段平均大概砍掉 88% 的音量，八麥克風陣列（比 XM5 的六顆多了兩顆）讓通話更清楚，抗風切也更好。SoundGuys 實測單次充電撐將近十小時，比 Sony 自己宣稱的還久，可自訂 EQ 又讓你把聲音調成你喜歡的樣子。音質、安靜、續航三樣兼顧，這就是它穩坐第一的原因。第二名 AirPods Pro 3 還是 iPhone 用戶的當然首選。它的降噪在某些實驗室測出大約 90% 的衰減，是測過最強的，加上心率偵測、臨床等級助聽模式這些健康功能，還有蘋果裝置間無縫切換，讓它成為這個生態系裡的預設答案。第三名 Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 靠舒適跟隔音守住。Bose 的調音跟配戴感還是整天配戴跟深低頻降噪的標竿，這正是常飛常通勤的人要的。重點還是那句話，答案看你的手機，安卓跟講究調音的人偏 Sony，iPhone 用戶選 AirPods，舒適至上的挑 Bose。這週沒有新旗艦上市或價格變動撼動領先群，所以名次維持。三星 Buds4 Pro 穩穩第四，給想要緊密生態整合又不想掉出第一梯隊的 Galaxy 用戶。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 是最全面的選擇
highlights.body: 頂級降噪整個頻段砍掉近 88% 音量，八麥克風讓通話更乾淨，可自訂 EQ，實測續航近十小時。音質、安靜、續航三樣兼顧，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 是 iPhone 的預設答案
highlights.body: 降噪測出約 90% 衰減，加上心率偵測、臨床等級助聽模式，還有蘋果裝置無縫切換，生態系裡的人選它最不用想。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II 贏在舒適跟隔音
highlights.body: Bose 的配戴感跟調音還是整天配戴跟深低頻降噪的標竿，正是常飛常通勤的人要的東西。

highlights.title: 你的手機決定贏家
highlights.body: 安卓跟講究調音的偏 Sony，iPhone 用戶選 AirPods，舒適至上的挑 Bose。這個邏輯讓領先群這週穩穩不動。

highlights.title: 三星 Buds4 Pro 是 Galaxy 用戶的選擇
highlights.body: 它穩穩第四，給想要緊密生態整合、360 音效跟無縫切換又不想掉出第一梯隊的三星用戶。

en.commentary:
The ranking holds today because the reviews keep confirming the order. The Sony WF-1000XM6 stays at number one, described this week as the pair to beat and a new benchmark for sound at this level. The combination is what wins: class-leading active noise cancellation, AI-powered beamforming mics that make it genuinely good for calls, LDAC for hi-res on Android, and a 10-band EQ for people who tune. For anyone who wants the best all-around earbuds and is not locked into one ecosystem, this is the buy.

The AirPods Pro 2 hold second as the obvious pick for iPhone owners, where the seamless handoff, spatial audio, and effortless pairing still make them the most frictionless earbuds in the Apple world. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 stay third on a bass-forward sound that wide audiences love plus some of the strongest ANC measured. Samsung Buds4 Pro hold fourth as the best pick for Galaxy users, where the tight integration mirrors what AirPods do for iPhone. The value tier is intact: the Sony XM5 at fifth remains a discounted flagship bargain as the XM6 takes the spotlight, and Samsung Buds3 Pro at sixth offers flagship features for less. The read for today: best overall is the Sony XM6, iPhone owners get AirPods Pro 2, Galaxy users the Buds4 Pro, and bargain hunters the discounted Sony XM5.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 holds number one as the pair to beat
highlights.body: Class-leading ANC, AI beamforming mics that make calls genuinely clear, LDAC hi-res on Android, and a 10-band EQ combine into the best all-around earbuds. Reviewers this week call it a new benchmark for sound at this level. For anyone not locked to one ecosystem, it stays the default top pick.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 stay the obvious iPhone choice
highlights.body: Seamless handoff across Apple devices, spatial audio, and effortless pairing make them the most frictionless earbuds in the Apple world. They hold second because that integration is unmatched for iPhone owners, the pick when staying inside the ecosystem matters more than absolute sound.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 leads on bass and noise cancellation
highlights.body: A bass-forward tuning that wide audiences love plus some of the strongest ANC measured keep it at third. For commuters and travelers who want the quietest possible cabin and a fuller low end, it is the pick, holding firm just behind the top two.

highlights.title: Discounted Sony XM5 is the value bargain as the XM6 takes the spotlight
highlights.body: With the XM6 now the flagship, the still-excellent XM5 drops in price and becomes the smart-money buy. It holds fifth as the discounted flagship, the choice for anyone who wants near-top performance without paying the newest premium.

zh-tw.commentary:

AirPods Pro 2 守第二，是 iPhone 用戶的當然之選，無縫切換、空間音訊、輕鬆配對，讓它在蘋果世界裡還是最無摩擦的耳機。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 第二代守第三，靠大眾愛的重低音調音加上實測數一數二強的降噪。Samsung Buds4 Pro 守第四，是 Galaxy 用戶最佳選擇，緊密整合就像 AirPods 對 iPhone 那樣。CP 值這層維持原樣：Sony XM5 排第五，在 XM6 接棒鎂光燈時成為降價的旗艦撿便宜，Samsung Buds3 Pro 排第六，用更少錢給你旗艦功能。今天的判斷：最佳整體是 Sony XM6，iPhone 用戶選 AirPods Pro 2，Galaxy 用戶選 Buds4 Pro，撿便宜選降價的 Sony XM5。

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 holds my top spot this week, and it earns it on the strength of the best noise cancelling I have put in my ears. On a noisy commuter train it flattens the low rumble so completely that I forget the carriage exists, and the AI beamforming mics finally make these a genuinely good call earbud, which Sony never quite nailed before. LDAC support and a 10-band EQ give Android listeners real control, and the 9-plus hours of battery means a full workday on one charge. The AirPods Pro 3 stay a close second and remain the easy answer for anyone in Apple's world. The new heart-rate sensor and the jump to 8 hours of ANC playback are meaningful upgrades, and the fit is still the most universally comfortable I test. Bose's QuietComfort Earbuds 2 hold fourth as the comfort-and-ANC specialist, and the Samsung Buds4 Pro keep fifth as the natural pick for Galaxy owners who want tight ecosystem features. The choice between the top two really does come down to your phone, and that is a good problem to have. Nothing launched this week to shake the order, though I am watching Sony's hints about a new form of listening, so I held every rank and score steady. If you are on Android and want the quietest commute possible, the XM6 is the one. If you live in Apple's ecosystem, the AirPods Pro 3 are the no-brainer.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 owns the quiet
highlights.body: The best ANC I have tested, flattening train rumble so completely you forget the carriage. The AI mics finally make Sony a great call earbud too.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 for Apple users
highlights.body: A new heart-rate sensor, 8 hours of ANC playback, and the most universally comfortable fit. If you live in Apple's world, this is the no-brainer.

highlights.title: Your phone decides the winner

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Sony WF-1000XM6 守住我心中第一，靠的是我塞進耳朵裡最強的降噪。在吵雜的通勤電車上，它把低頻轟鳴壓得乾乾淨淨，壓到我都忘記自己在車廂裡。AI 波束成形麥克風終於讓它變成真正好用的通話耳機，這點 Sony 以前一直沒做到位。支援 LDAC 加上 10 段 EQ，給 Android 用戶實實在在的調音空間，9 小時以上的續航也代表充一次能撐一整個工作天。AirPods Pro 3 緊咬第二，依然是蘋果生態用戶最省事的答案。新的心率感測，加上 ANC 播放拉到 8 小時，都是有感的升級，而且配戴舒適度還是我測過最通吃的。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 守第四，是舒適加降噪的專家。Samsung Buds4 Pro 守第五，是 Galaxy 用戶想要緊密生態功能時的自然選擇。前兩名怎麼選，其實就看你手機是哪一邊，這算是幸福的煩惱。這週沒有新品撼動排序，不過我有在盯 Sony 暗示的「新型態聆聽」，所以名次和分數都維持不變。Android 用戶想要最安靜的通勤，選 XM6。活在蘋果生態裡，AirPods Pro 3 閉著眼睛買。

en.commentary: The top of the earbuds chart is a two-horse race and I am keeping the Sony WF-1000XM6 in first. After months with both flagships, the Sony edges ahead on the things I weigh most heavily: the AI beamforming microphone is the cleanest I have tested for calls, the noise cancelling shuts out a train carriage, and LDAC plus a 10-band EQ gives Android listeners real high-res control. Battery sits comfortably past nine hours per charge. The AirPods Pro 3 hold a deserved second. For iPhone owners they are the easiest recommendation I can make, the foam-infused silicone tips stay comfortable through a long flight and the H-series chip handovers across Apple devices are seamless. The AirPods Pro 2 at third remain a smart buy now that they sit at a friendlier price, you get most of the experience for less. Further down, the Bose QC Earbuds 2 still deliver the plushest fit and the Samsung Buds4 Pro reward Galaxy owners with tight ecosystem features. What I like about this month is how settled it is. No new launch has shaken the order, so you can buy the pair that matches your phone and your ears without worrying you are jumping a beat too early. If you live on Android and take a lot of calls, the Sony is my pick. If your world is iPhone, the AirPods Pro 3 will feel like they were made for you, because they were.

en.commentary: The earbud order stays put this week, and the Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps the crown because it does the two things I care about most better than anything else: noise cancellation and sound. RTINGS still rates it the best wireless earbuds they have tested, and the reasons are concrete, AI-powered beamforming mics, LDAC hi-res on Android, a 10-band EQ, and ANC that genuinely seals out a commute. At $330 it is the splurge, but for Android users or anyone who likes to tune their sound, it is the one I recommend without hesitation. The AirPods Pro 3 hold a close second as the pick for Apple owners. At $249 they undercut the Sony by a meaningful margin, the comfort is the best in the group, and the seamless handoff across an Apple setup is the convenience that wins people over. The AirPods Pro 2 stay third because they remain a genuinely great buy now that they sit below the latest model on price, the smart value pick inside Apple's lineup. Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 hold fourth on the strength of class-leading ANC for anyone who prioritizes silence above all, while the Samsung Buds4 Pro stay the strong Galaxy companion in fifth. Nothing shipped this week to reshuffle the top, so the ranking carries forward and I stand behind it.

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps my top spot, and the reviews this week back me up. Multiple labs are now calling it the pair to beat in 2026, and after living with them I agree. The noise cancelling is the best I have measured in a true-wireless bud, the AI beamforming mics make me sound clear on calls in a noisy cafe, and 9-plus hours of playback with LDAC means I am not babysitting the case. That is a complete flagship, and it earns the lead. The AirPods Pro 3 stay second and frankly own the best ANC for anyone living in the Apple world, with a fit I can wear all day and the tightest phone integration going. I keep the Pro 2 at third because it is still excellent and now sells at a price that makes it the smart-money Apple pick. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra second gen holds fourth on comfort and a warm, easy sound that I reach for on long flights, and Bose held the price steady, which I respect. Samsung Buds4 Pro round out the top five as the obvious choice for Galaxy owners who want the seamless 360 audio handoff. Nothing launched this week that shakes the order, so the ranks hold. My buying advice is unchanged. Pick for your phone first. The XM6 is the best sounding all-rounder regardless of platform, the AirPods Pro 3 are the move on iPhone, and the Buds4 Pro are the Galaxy answer. Buy the one that disappears into your daily setup.

For pure audio performance these are the buds to beat. The AirPods Pro 3 hold a tight second, and honestly the gap is razor thin. If you live on an iPhone, the Pro 3 may well be your number one even though they sit second here. The older AirPods Pro 2 keep third because they remain excellent and now sell at a friendlier price, which is exactly the kind of value that keeps them relevant. Bose holds fourth on comfort and ANC, and Samsung's Buds4 Pro stays fifth as the strongest Android-first flagship. This week was about confirmation rather than change. There was chatter that Sony may tease a new listening concept, but nothing has shipped, so I am not moving a single rank on a rumor. When that product actually lands and I can measure it, the rankings will respond. Until then the order reflects exactly where these buds sit today.

references.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs Apple AirPods Pro 3: which premium wireless earbuds are better?
AirPods Pro 3 or Sony WF-1000XM6? I tested both for months
Sony WF-1000XM6 vs Apple AirPods Pro 3: Which premium earbuds should you buy?

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 holds first, and this week's deep-dive comparisons against the AirPods Pro 3 only firmed up my confidence. Reviewers consistently called the Sony the more authentic, more revealing listen and credited it with the best noise cancellation on the market, delivering near-silence even in loud environments. Testing also clocked its battery at nearly 9 hours and 40 minutes with ANC on, edging out the AirPods, so I nudged its battery score up a touch this week. If you want the best-sounding, quietest earbuds available and you do not mind the $329 price, this is the one. The AirPods Pro 3 stay a close second and remain my pick for iPhone owners. Long-term testing praised their foam-infused silicone tips for all-day comfort, and at $249 they undercut the Sony while delivering the most seamless Apple ecosystem experience. The choice between these two really comes down to whether you prize sound and silence or comfort and convenience. The AirPods Pro 2 hold third as the value flagship now that they sit below the newer model, and the Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 stay fourth on the strength of cancellation that still rivals the very best. The Samsung Buds4 Pro round out the top five for Galaxy users who want flagship features inside Samsung's ecosystem. Down the list, the older Sony XM5, Samsung Buds3 Pro, and Jabra Elite 10 remain solid picks once they go on sale. Buy by phone first, then by sound priority.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps the throne
highlights.body: This week's comparisons reaffirmed it as the most revealing listen with the best ANC on the market, delivering near-silence even in loud rooms.

highlights.title: Battery edge earns a small bump
highlights.body: Testing clocked nearly 9 hours 40 minutes with ANC on, beating the AirPods Pro 3, so I raised its battery score to 8.6 this week.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 still the iPhone pick
highlights.body: Foam-infused silicone tips earn praise for all-day comfort, and at $249 they undercut the Sony with the smoothest Apple ecosystem experience.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 holds elite cancellation
highlights.body: Its noise cancelling still rivals the very best on this list, keeping it firmly at fourth for travelers who prize silence above all.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 守住第一，這週對上 AirPods Pro 3 的深度橫評只讓我更有信心。評測一致說 Sony 的聲音更真實、解析更清楚，還公認它是市面上降噪最強的一副，就算在很吵的環境也能給你接近全靜音的感覺。測試也測到它開降噪能撐將近 9 小時 40 分鐘的電量，比 AirPods 還久一點，所以這週我把它的電池分數往上加了一些。你想要市面上最好聽、最安靜的耳機，又不介意 9900 多塊的價位，就是這副了。AirPods Pro 3 緊跟在第二，依然是我推給 iPhone 用戶的首選。長期測試誇它注入泡棉的矽膠耳塞整天戴都舒服，而且 7000 多塊的定價比 Sony 便宜，蘋果生態系的順暢度也是最好的。這兩副怎麼選，其實就看你比較重視聲音和安靜，還是舒適和方便。AirPods Pro 2 守在第三，現在排在新款下面，變成性價比旗艦，Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 靠著仍能跟頂尖較量的降噪守在第四。Samsung Buds4 Pro 補滿前五，給想在三星生態系裡用旗艦功能的 Galaxy 用戶。再往下，老款的 Sony XM5、Samsung Buds3 Pro 和 Jabra Elite 10 等到降價時都還是很穩的選擇。先看手機，再看你最在意的是聲音還是別的，照這順序挑就對了。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 繼續坐王位
highlights.body: 這週橫評再次確認它是解析最清楚的一副，降噪市面最強，在很吵的房間也能給你接近全靜音的感受。

highlights.title: 電池優勢小加分
highlights.body: 測試測到開降噪能撐將近 9 小時 40 分鐘，比 AirPods Pro 3 久，所以這週電池分數升到 8.6。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 還是 iPhone 首選
highlights.body: 注入泡棉的矽膠耳塞被誇整天戴都舒服，7000 多塊比 Sony 便宜，蘋果生態系順暢度也最好。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 守住頂級降噪
highlights.body: 它的降噪到現在還能跟榜上最強的較量，對最在意安靜的旅行族來說，穩坐第四。

references.title: Amazon just undercut its own Prime Day deal on Sony's 2026 WF-1000XM6 buds, now at $266 all-time low
I picked out 20+ great Prime Day deals on headphones and earbuds, starting at just $33

en.commentary: Prime Day from June 23 to 26 just made the top of this list more compelling, and it earns a small but real adjustment. The Sony WF-1000XM6 holds first and now drops to a $266 all time low during the sale, roughly $65 off. Best in class noise cancelling, those 8.4mm drivers, LDAC, and 360 Reality Audio already justified the top spot, and at this price the value argument gets even stronger, so I nudged its value score up. This is the pair I tell most people to buy right now. The AirPods Pro 3 stay second and the Prime Day price of $179 is the deal of the event for iPhone owners. Nothing matches its seamless Apple integration and the comfort is the best in this group, so I raised its value score too. If you live in the Apple world, this is your buy. The AirPods Pro 2 hold third as the value veteran, still excellent and even cheaper on sale. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds keep fourth on comfort and ANC that rivals the Sony, the pick if fit and quiet matter more than features. Samsung Buds4 Pro round out the top five for Galaxy owners. My advice this week is simple. If you have wanted any of these, the sale window through June 26 is the time. Grab the XM6 for the best all rounder or the AirPods Pro 3 at $179 if you carry an iPhone.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 at $266 is the buy of Prime Day
highlights.body: It already led on best in class ANC, 8.4mm drivers, LDAC, and 360 Reality Audio. The all time low sale price near $266 makes the value case even stronger, which is why I raised its value score. For most people this is the pair to grab this week.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 at $179 is the iPhone steal
highlights.body: Seamless Apple integration and the best comfort in this group already earned second. The Prime Day price of $179 is the deal of the event for iPhone owners, so I bumped its value score. If you carry an iPhone, this is your buy, no debate.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 is still the value veteran
highlights.body: It holds third because it remains genuinely excellent and goes even cheaper on sale. For anyone who wants the Apple experience without paying for the newest model, this is the smart money pick.

highlights.title: Buy in the sale window or pay full price
highlights.body: The deepest earbud discounts of the season run through June 26. If any of these have been on your list, this is the moment to commit rather than paying regular price in July.

zh-tw.commentary: 6 月 23 到 26 號的 Prime Day 讓這份榜單的頂端更有看頭，也讓它拿到一個小但實在的調整。Sony WF-1000XM6 守住第一，特價期間直接跌到史上最低 266 美元，大約省 65 美元。同級最強的降噪、那對 8.4mm 單體、LDAC、加上 360 Reality Audio，本來就撐得起榜首，現在這個價格讓 CP 值更強，所以我把它的 value 分數往上調。這就是我現在最會推給大多數人的一副。AirPods Pro 3 守住第二，Prime Day 賣 179 美元是這次活動對 iPhone 用戶最殺的價。它跟 Apple 的無縫整合沒人比得上，配戴舒適度也是這組最好的，所以我也把它的 value 分數調高。你活在 Apple 生態裡，這就是你的菜。AirPods Pro 2 守住第三，是 CP 值老兵，依然優秀，特價時更便宜。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 靠舒適度跟逼近 Sony 的降噪守住第四，配戴跟安靜比功能更重要的人就選它。Samsung Buds4 Pro 補上前五，給 Galaxy 用戶。這週的建議很簡單，這幾副有想要的，撐到 6 月 26 號的特價窗口就是時機。要全能就收 XM6，帶 iPhone 就收 179 美元的 AirPods Pro 3。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 殺到 266 美元是 Prime Day 最香
highlights.body: 它本來就靠同級最強降噪、8.4mm 單體、LDAC、360 Reality Audio 領先。史上最低約 266 美元的特價讓 CP 值更強，這就是我把 value 分數調高的原因。對大多數人來說，這週就收這副。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 賣 179 美元是 iPhone 的撿到
highlights.body: 無縫的 Apple 整合加上這組最好的舒適度，本來就讓它排第二。Prime Day 的 179 美元是這次活動對 iPhone 用戶最划算的價，所以我把它的 value 分數調高。帶 iPhone 的人，這就是你的菜，沒得吵。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 還是 CP 值老兵
highlights.body: 它守住第三是因為它依然真的很優秀，特價時還更便宜。想要 Apple 體驗又不想為最新款付錢的人，這副就是聰明花錢的選擇。

highlights.title: 趁特價窗口買，不然付原價
highlights.body: 整季最深的耳機折扣跑到 6 月 26 號。這幾副有在你清單上的話，現在就是下手的時機，不要拖到七月用原價買。

references.title: Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro Max review: Coming for AirPods Pro 3's crown
I've tested both of Anker's new feature-packed Soundcore earbuds
The best wireless earbuds of 2026: Lab-tested by experts

en.commentary: Prime Day closed on June 26, so I am back to ranking on merit and the top eight hold steady. The Sony WF-1000XM6 stays number one because nothing this year matches its mix of class-leading ANC and full, detailed sound in a bud this small. The AirPods Pro 3 keeps second as the obvious pick for anyone in Apple's world, with the best fit in the field and a heart-rate sensor that earns its keep on a workout. The big launch I want to flag is the Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro Max, which arrived at $229 and is genuinely good. Reviewers note its ANC sits level with the AirPods Pro 3 and only narrowly behind the Bose, and the regular Liberty 5 Pro holds a Guinness World Record for call clarity. That is real engineering, and it is the value story of the season. I am not adding it to my ranked eight yet because I want more time on its companion app stability and long-term ANC firmware, which is where Anker has historically wobbled. For now it sits as my standout honorable mention. Everything else stays as it was on June 24. The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 keep fourth for the deepest ANC I can buy. Samsung's Buds4 Pro hold fifth as the Galaxy owner's default. I made no rank swaps because the market gave me no reason to move a proven incumbent. The Liberty 5 Pro Max is the one to watch, and if its software holds up over the next month I expect it to force its way into this list.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 stays on top
highlights.body: Class-leading ANC and full detailed sound in a tiny bud keep it ahead of everything I have tested this year.

highlights.title: Liberty 5 Pro Max is the value story
highlights.body: At $229 its ANC matches the AirPods Pro 3 and the Pro model holds a Guinness record for call clarity. My standout honorable mention.

highlights.title: Why no rank swap yet
highlights.body: I want a month on Anker's app stability and ANC firmware before I rank the Liberty 5 Pro Max. The hardware already earns a spot.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 owns the Apple slot
highlights.body: Best fit in the field plus a useful heart-rate sensor lock it at second for iPhone owners.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 6月26號收了，我把評分拉回產品實力，前八名站得很穩。Sony WF-1000XM6 還是第一，今年沒有哪副耳機能在這麼小的體積裡，同時塞進頂級降噪跟飽滿有細節的聲音。AirPods Pro 3 守第二，蘋果用戶閉著眼選它就對了，配戴是全場最好，心率感測在運動時是真的有用。這輪我想點名的大新品是 Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro Max，台幣大概七千上下，真的很猛。評測說它的降噪跟 AirPods Pro 3 同級，只小輸 Bose 一點，而且一般版 Liberty 5 Pro 還拿了通話清晰度的金氏世界紀錄。這是真本事，也是這季最強的 CP 值故事。我先不把它放進排名八強，是想多花點時間看它的 App 穩定度跟降噪韌體，這塊 Anker 以前比較容易出包。所以它先當我的特別推薦。其他維持6月24號的樣子。Bose QuietComfort Earbuds 2 守第四，降噪是我買得到最深的。Samsung Buds4 Pro 守第五，Galaxy 用戶的預設值。這週我沒做排名對調，市場沒給我理由去動站穩的老將。Liberty 5 Pro Max 是要盯緊的那一副，韌體只要撐過這個月，我預期它會硬擠進這份榜單。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 這麼小的體積裡塞進頂級降噪跟飽滿細節，今年我測過的沒一副追得上。

highlights.title: Liberty 5 Pro Max 是 CP 值故事
highlights.body: 台幣約七千，降噪追平 AirPods Pro 3，Pro 版還有通話金氏紀錄。我的特別推薦。

highlights.title: 為什麼還沒對調排名
highlights.body: 我想花一個月看 Anker 的 App 跟降噪韌體穩不穩，才把 Liberty 5 Pro Max 排進去。硬體已經夠格。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 顧好蘋果這塊
highlights.body: 全場最好的配戴加上實用心率感測，iPhone 用戶就鎖在第二。

en.commentary: Prime Day is well behind us, so I am firmly back to ranking on merit, and the top eight hold steady. The Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps number one because nothing this year matches its blend of class-leading ANC and full, detailed sound in a bud this small. What Hi-Fi named it their favourite flagship this week, and lab testing pegs its noise reduction near the very top while its tuning stays Sony's best yet. That combination is why I keep it first. The AirPods Pro 3 holds second and stays the obvious pick for anyone in Apple's world. Testing this week gave it the single best ANC figure in the field at around 90 percent average attenuation, and the fit plus the heart-rate sensor earn their keep on a workout. The AirPods Pro 2 stays third as the value entry into that ecosystem now that the Pro 3 sits above it. Bose keeps fourth on comfort and quiet, and the Samsung Buds4 Pro holds fifth as the strongest Android-first flagship. Further down, the Buds3 Pro and Jabra Elite 10 stay the sensible step-down picks, with the Jabra winning on battery. Nothing launched this week to reshuffle the order, and the Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro Max I flagged earlier remains a strong value alternative rather than a top-eight disruptor. This is a settled flagship field where the leaders are proven and the gaps are narrow.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 stays the flagship to beat
highlights.body: What Hi-Fi named it their favourite flagship this week, and lab tests put its ANC and tuning at the top. It holds first on merit.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 leads on raw ANC
highlights.body: Testing gave it the best noise reduction in the field at around 90 percent, and its fit plus heart-rate sensor shine on workouts.

highlights.title: Back to a merit basis
highlights.body: With Prime Day well behind us, the ranking is fully on performance again and the top eight hold steady from last entry.

highlights.title: Value picks hold their spots
highlights.body: The AirPods Pro 2 stays the value entry to Apple's ecosystem, and the Jabra Elite 10 wins the lower tier on battery life.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 早就過去了,所以我完全回到看實力排名,前八名維持不動。Sony WF-1000XM6 繼續坐第一,因為今年沒有東西能在這麼小的耳塞裡同時做到頂級 ANC 加上飽滿又有細節的音質。這週 What Hi-Fi 把它選為他們最愛的旗艦,實驗室測試也把它的降噪壓在最前段,調音又是 Sony 至今最好的一次,這組合就是我把它擺第一的原因。AirPods Pro 3 守住第二,對蘋果生態圈的人來說就是最理所當然的選擇。這週測試給它全場最強的 ANC 數字,平均衰減大約 90%,配戴加上心率感測器運動時真的派得上用場。AirPods Pro 2 維持第三,現在 Pro 3 排在它上面,它就成了進入蘋果生態圈的划算入門款。Bose 靠舒適跟安靜守第四,Samsung Buds4 Pro 以最強 Android 陣營旗艦守第五。往下看,Buds3 Pro 跟 Jabra Elite 10 還是合理的降級選擇,Jabra 靠續航取勝。這週沒有新機攪動排序,我先前點名的 Soundcore Liberty 5 Pro Max 還是划算的替代款,還沒到能擠進前八的程度。這是一個穩定的旗艦戰場,領先者都經得起考驗,彼此差距也很小。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 依然是要被超越的旗艦
highlights.body: 這週 What Hi-Fi 選它為最愛旗艦,實驗室測試把它 ANC 跟調音都壓在最前段,靠實力守第一。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 純 ANC 領先
highlights.body: 測試給它全場最強降噪,平均約 90%,配戴加心率感測器運動時特別亮眼。

highlights.title: 回到看實力排名
highlights.body: Prime Day 早就過去,排名完全回到看效能,前八名跟上一筆維持不動。

highlights.title: 划算選擇守住位置
highlights.body: AirPods Pro 2 是進蘋果生態圈的划算入門款,Jabra Elite 10 靠續航贏下較低那一級。

en.commentary: The Sony WF-1000XM6 keeps my number one, and RTINGS lands in the same place this week: it posts some of the highest sound and noise-cancelling scores of anything tested, and on a long flight that deep low-frequency cancellation is what you feel first. It is the pair I travel with. The AirPods Pro 3 hold second and stay the automatic pick for iPhone owners, with eight-hour battery, cleaner sound this generation, and the seamless handoff across Apple devices that nothing else matches. The AirPods Pro 2 stay third as the value-Apple choice now that they sit below the Pro 3. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen2 keeps fourth, and reviewers still rate its low-end cancellation alongside the Sony as the deepest available, my pick for pure comfort and quiet. The Samsung Buds4 Pro hold fifth as the Galaxy-native buds that shine on an S26. Down the list, the Sony WF-1000XM5 and Samsung Buds3 Pro remain smart value now that newer models sit above them. Nothing shipped this week to reorder things, so scores hold. My steer stays simple: iPhone owners buy AirPods Pro 3, Galaxy owners buy Buds4 Pro, and everyone chasing the best sound and silence buys the Sony XM6.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 stays on top
highlights.body: Some of the highest sound and noise-cancelling scores tested, with the deep low-end cancellation you feel on a flight.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 for iPhone
highlights.body: Eight-hour battery, cleaner sound this generation, and seamless Apple handoff nothing else matches.

highlights.title: Bose for comfort and quiet
highlights.body: Low-end cancellation rated alongside the Sony as the deepest available, my pick for pure calm.

highlights.title: Buds4 Pro for Galaxy
highlights.body: The native pick that shines on an S26, with the tightest integration for Samsung owners.

highlights.title: Smart value picks
highlights.body: The Sony XM5 and Samsung Buds3 Pro stay strong buys now that newer models sit above them.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 續居我的第一，這週 RTINGS 也站在同一邊：它的音質跟降噪分數是所有實測裡數一數二的，長途飛行時，那種深沉的低頻降噪是你最先感受到的東西。這副就是我出門旅行帶的耳機。AirPods Pro 3 守住第二，依舊是 iPhone 用戶的自動選項，八小時續航、這一代更乾淨的聲音，加上蘋果裝置間無縫切換，這點沒人比得上。AirPods Pro 2 排第三，現在位置在 Pro 3 之下，成了蘋果陣營的超值選。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 二代守住第四，評測還是把它的低頻降噪跟 Sony 並列為最深的，是我追求純粹舒適與安靜時的首選。Samsung Buds4 Pro 排第五，是 Galaxy 原生耳機，配 S26 特別出色。往下看，Sony WF-1000XM5 跟 Samsung Buds3 Pro 在有新款壓上後，依舊是聰明的超值選。這週沒有新機需要重排，所以分數維持。建議很簡單：iPhone 用戶買 AirPods Pro 3，Galaxy 用戶買 Buds4 Pro，追求最好音質與寧靜的所有人買 Sony XM6。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 續坐榜首
highlights.body: 音質與降噪分數數一數二，飛行時最先感受到的就是那深沉低頻降噪。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 給 iPhone
highlights.body: 八小時續航、這代更乾淨的聲音，加上沒人比得上的蘋果無縫切換。

highlights.title: Bose 主打舒適與安靜
highlights.body: 低頻降噪與 Sony 並列最深，是追求純粹寧靜時的首選。

highlights.title: Buds4 Pro 給 Galaxy
highlights.body: 原生首選，配 S26 特別出色，三星用戶整合度最緊密。

highlights.title: 聰明超值選
highlights.body: Sony XM5 與 Samsung Buds3 Pro 在新款壓上後，依舊是很划算的選擇。

Sony WF-1000XM6 vs Apple AirPods Pro 3: which premium wireless earbuds are better?

en.commentary: The top of this chart is the closest it has been all year, and after another week of listening I am keeping the Sony WF-1000XM6 at number one. It posts roughly 88 percent average noise reduction across the band, a genuinely refined sound with LDAC hi-res support, and a mic system Sony trained on a huge voice dataset that finally makes calls a strength rather than a compromise. For pure audio performance it is the one to beat. The AirPods Pro 3 stay a razor thin second because they win on everything around the sound: seamless Apple pairing, spatial audio, heart rate tracking, and an IP57 rating that shrugs off sweat and dust. If you own an iPhone, that integration is worth more than a small sound gap, and the 249 dollar price makes it easier to swallow than Sony's 330. The AirPods Pro 2 hold third as the value flagship now that the 3 exists. Bose QCe2 keeps the plushest comfort and still cancels noise brilliantly. Samsung's Buds4 Pro round out the top five and are the obvious choice for a Galaxy phone. My advice is unchanged: pick XM6 if sound and ANC lead your list, AirPods Pro 3 if your phone has an Apple logo, and let fit decide any close call, because the best earbud is the one you forget you are wearing.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 leads on sound and ANC
highlights.body: About 88 percent average noise reduction, refined LDAC hi-res sound, and a hugely improved mic. For pure listening it is the flagship to beat, so it holds rank one.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 win the ecosystem
highlights.body: Seamless Apple pairing, spatial audio, heart rate tracking, and IP57 durability at 249 dollars. For an iPhone owner that package outweighs a small sound gap. A very close second.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 are the value flagship
highlights.body: Now that the 3 exists, the 2 delivers most of the experience for less. If you want AirPods without the top price, this is the smart buy at rank three.

highlights.title: Bose QCe2 nails comfort
highlights.body: The plushest fit here paired with excellent cancellation. For long flights or all-day wear, Bose remains the pair I reach for when comfort leads.

highlights.title: Samsung Buds4 Pro for Galaxy owners
highlights.body: Balanced sound, solid ANC, and full 360 Audio plus seamless switching on a Galaxy phone. It rounds out the top five as the obvious Samsung pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 這份榜單的頭段今年從沒這麼接近過，又聽了一個禮拜之後，我還是把 Sony WF-1000XM6 放在第一。它全頻段平均降噪大概八成八，聲音是真的細膩，還支援 LDAC 高解析，麥克風 Sony 拿超大語音資料集訓練過，通話終於變成強項而不是妥協。純論聲音表現，它就是那個要被超越的標竿。AirPods Pro 3 以極小差距守住第二，因為它贏在聲音以外的所有東西，Apple 無縫配對、空間音訊、心率偵測，還有 IP57 防塵防汗。你如果用 iPhone，這套整合體驗的價值大過那一點點聲音差距，而且售價大概台幣七千五，比 Sony 破萬的定價好入手不少。AirPods Pro 2 排第三，三代出了之後它就變成 CP 值旗艦。Bose QCe2 配戴還是最舒服的，降噪照樣一流。Samsung Buds4 Pro 收在前五，Galaxy 手機用戶閉著眼睛選它就對了。我的建議沒變，聲音跟降噪擺第一就選 XM6，手機是蘋果就挑 AirPods Pro 3，遇到難分高下的就讓配戴感決定，因為最好的耳機就是那副你會忘記自己戴著的。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 聲音跟降噪領先
highlights.body: 全頻平均降噪約八成八，LDAC 高解析聲音細膩，麥克風大幅進步。純聽感它就是要被超越的旗艦，第一名坐穩。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 3 贏在生態系
highlights.body: Apple 無縫配對、空間音訊、心率偵測，加上 IP57 耐用，售價約台幣七千五。iPhone 用戶這套組合勝過一點點聲音差距，緊咬第二。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 是 CP 值旗艦
highlights.body: 三代出了之後，二代用更低的價格給你大部分體驗。想要 AirPods 又不想付頂規價，第三名這台就是聰明選擇。

highlights.title: Bose QCe2 配戴最舒服
highlights.body: 這裡最軟最貼耳的配戴，搭配一流降噪。長途飛行或整天配戴，重視舒適時我還是拿 Bose。

highlights.title: Samsung Buds4 Pro 是 Galaxy 首選
highlights.body: 聲音均衡、降噪扎實，在 Galaxy 手機上還有完整 360 Audio 跟無縫切換。收在前五，Samsung 用戶的明顯解答。
